name: Mark Ronchetti
subject: We missed our crucial goal
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Mark Ronchetti for Governor, Anne Perez Treasurer
body:
For the past few days, we’ve been letting you know that we were closing in on one of the most crucial deadlines we’ve had yet this entire cycle: Our second to LAST End-of-Month deadline and our FINAL End-of-Quarter deadline. | | |
---
| | Peter, For the past few days, we’ve been letting you know that we were closing in on one of the most crucial deadlines we’ve had yet this entire cycle: Our second to LAST End-of-Month deadline and our FINAL End-of-Quarter deadline. Well, Peter, I woke up to some unfortunate news from my finance team this morning that we MISSED this all important deadline. We needed to show up in a massive way the last few days, and unfortunately we fell short. My finance team has let me know they’re going to extend our deadline for 3 more days... but Peter, they have given us STRICT orders that we NEED to meet this deadline in order to keep our ads on the air and we cannot afford to go down.
---

name: Team Beto
subject: Transparency
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
[1]Beto O'Rourke

Since this is a grassroots campaign, we’re going to be really transparent
with you. After counting all of the contributions that came in at the end
of this last TEC reporting period, we’ve realized that we fell $119,399
short of what we had hoped to raise before midnight on Thursday.

We can’t take this lightly. Too much is on the line in this election for
us to miss a single one of our fundraising goals.

But the good news is that if 1 in 3 people who read this email each pitch
in $3 then we can get back on track in the next few hours.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=bft-em-20221001-3.2WX-uS&refcode=ema20221001-210495&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=210495%2E444211%2EKQPdUT ]Will you support Beto and our campaign to deliver for everyone across
Texas with a $3 contribution right now? Please help us
close the gap.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=bft-em-20221001-3.2WX-uS&refcode=ema20221001-210495&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=210495%2E444211%2EKQPdUT ]Contribute $3

Beto has a positive, unifying vision for the state of Texas. He’s focused
on the things that will improve Texans’ daily lives — world-class schools,
expanding Medicaid, and great jobs that pay a living wage. Greg Abbott is
leading this state down the wrong path, and his extremism — including an
abortion ban with no exceptions for rape or incest — is hurting the people
of Texas.

If thousands of people dig deep today and contribute what they can afford,
we know that we can make up the gap before the end of the day. [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=bft-em-20221001-3.2WX-uS&refcode=ema20221001-210495&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=210495%2E444211%2EKQPdUT ]Can
Beto count on you to donate today?

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=bft-em-20221001-3.2WX-uS&refcode=ema20221001-210495&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1040&akid=210495%2E444211%2EKQPdUT ]Contribute $3

Let’s do this!

Team Beto

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/bft-unsubscribe/?t=1041&akid=210495%2E444211%2EKQPdUT

Pol. Adv. Paid for by Beto for Texas.

name: Warnock, Raphael
subject: did you see my earlier message?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
Friend, I have an important update on our crucial race in Georgia: **With our extended deadline rapidly approaching, we're more than 98% of the way to our original goal. But at this critical moment, we're still $17,325 short.**
---
Here's why this is so urgent: _NBC News_ confirms that Georgia is this year's _most_ __im_ portant_ swing state, which means that our race could decide Senate control. But with recent polls showing me neck and neck with my GOP opponent, Herschel Walker, missing fundraising goals like this one could put this seat – and our entire Senate majority – in serious danger.
**So please, friend****: Will you give $5 or more now – as much as you can spare before midnight tonight – to help us close our budget gap, win in Georgia, and keep the Senate blue?**
**Here’s the best link to donate:[https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email-2022-q4](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/51771063/370323906/-598064402?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk4441-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NzZhZWVlMC1lNTQxLWVkMTEtYjQ5NS0wMDIyNDgzMmU0Y2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iLKyJTcvlTZpbLWryLKWWIm4nHudjVU1GeByZFwthmg=)**
Thank you for pitching in.
– Rev. Warnock
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Reverend Warnock**
Date: Sat, Oct 1, 2022
Subject: the most important email you'll get today
| | |
---
This isn't the update I was hoping to share, friend:
**With just one month until Election Day, we fell short of our very last end-of-quarter goal – the most important goal of this campaign.** Unless we close our budget gap ASAP, we could put this seat and our Senate majority in danger.
Right now, polls show me _neck and neck_ with Herschel Walker, which means we're on the cusp of taking the lead and winning this race. But with experts at _FiveThirtyEight_ saying Georgia will decide Senate control once again, we have zero room for error.
**That's why we absolutely cannot fall short again – especially not when national Republicans are spending millions to defeat me and flip this seat. We have one more chance to turn things around, but time is running out, so I'm asking:**
**[Will you rush $5 or more right now to help close our budget gap, win in Georgia, and defend our Democratic Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/51771064/370323907/-598064402?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk4441-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NzZhZWVlMC1lNTQxLWVkMTEtYjQ5NS0wMDIyNDgzMmU0Y2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iLKyJTcvlTZpbLWryLKWWIm4nHudjVU1GeByZFwthmg=)**

It means so much to know I can count on you when it matters most. Thank you.

– Rev. Raphael Warnock
**Please read on for a personal message from Sen. Rev. Raphael Warnock:** Friend – thank you. I’m grateful to have grassroots folks like you standing alongside me in our critical fights for justice. Our midterm elections are taking place this November, and I need your help.

With Democrats’ razor-thin majority in the Senate, Republicans have to flip just one seat to retake control – and experts say that I’m the most vulnerable Democratic senator up for reelection. Mitch McConnell and his GOP allies are flooding Georgia with millions to defeat me, and GOP super PACs are smearing me with attack ads. We need to fight back now – but I don't take a dime from corporate PACs, so I'm fully relying on your grassroots support to power this campaign to victory.

clean_body: Friend, I have an important update on our crucial race in Georgia: With our extended deadline rapidly approaching, we're more than 98% of the way to our original goal. But at this critical moment, we're still $17,325 short. Here's why this is so urgent: NBC News confirms that Georgia is this year's most im portant swing state, which means that our race could decide Senate control. But with recent polls showing me neck and neck with my GOP opponent, Herschel Walker, missing fundraising goals like this one could put this seat – and our entire Senate majority – in serious danger. So please, friend: Will you give $5 or more now – as much as you can spare before midnight tonight – to help us close our budget gap, win in Georgia, and keep the Senate blue? Here’s the best link to donate:= Thank you for pitching in. – Rev. Warnock \---------- Forwarded message ---------- From: Reverend Warnock Date: Sat, Oct 1, 2022 Subject: the most important email you'll get today | | | This isn't the update I was hoping to share, friend: With just one month until Election Day, we fell short of our very last end-of-quarter goal – the most important goal of this campaign. Unless we close our budget gap ASAP, we could put this seat and our Senate majority in danger. Right now, polls show me neck and neck with Herschel Walker, which means we're on the cusp of taking the lead and winning this race. But with experts at FiveThirtyEight saying Georgia will decide Senate control once again, we have zero room for error. That's why we absolutely cannot fall short again – especially not when national Republicans are spending millions to defeat me and flip this seat. We have one more chance to turn things around, but time is running out, so I'm asking: = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = It means so much to know I can count on you when it matters most. Thank you. – Rev. Raphael Warnock Please read on for a personal message from Sen. Rev. Raphael Warnock: Friend – thank you. I’m grateful to have grassroots folks like you standing alongside me in our critical fights for justice. Our midterm elections are taking place this November, and I need your help. With Democrats’ razor-thin majority in the Senate, Republicans have to flip just one seat to retake control – and experts say that I’m the most vulnerable Democratic senator up for reelection. Mitch McConnell and his GOP allies are flooding Georgia with millions to defeat me, and GOP super PACs are smearing me with attack ads. We need to fight back now – but I don't take a dime from corporate PACs, so I'm fully relying on your grassroots support to power this campaign to victory. name: MAGA Alert (via DLCC.org)
subject: Trump just got off stage
body:
We know it’s late, so we’ll make this quick: | | |
---
| | We know it’s late, so we’ll make this quick:
1. Just now, Trump walked off stage after his latest incoherent, rant-filled speech at tonight’s MAGA rally in Michigan (his fourth in less than a month!)
2. He’s hosting these rallies in swing states around the country to fire up Republicans and raise cash for his extremist endorsees – and his cronies just announced a new Super PAC designed to funnel money into key races across the country!
3. This is all part of Trump’s plan to set the stage for his 2024 run. Just look at what he said last month in Ohio:

He BLEW THE LID OPEN on the role the FBI had in the unjustified and unwarranted raid on President Trump's home saying:
_"...You don't get to read the affidavit justifying the FBI's indefensible raid on the home of Joe Biden's primary political opponent. In fact, you don't even get to know why you're not allowed to know because that information has been redacted too..."_
This begs the question...

---
| |
Peter, The first time I ran for office I lost my primary, but as a product of the American dream, I don't believe in giving up. My name is Catalina, and I'm the America First Hispanic woman running for Congress in what is now the _**_CLOSEST RACE IN AMERICA-_**_ the one race that will define Nancy Pelosi's legacy. This is my first time reaching out to you, and I'm afraid of what happens if this email doesn't work. **_But I'm not afraid to tell you that I am a Christian who is Pro-Life, Pro-Family, and Pro-Law Enforcement._**
---
| | | [SUPPORT CATALINA ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61469256:6FQ2cZVNK:m:1:3334294963:185B1274E2A6E0AFBA7D5F70D31CBFAC:r)
---
| | Democrats and their partners in the liberal media will tell you that someone of my ethnicity and my age can't be any of those things. They assume that I'm just a Hispanic millennial who won't challenge them on their lack of principles, platform, and patriotism. And they're spending millions to shut me up because they know they can't take another humiliating loss from within the Hispanic community. But I refuse to be muzzled & I'll _**_never_**_ back down from challenging the radical left on their divisive, Anti-American bullshit. **I will always stand up to defend our Christian conservative values and our way of life. I will always stand up for what is right.** I'm not a career politician with a Rolodex of corporate mega-donors. As a conservative, I'll admit that I struggle asking others for help, but I know that I have to because this race is about so much more than me. So, I'm asking you to chip in just a few bucks today to help my campaign move forward, united against the radical left and their liberal agenda. **_We're so close to flipping this seat & with your help, I know we will!_**
---

Friend,

_We both wanted to reach out to you to share some exciting news._

name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: Hold Jared Polis Accountable!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heidi for Governor
body:
Fentanyl is destroying out state and Jared Polis won't talk about it...
[](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qjutltk-ttjjilthht-r/) Dear Peter, There's a moment from the debate this week that I just can't shake.** Jared Polis completely deflected and ignored questions about why he signed the deadly 2019 fentanyl bill. **Moms like Miki, who lost her 16-year-old daughter deserve answers. During the debate, Miki bravely sat in the front, holding up a photo of her daughter for him to see. That law Polis SIGNED is DESTROYING our state. Decriminalizing fentanyl is one of the most destructive things a governor has ever done to Colorado.Fentanyl is killing our kids at record numbers. And right here in Colorado, we have the 2nd highest fentanyl death rate in the COUNTRY. We need to declare a state of emergency on fentanyl. It's not about addiction, as he responded to me in the debate this week. These kids don't know that they're getting poisoned. It's time to take our state back. Help us spread this message by donating today: [heidiforgov.com/donate](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qjutltk-ttjjilthht-y/). [](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qjutltk-ttjjilthht-j/) **COLORADO PARENTS ARE TICKED OFF.** This week I was on The Clay Travis and Buck Sexton Show talking about how parents are FED UP with Jared Polis. Colorado has become one of the most dangerous states to be a kid. He is ignoring what's going on in our schools, crime is skyrocketing, and some parents are having to choose between buying groceries, gas, and school supplies because inflation is so high.

[Listen to my full interview with Clay & Buck HERE.](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qjutltk-ttjjilthht-t/) And learn more about how I will put our KIDS FIRST at [heidiforgov.com/priorities](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qjutltk-ttjjilthht-i/). [](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qjutltk-ttjjilthht-d/) **Super Saturday in El Paso was a major success!** **Thank you so much to all the volunteers that came out to help knock doors today!** We have TWO upcoming Town Halls this week and I'd love to see you there. Come meet Danny & I and ask us all your tough questions. We want you to be 100% confident when you cast your vote in November. Learn more about upcoming events at [heidiforgov.com/events](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qjutltk-ttjjilthht-h/). [](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qjutltk-ttjjilthht-k/) Let's keep the momentum going!Best,Heidi [$10](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qjutltk-ttjjilthht-u/) [$50](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qjutltk-ttjjilthht-n/) [$100](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qjutltk-ttjjilthht-p/) [Other](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qjutltk-ttjjilthht-x/) [Volunteer](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qjutltk-ttjjilthht-m/) Never miss a beat, follow me on social media! [](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qjutltk-ttjjilthht-c/)[](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qjutltk-ttjjilthht-q/)[](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qjutltk-ttjjilthht-a/)[](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qjutltk-ttjjilthht-f/)[](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qjutltk-ttjjilthht-z/) | Heidi for Governor

name: Mark, Team Marco
subject: there is no more important time than right now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
body:
|
---
| | | Hey, Peter, I'm sure you're getting a lot of emails right now, so I wanted to take a second to reach out and explain why.

Yesterday was our biggest deadline of the entire election and we fell short. Look, I'm proud of our team and I'm proud of our numbers, but Quarter after Quarter, we're always outraised 2:1 or 3:1 by our opponent, and with a little over a month until the election, this is make-or-break.

If you've ever considered chipping in and helping Marco, I'm being 100% serious when I say: **there is no more important time than right now to do so. **

I'm extending the deadline until midnight tonight because in the next few days, **I 'm going to have to spend every dollar we have to maximize our efforts on TV advertisements and our voter outreach program.** So, I'm going to be honest, I need you to chip in right now.
---
| | | [CHIP IN TO HELP MARCO](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61464599:6MH0cZVjN:m:1:3317145305:C772B5A9F36F7FB636A148FF4A11281E:r "CHIP IN
TO HELP MARCO")
---
This all has to do with planning, Peter. **In order to win, we need to plan and make sure we are maximizing every dollar to keep Florida red** and if we fall short of the extended deadline goal tonight, we will have to make some changes to our budget and to our plan.

**It's necessary we raise $127K before midnight. I know this is a big ask, but this is a pivotal moment for our entire campaign right now. Your $25, $35, or $50 could very well be the reason we have the resources to win this election.**

_**[I need you with us, Peter. Can Marco and I count on you?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61464599:6MH0cZVjN:m:1:3317145305:C772B5A9F36F7FB636A148FF4A11281E:r "I need you with us,
Peter. Can Marco and I count on you?")**_

Thank you,

Mark, Campaign Manager
---
| [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61464600:6MH0cZVjN:m:1:3317145305:C772B5A9F36F7FB636A148FF4A11281E:r "MARCO RUBIO US SENATE")
---
| | | | |

* * *
---
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61464601:6MH0cZVjN:m:1:3317145305:C772B5A9F36F7FB636A148FF4A11281E:r "First, Democrats gained more momentum than ever after Roe v.
Wade, raising a record-shattering $80M. Then, Nancy Pelosi launched a major nationwide fundraising operation to defeat Marco Rubio. Now, Marco's
falling millions of dollars behind Nancy Pelosi.") This is no joke. **My opponent already votes with Nancy Pelosi 100% of the time,** and now that they are actively campaigning together, I'm starting to get nervous.

I'm starting to get nervous because I am one of the most vulnerable Republicans up for re-election this November and Pelosi knows that if the Dems defeat me, they will have full access to pass their liberal agenda.

**The Filibuster will be abolished.

Speech will be censored.**

**And conservatives will be silenced.**
| | [HELP MARCO DEFEAT PELOSI >>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61464601:6MH0cZVjN:m:1:3317145305:C772B5A9F36F7FB636A148FF4A11281E:r "Help Marco Defeat
Pelosi")
---

What you decide to do in the next 30 seconds could very well change the course of American history. If I lose, it will be a nightmare for conservative values.

**[So please, can you chip in $25 to help me fight back against Pelosi, the entire Democrat establishment, and their new MASSIVE warchest of cash?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61464601:6MH0cZVjN:m:1:3317145305:C772B5A9F36F7FB636A148FF4A11281E:r "So please, can you chip in $5 to help me fight back against Pelosi, the entire Democrat
establishment, and their new MASSIVE warchest of cash?")**
| | | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61464602:6MH0cZVjN:m:1:3317145305:C772B5A9F36F7FB636A148FF4A11281E:r "Countdown to Election Day")
---

Hey it's Marco and I just checked my watch - **we 're running out of time.**

I just don't know what to do. I keep asking myself, _" Is it even worth reaching out to them again?"_

I know you get a lot of these, and I know it can be overwhelming looking at all the requests. But if you respond to just 1 today, please, make it this one. I am being outraised 3 to 1, and polls are tied. They're saying this may be my closest race yet. **They 're saying I'm in the fight of my life.**

So, I'm humbly coming to you - hat in hand - asking one last time: **[Will you please send in $25 to help me get our country back on track and prospering again?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61464603:6MH0cZVjN:m:1:3317145305:C772B5A9F36F7FB636A148FF4A11281E:r "Will you please send in just $17 to help me get our country back on track and prospering
again?")**

name: Ric Grenell
subject: Don’t let the cabal destroy a good man 👉
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LAXALT FOR SENATE
body:
Save an America First Patriot before it's too late

This is Fmr. Acting Director of National Intelligence Ric Grenell.

I don't send confidential briefings like this often, so I need you to pay close attention.

I've just received word from my sources that operators at the **HIGHEST LEVEL** of the Democrat Party are colluding to destroy one man: **Adam Laxalt.**
**[**SAVE ADAM LAXALT**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61466694:69S23ZVdN:m:1:3331421248:3EA1E77A58EEC0511B1A5C6A6EE65B76:r)**
---

Adam is running for the US Senate seat in Nevada - the ONE SEAT that will decide everything.

The Democrat elites know that when Adam wins in November, **they will LOSE their liberal Senate majority.** That's why they're pulling all the strings to stop him.

Fake attack ads, publishing hit pieces in their newspapers, **ALL DIRTY TRICKS** are on the table. Frankly, I've never seen anything like it.

That's why I've reached out to you today. It's up to true patriots like you to stop the Democrat cabal in their tracks before they destroy another good man.
**[**RUSH HELP**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61466694:69S23ZVdN:m:1:3331421248:3EA1E77A58EEC0511B1A5C6A6EE65B76:r)**
---

Please, we have the power to stop them, but only if we act right now.

Stop what you're doing and rush help to Adam before it's too late. We won't get another chance at this.

Thank you, and God Bless.

Richard Grenell

* * *

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61466695:69S23ZVdN:m:1:3331421248:3EA1E77A58EEC0511B1A5C6A6EE65B76:r) **A personal note from Adam Laxalt:**
Peter, I wanted to reach out personally and say thank you for your support.
I'm not going to lie to you, the fight to save our country won't be easy. But with patriots like you on my team we WILL win this race.
We've reached a critical moment in the campaign cycle and your support is more important now than ever before. Right now I'm under attack- **the Democrats have already spent $76 MILLION to destroy my campaign.**
[**That 's why I'm asking you to chip in whatever you can right now.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61466695:69S23ZVdN:m:1:3331421248:3EA1E77A58EEC0511B1A5C6A6EE65B76:r) The fight to flip Nevada and retake the Senate majority depends on you.
Thank you for all your support,
Adam Laxalt

name: Cristen Wohlgemuth
subject: This is blatant government overreach!
body:
Michael and Chantell Sackett have been fighting for 15 years to build a home on the private property they own near Priest Lake i
[View this message in your browser](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2ztu6j7j4o4v6thuvv8p670jr4eiqmu86sm7217i8_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkeq32t5nmeq33cjl61qn4cdkmoq37c3nm6or9ctn6ej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf6sb6ecqr1c9keapm6tj36jhj0o5ncapm0sb46hrr0pdl6gqe6ollcdgrbc3icurt4s3icgr31cj6e9q32tj0s2q6ac70mkom9pj6coojeddl6ur68phmcsqrcdtgmlin48d245p25oh4cdhm2pr0c5ge2pj24no)
| | | [](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zuusm0ue61fjna4q63at201nuuvs6enmipr7ojf8_rp22sh2s8i66or1ctg62o71cph2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend of Liberty, Michael and Chantell Sackett have been fighting for 15 years to build a home on the private property they own near Priest Lake in Bonner County, Idaho. It’s not for the usual reasons like a lack of building supplies or unresponsive contractors. It’s because the Environmental Protection Agency (EPA) declared that their land is a wetland. But here’s the kicker. The Sacketts’ land is not wet. There’s no water on it! Still, the government is going after them. And if the couple doesn’t comply with the EPA’s outlandish regulations, they could face fines up to $32,500 _per day_! The Sacketts have been dragged through the courts for years fighting for their property rights—**and yours**. Now, their case will be argued before the U.S. Supreme Court. And MSLF has lent them support in their fight against this blatant government overreach. That’s why I’m emailing you today with a special request. I’m hoping you will stand with the Sacketts and show them you support their fight by signing our petition today. If the EPA is allowed to trample the lives of private citizens like the Sacketts with no opposition, there’s no telling who could be next. name: Trump News HQ
subject: Find out what the Founders really said
body:
I’m sure you’ve often wondered why we haven’t produced an online course on the American Founding—we’re Hillsdale Colle
[View this message in your browser](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ze2upg37r7dla7b1f9sv189746n80imd4kbq4ou0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t56egn4tblm1on4t1kmepradrmeej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hfddb4cdo79pjhmuor3cb4m1hrbc34c5o65dpmcqq36sbimmob7d3gcipn9oj76urt4s3ic9j71cj6e3ib6or7m9q6ccbn6dh6fdr2cor61cj6c3gbaor0s2qj2cdl66qn48d245p25oh4cdhm2pr0c5ge4o724no)

| | | This sponsored message from Trumptrain News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zbrpgubas0guarcdb0aihm1cr54a3arfmrefud3g_rp22sh2s8i66or1ctg62o72c3h2bs)
---
| |
Greetings friend,

I'm sure you've often wondered why we haven't produced an online course on the American Founding--we're Hillsdale College, after all.

**[Well, here it is!](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z547gpj1uf3mc6jof62h55s0vusnoehdo3cq7frg_rp22sh2s8i66or1ctg62o72c3h2bs)**
---
| | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z4c6t0ikbpt2fcg8kglj50e1m0r60aoe5kurdrt8_rp22sh2s8i66or1ctg62o72c3h2bs)
---
Hillsdale professor of politics, Thomas G. West is one of the great scholars and teachers of the American Founding and the author of _The Political Theory of the American Founding and Vindicating the Founders_.

In this new course, Dr. West sits down with his former student and current professor at Hillsdale's Graduate School of Government, David Azerrad, to reveal the truth about the American Founding.

As Dr. West explains, the Founders' political theory is so foreign to Americans today--even to scholars and teachers of American history and politics--that the task of uncovering the truth about the Founding is like unearthing something from a "deep and long-forgotten pit."

This course goes about this task by examining the primary arguments and decisions of the Founders, and it brings their theory to life by comparing it to the dominant views of contemporary America.

The result is an exciting, and often surprising, account of how the Founders established a free government in America and what they thought was necessary to sustain it.

That's why we're releasing our new free online course, "**The Real American Founding: A Conversation** ," on October 11, and it's why I'm offering you the opportunity to pre-register for the course using this secure link:

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/real-american-founding-preregister/](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zpcatcvdoflsbea84g4vohdg9ve2mdbuqhnhg5go_rp22sh2s8i66or1ctg62o72c3h2bs)**
Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---

subject: America was founded as a Christian nation…here’s proof
body:
Revisionists of America’s history would have you believe that our nation was founded on secular grounds and that “a great wa
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z06fshad9g8hdvpfe7hhnq3u35ijn1c4a2d1nip8_rp22sh2s8i66or1ctg62o76c9h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jmgr32t5nmepradrmeej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf4d776hibacj7mepmatpjceqe0odks6obao30scon1crkm9qj4oj7mio76shhm1jt4s3icgr31cj6e9q32tj0s2q6ac70mkom9pj6coojeddl6ur68phmcapm2ptgmlin49fg)
| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zf1phrj2tsvgkso8hbqo2mapvjdilcb9o9e0m5o0_rp22sh2s8i66or1ctg62o76c9h2bs)
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbdvf5bk9gu0ddf9rqun0o73fh4f4umok6ps6mn0_rp22sh2s8i66or1ctg62o76c9h2bs)
---
Hello,

Revisionists of America’s history would have you believe that our nation was founded on secular grounds and that “a great wall of separation between Church and State” has been our guiding principle since the beginning. They would have you believe that our founders wanted Christianity to be completely absent from all forms and institutions of government.

That simply isn’t true, and I can prove it. In my brand-new coffee-table style book, _America Is a Christian Nation_ , you can see how our country has moved from its reliance on God to its rejection of God. It’s a short read, and we’ve paired the written content with some gorgeous patriotic photos that you’re going to enjoy looking through.
---
| | [LEARN THE TRUTH](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zn30jpi2iqsgav7n8kl6mrus55i78a6ccl5qav80_rp22sh2s8i66or1ctg62o76c9h2bs)
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4lhm9hah59j8gokln0i2vntpvovehek2rnqgheg_rp22sh2s8i66or1ctg62o76c9h2bs)
---
In appreciation for any gift you are able to make to _Pathway to Victory_ today, we’d like to send you a copy of this book along with a DVD copy of my message, _America is a Christian Nation_. I think you’ll find it informative and engaging. You can receive your copy by making your donation here: **[https://ptv.org/donate/america-is-a-christian-nation-by-dr-robert-jeffress/generous-gift/](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zebvqioblu5lvnuo56v9bck3dm1o7bgl8r9qpnr8_rp22sh2s8i66or1ctg62o76c9h2bs)**

You may already be convinced that America was founded as a Christian nation and that we have strayed far from that foundation. The question in that case is, how do we get back? You’ll find the answer to that question as well at the end of _America Is a Christian Nation_.

As believers, we need to do all we can to both preserve America’s unique heritage and fight for our religious freedoms. I hope you’ll stand with me in doing so.

Sincerely,
Dr. Robert Jeffress
Senior Pastor, First Baptist Dallas
---

name: Ron Johnson
subject: a personal plea
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron Johnson For Senate, Inc
body:
|
---
| | | Peter,

I have never seen the Left more aggressive and out of control as they are in the last few days and weeks. Long gone are the days of polite discourse, the days when we could have disagreements without it ending in riots and chaos. Not only is the left posting the personal addresses of SCOTUS members on Twitter, but in Washington DC, activists are giving cash to restaurants to "out" SCOTUS members if they dine in.

I knew when I announced my campaign for re-election that this would be a campaign unlike one I've ever seen before, and it has. The vitriol and slander I've seen so far this year has never been paralleled.

The days of decorum have disappeared, but can and need to return. And that's why I'm running for re-election. Democrats have let major cities become crime ridden, they are behind the rising inflation we are experiencing at the pump and grocery stores, and this is just the beginning of their mayhem.

This is not a landscape that I want our children and grandchildren growing up in. I will always fight for their future, and I hope if you stand with me in that fight you'll stand with me right now in this campaign.

I hate asking for money - it's my least favorite thing to do. But the facts are simple. Democrats across the country are gearing up to make this Wisconsin Senate race the most expensive in history in an attempt to not just defeat me, but defeat our values and beliefs.

No donation is too small. $5 makes a difference. $5 can help us reach that one undecided voter and ensure they get out and vote and keep WI red.

I know our nation's brightest days are ahead of us, but getting there isn't going to be easy. _**[We can win in November if I can count on your support right now.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61464650:Jap1aZVN5:m:1:3317145305:7CEA1886B1406E0E3FFBF4FDFBD0D728:r "Johnson1")**_

Please, Peter, our future is counting on our actions today.

Thanks for reading this email. I appreciate you and your family.

Thank you for your support,
Ron

---
| |
* * *
---
| [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61464651:Jap1aZVN5:m:1:3317145305:7CEA1886B1406E0E3FFBF4FDFBD0D728:r "footer image")
---
A note from Ron Johnson: America is in peril. President Reagan warned that freedom is fragile, always one generation away from extinction. As I have told crowds since my first Tea Party speeches: this is a fight for freedom. **This is not someone else 's fight, this is our fight, and it's a fight we absolutely must win.** **As a grandpa, dad, and businessman, I refuse to lose our country to radicals and woke liberals with their socialist agenda. I refuse to jeopardize America's future. I know you feel the same.

_**[**Can I personally ask you to join me in this fight for Freedom, Peter?**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61464651:Jap1aZVN5:m:1:3317145305:7CEA1886B1406E0E3FFBF4FDFBD0D728:r "Can I personally ask you to join me in this fight for Freedom, %%=v\(@sFirstName\)=%%?")**_**

name: American Defense News
subject: Reason with precision
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Eucli
[View this message in your browser](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z9cn2n8hrtbqrn1gvhjek82uhvfsmuhbbcboaij0_rp22sh2s8i66or1ctg62o74sph238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kuij791lmkp79dhk6eojacpl6er7actl6tr779hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4onksphn3d9hm5jrcdtjm3ie9dlgmpjb2p9ieaqm2dhl69o67d35m1r3as9m61hnfduie1p68dhgm9j74t1hepge1d3563gbacb4spj6cc9n6mqjfdj4cor69d9m6uobapbi4no)
This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zbb6f0jvij7gpthaft99r8lokcb6h0rrmv30br18_rp22sh2s8i66or1ctg62o74sph2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.”
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.”**
Through**“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** **** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zf2hd54v1j0881vulnemttj96r97qlpn85ijbgdg_rp22sh2s8i66or1ctg62o74sph2bs)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zt4iaaaeogpng9r0r5k0b6mvnges3ngjvdldt3eo_rp22sh2s8i66or1ctg62o74sph2bs)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

name: Your America
subject: Survey on an urgent matter
body:
A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c6029%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=%2bzDqQJeT4ZBOKAB6HE4%2bRw&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c86217%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=yz%2bdn6UCeRyFH5P1%2fdBRMA&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c86218%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=qCBXqpDJ%2fL4JIqwHAR1SpQ&sysid=1)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c86218%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=qCBXqpDJ%2fL4JIqwHAR1SpQ&sysid=1)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c6029%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=%2bzDqQJeT4ZBOKAB6HE4%2bRw&sysid=1)_

[](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c6029%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=%2bzDqQJeT4ZBOKAB6HE4%2bRw&sysid=1)

name: Mark, Team Marco
subject: I’m sure you’re getting a lot of emails 📩
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
body:
|
---
| | | Hey, Peter, I'm sure you're getting a lot of emails right now, so I wanted to take a second to reach out and explain why.

Yesterday was our biggest deadline of the entire election and we fell short. Look, I'm proud of our team and I'm proud of our numbers, but Quarter after Quarter, we're always outraised 2:1 or 3:1 by our opponent, and with a little over a month until the election, this is make-or-break.

If you've ever considered chipping in and helping Marco, I'm being 100% serious when I say: **there is no more important time than right now to do so. **

I'm extending the deadline until midnight tonight because in the next few days, **I 'm going to have to spend every dollar we have to maximize our efforts on TV advertisements and our voter outreach program.** So, I'm going to be honest, I need you to chip in right now.
---
| | | [CHIP IN TO HELP MARCO](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61466748:6eo6PZVNR:m:1:3331421248:E9EB0EA084CD11F9718DB9B521BB6000:r "CHIP IN TO HELP MARCO")
---
This all has to do with planning, Peter. **In order to win, we need to plan and make sure we are maximizing every dollar to keep Florida red** and if we fall short of the extended deadline goal tonight, we will have to make some changes to our budget and to our plan.

**It's necessary we raise $127K before midnight. I know this is a big ask, but this is a pivotal moment for our entire campaign right now. Your $25, $35, or $50 could very well be the reason we have the resources to win this election.**

_**[I need you with us, Peter. Can Marco and I count on you?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61466748:6eo6PZVNR:m:1:3331421248:E9EB0EA084CD11F9718DB9B521BB6000:r "I need you with us,
Peter. Can Marco and I count on you?")**_

Thank you,

Mark, Campaign Manager
---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61466749:6eo6PZVNR:m:1:3331421248:E9EB0EA084CD11F9718DB9B521BB6000:r "MARCO RUBIO US SENATE")
---
| | | | |

* * *
---
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61466750:6eo6PZVNR:m:1:3331421248:E9EB0EA084CD11F9718DB9B521BB6000:r "First, Democrats
gained more momentum than ever after Roe v. Wade, raising a record-shattering $80M. Then, Nancy Pelosi launched a major nationwide fundraising
operation to defeat Marco Rubio. Now, Marco's falling millions of dollars behind Nancy Pelosi.") This is no joke. **My opponent already votes with Nancy Pelosi 100% of the time,** and now that they are actively campaigning together, I'm starting to get nervous.

I'm starting to get nervous because I am one of the most vulnerable Republicans up for re-election this November and Pelosi knows that if the Dems defeat me, they will have full access to pass their liberal agenda.

**The Filibuster will be abolished.

Speech will be censored.**

**And conservatives will be silenced.**
| | [HELP MARCO DEFEAT PELOSI >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61466750:6eo6PZVNR:m:1:3331421248:E9EB0EA084CD11F9718DB9B521BB6000:r "Help Marco Defeat
Pelosi")
---

What you decide to do in the next 30 seconds could very well change the course of American history. If I lose, it will be a nightmare for conservative values.

**[So please, can you chip in $25 to help me fight back against Pelosi, the entire Democrat establishment, and their new MASSIVE warchest of cash?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61466750:6eo6PZVNR:m:1:3331421248:E9EB0EA084CD11F9718DB9B521BB6000:r "So please, can you chip in $5 to help me fight back against Pelosi, the entire Democrat establishment, and their new MASSIVE warchest of
cash?")**
| | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61466751:6eo6PZVNR:m:1:3331421248:E9EB0EA084CD11F9718DB9B521BB6000:r "Countdown to Election Day")
---

Hey it's Marco and I just checked my watch - **we 're running out of time.**

I just don't know what to do. I keep asking myself, _" Is it even worth reaching out to them again?"_

I know you get a lot of these, and I know it can be overwhelming looking at all the requests. But if you respond to just 1 today, please, make it this one. I am being outraised 3 to 1, and polls are tied. They're saying this may be my closest race yet. **They 're saying I'm in the fight of my life.**

So, I'm humbly coming to you - hat in hand - asking one last time: **[Will you please send in $25 to help me get our country back on track and prospering again?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61466752:6eo6PZVNR:m:1:3331421248:E9EB0EA084CD11F9718DB9B521BB6000:r "Will you please send in just $17 to help me get our country back on track and prospering
again?")**
| | **[SEND $25](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61466752:6eo6PZVNR:m:1:3331421248:E9EB0EA084CD11F9718DB9B521BB6000:r "SEND $17")**
---
| Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
---

Miami, FL 33153

name: Ryan Zinke
subject: Taking on the pit of vipers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Zinke for Congress
body:
|

---
| | | Taking on the Deep State is like fighting a _**pit of vipers. **_

Vipers are venomous, cold-blooded creatures with no empathy for their prey.

If you're not careful, they can _**take you out**_ in the blink of an eye.

The same can be said about the **D.C. Swamp.**

During my tenure in Congress the onslaught from the swamp creatures was vicious.

When I was in President Trump's cabinet as Sec. of the Interior, the barrage of attacks from the **Left** and **turncoat RINOs** was nearly unbearable.

Now, as I attempt to regain ground in Washington and **establish a Pro-Trump majority in the House,** the Deep State vipers are coming after me again.

My tenure as SEAL Team 6 Commander has prepared me for this battle, but even back then I knew I could do nothing without the support of my compatriots. **[Do you have my back in this fight, Peter?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61464897:6WK2PZVN7:m:1:3253819041:BCC41A6D41328247FA104DF4E68A287A:r "Do you have my back in this fight,
Peter?")**
---
| | | [HELP RYAN TAKE ON THE DEEP STATE](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61464897:6WK2PZVN7:m:1:3253819041:BCC41A6D41328247FA104DF4E68A287A:r)
---
In recent months, the radical Left-wing has weaponized law enforcement by intimidating dissenters with unconstitutional FBI Raids and unwarranted DOJ investigations on MAGA Republicans.

_**But I 've been in battles far worse than this. **_

I'm going to take on the vipers in the DC Swamp and no one is going to stop me. The only thing I need now is your help, Peter.

I'm up against the most critical fundraising deadline of the election cycle and I've fallen way behind. **[Please send reinforcements by 11:59pm to give me the strength I need to win this race and DRAIN THE SWAMP>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61464897:6WK2PZVN7:m:1:3253819041:BCC41A6D41328247FA104DF4E68A287A:r "Please send reinforcements by 11:59pm to give me the strength I need to win this race and DRAIN THE SWAMP
>>")**
---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61464897:6WK2PZVN7:m:1:3253819041:BCC41A6D41328247FA104DF4E68A287A:r)
---
| | | | [DRAIN THE SWAMP](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61464897:6WK2PZVN7:m:1:3253819041:BCC41A6D41328247FA104DF4E68A287A:r)
---
**Thank you for your hand in this fight.
Commander Zinke** **_**Over and out**_**
---
| |
Ryan Zinke is a fifth generation Montanan who has dedicated his life to serving our great nation. Ryan is a decorated U.S. Navy SEAL officer who retired after 23 years of military service. After the military, Ryan served two terms as a State Senator, was twice elected as Montana's Congressman, and served two years as U.S. Secretary of the Interior under President Trump. Now after a couple quiet years spent with his family, he is signing up again to serve in Congress to help save America from threats we face both foreign and domestic.

name: American Update
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0873%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=bvecj7PVY2BJ9dln75aMWg&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c45823%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=IvhitUOEv9%2fnbRs6xtw3TQ&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c45824%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=nu0LKinC4Zmj5BKI3n2QBQ&sysid=1) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c45835%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=GzyPLndeW%2flQEnKY4NyObQ&sysid=1)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0873%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=bvecj7PVY2BJ9dln75aMWg&sysid=1)_

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0873%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=bvecj7PVY2BJ9dln75aMWg&sysid=1)

name: Patriot Marketplace
subject: What does “created equal” mean?
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.patriotmarketplace._f6Gdy6Dzpg)
---
| | Hi Friend,One of the reasons young people are so attracted to the idea of socialism is the promised equality of outcomes.

They want life to be fair for everyone, and for all to have wellness, happiness, and financial security. But if the end goal of socialism is “equality”, that begs the question: what is equality? Are equality and liberty consistent one with the other or are they in conflict?
---
| [](http://trk.patriotmarketplace._tm4z31Pg7luhnQ)
---
| | In this [**25-page commentary**](http://trk.patriotmarketplace.-GOtfsoiaoIRTGuG8Rw), "Created Equal", legendary economist and Hoover fellow Milton Friedman answers these and other questions in great depth. You’ll learn what Thomas Jefferson meant when he wrote the words “created equal” in the Declaration of Independence and how the meaning has changed through American history. You’ll see how Friedman brilliantly illustrates differences between equality of opportunity and equality of outcome.

With many today striving to increase government power in the name of a concept of “equality”, Friedman’s words still ring true for those who believe that a society that puts freedom first will end up with both greater freedom and greater equality.

**[Please follow this link to get your free copy of "Created Equal" now.](http://trk.patriotmarketplace.-_8PXzLZe3_Gww)**
Thanks,

Greg Greg Stamps | Online DevelopmentHoover Institution | Stanford University
---
_With its eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research organization that seeks to improve the human condition by advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred years, Hoover's work has directly led to policies that have produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the United States and around the world._
---

---

name: Herschel Walker
subject: Democrats are spending MILLIONS in Georgia
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand for America PAC
body:
It’s Herschel Walker, and I’m reaching out to you with an urgent message.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z5pqr5do329801l3pu37159rn157sof5vp9vi3co_rp22sh2s8i66or1ctg61ob6chh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpqedtge1p7adjkm4qj7cbkmgor79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4ongm9ij9p3kedr3bcdim6r76t7368pm9d3j6hp78phhedhb1p31eurj7d33e6qreduie1p64pjgm9j71p5jcdjr4t3665rj6p37m8pmcc5gm9j61o5lcdge1d9h66qj3dbi4no)

| | | Friend,

It's Herschel Walker, and I'm reaching out to you with an urgent message. Our Senate race in Georgia is one of the toughest races in the country, so I'm asking if you can help.

_**[Senator Raphael Warnock (D) has outraised every candidate in the country- including our campaign, so we're doing everything we can to close the fundraising gap.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z1aj9cn5u8ltl0esecd48157hroje2kg8puj241g_rp22sh2s8i66or1ctg61ob6chh2bs "Senator Raphael Warnock \(D\) has outraised every candidate in the country – including our campaign, so we’re doing everything we can to close the fundraising gap.")**_

---
| | | [DONATE NOW](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z0fgumkbek1075pnfb3n2u4p5u86g94lis7n5osg_rp22sh2s8i66or1ctg61ob6chh2bs)
---

In the month of August, my Democrat opponent raised a staggering $6.77 MILLION! That's over $218,387 PER DAY or $150 PER MINUTE - both day and night!

_**[I know it may seem like a lot, but we can close the gap if enough PATRIOTS will stand with us. I'm humbly asking you to give a donation of $3 or more today.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z2c8t06tut142lm5fcilaf3r3upd3c9efcs05n9o_rp22sh2s8i66or1ctg61ob6chh2bs "I know it may seem like a lot, but we can close the gap if enough PATRIOTS will stand with us. I’m humbly asking you to give a donation of $3 or more today.")**_

Democrats know we have the chance to flip this Senate seat in Georgia from BLUE to RED. They see that we're virtually TIED in the polls, so they are FREAKING OUT. They know that Republicans will fight tooth and nail to keep Georgia from going BLUE AGAIN, so they are pouring resources into the state like crazy.

**In fact, Chuck Schumer 's Super PAC announced they are going to spend $23 million in attack ads against me! That proves how scared they are!**

If we're going to win the critical Senate race in Georgia, we need your help.

In the 60 seconds it has taken you to read this short email, my Democrat opponent has raised another $150! Can you believe that? _**[Would you be one of 5 people to give $30 this very minute (for a combined $150) and help us close the fundraising gap?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zjabmq680o34gmc9gi8lmhvgm6qme8djiac53fvo_rp22sh2s8i66or1ctg61ob6chh2bs "Would you be one of 5 people to give $30 this very minute \(for a combined $150\) and help us close the fundraising gap?")**_

When you donate, you'll be helping us win in Georgia, take back the Republican majority in the U.S. Senate, stop the Biden-Harris agenda, and get America back on track!

To victory,

Herschel Walker

---

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: Is persecution coming?
body:
I was just reading through the Sermon on the Mount—arguably Jesus’s most famous and resonating sermon—and I thought about
[View this message in your browser](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2znm8tt24cmbaucm95lihmf68qseha3eb0ra6dkp8_rp22sh2s8i66or1ctg61ob5clh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq0sjnm6qb6d9le1oj8cbl6ej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf6d36eeq30pj3m4qr7d9gm9jj4p3mclg72cdkmthmedbicpom8p72eipbasdgmsrt4s3icgr31cj6e9q32tj0s2q6ac70mkom9pj6coojeddl6ur60pjlciqr8dtgmlin49fg)

| | | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zdljudrdh1sdsf8qnfpftc80s8o8kkr1o63kvtc0_rp22sh2s8i66or1ctg61ob5clh2bs)
---
| Hello friend,

I was just reading through the Sermon on the Mount--arguably Jesus's most famous and resonating sermon--and I thought about how a certain passage is likely to become even more relevant in the days ahead. I'm talking about Matthew 5:11-12, where Jesus said:

_" Blessed are you when people insult you and persecute you, and falsely say all kinds of evil against you because of Me. Rejoice and be glad, for your reward in heaven is great; for in the same way they persecuted the prophets who were before you."_

As the days get darker spiritually, as our liberties are being trampled on and chipped away, as Christians are categorized by our culture as close minded bigots--it's not hard to foresee a future where religious persecution is intensified.

If things continue on their current trajectory, it is only a matter of time before things go from _uncomfortable_ to _unthinkable_.

What are we to do when persecution comes our way? How does Jesus instruct us to react? He doesn't tell us to just hold on and endure. He doesn't tell us to just sit tight and bear it.

As with so many other passages in the Sermon on the Mount, Jesus ups the ante of what we would consider "normal" behavior. Jesus says that in the face of persecution we are to "rejoice and be exceedingly glad"!
| | I've written a new book that looks closely at the Sermon on the Mount. It's called _18 Minutes with Jesus: Straight Talk from the Savior about the Things That Matter Most_. We're offering a copy of this book to anyone who donates generously to the ministry of Pathway to Victory this month.

When you give, you are helping to broadcast the truth of God's Word across the nation and around the world. Your donation can help to change the course of a life from darkness to light, from despair to hope, and from worry to peace.
---
| [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zc5mcco3knij8udnl1ao4rg6di2a20a06efooev0_rp22sh2s8i66or1ctg61ob5clh2bs)
---
| Thank you for whatever you can give to help: **[https://ptv.org/donate/18-minutes-with-jesus-from-dr-robert-jeffress/](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zac0qfcko25hfdrjujf70bj0sasoq54snqhpesq8_rp22sh2s8i66or1ctg61ob5clh2bs)**

I give thanks to God that we still have the opportunity to openly and boldly declare the Word of God here in America, and I pray that the Church would take advantage of that freedom while it lasts. **Let 's do _all_ we can to share the gospel _while_ we can.**

God bless you.

Sincerely,
Dr. Robert Jeffress
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Pro Life Update, [please use this preferences page](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/prefs/9z2z835g2ejb7750titccjt66fnju67tc57kf08djb8).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

body:

---

It's Jim Jordan. I'm really worried about this...

I'm hearing that some Republicans are getting complacent. Voters seem to think that we've already won back Congress and that they can just sit on the sidelines...

That is simply NOT TRUE. The Democrats have GAINED GROUND, and our Republican races are on THIN ICE.

Pelosi & her cronies have doubled their efforts to WIPE OUT red seats.

Her cash advantage will BURY our America First candidates if everyone sits out.

I know you know what's at stake here. My team tells me that I can count on you, but I need to know for myself.

_**If you 're still with us...
If you're still with Trump...
If you're ready to RESTORE the MAGA agenda & REVIVE the American Dream...**_
**I need you to make just a $5 investment into our efforts:**

---
| | [-> RUSH SUPPORT <-](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zouh69j7uv9j6opnd2ieat2ce7fhu7v5naueesdg_rp22sh2s8i66or1ctg62o77chh2bs)
---

It's easy to coast along and see what happens, but if you truly want to make a difference - now's your chance. So I'm humbly asking: just $5 so we can survive Pelosi's onslaught. Just $5 so you KNOW you played a part when we FIRE Nancy Pelosi in a few short months.

I'll be reviewing our grassroots supporter list, so please act now.

name: Ron Johnson
subject: a personal plea
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron Johnson For Senate, Inc
body:
|
---
| | | Peter,

I have never seen the Left more aggressive and out of control as they are in the last few days and weeks. Long gone are the days of polite discourse, the days when we could have disagreements without it ending in riots and chaos. Not only is the left posting the personal addresses of SCOTUS members on Twitter, but in Washington DC, activists are giving cash to restaurants to "out" SCOTUS members if they dine in.

I knew when I announced my campaign for re-election that this would be a campaign unlike one I've ever seen before, and it has. The vitriol and slander I've seen so far this year has never been paralleled.

The days of decorum have disappeared, but can and need to return. And that's why I'm running for re-election. Democrats have let major cities become crime ridden, they are behind the rising inflation we are experiencing at the pump and grocery stores, and this is just the beginning of their mayhem.

This is not a landscape that I want our children and grandchildren growing up in. I will always fight for their future, and I hope if you stand with me in that fight you'll stand with me right now in this campaign.

I hate asking for money - it's my least favorite thing to do. But the facts are simple. Democrats across the country are gearing up to make this Wisconsin Senate race the most expensive in history in an attempt to not just defeat me, but defeat our values and beliefs.

No donation is too small. $5 makes a difference. $5 can help us reach that one undecided voter and ensure they get out and vote and keep WI red.

I know our nation's brightest days are ahead of us, but getting there isn't going to be easy. _**[We can win in November if I can count on your support right now.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61466777:JLZWMZVNx:m:1:3331421248:770C42B6124C45D65467CA67C667A3C5:r "Johnson1")**_

Please, Peter, our future is counting on our actions today.

Thanks for reading this email. I appreciate you and your family.

Thank you for your support,
Ron

---
| |
* * *
---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61466778:JLZWMZVNx:m:1:3331421248:770C42B6124C45D65467CA67C667A3C5:r "footer image")
---
A note from Ron Johnson: America is in peril. President Reagan warned that freedom is fragile, always one generation away from extinction. As I have told crowds since my first Tea Party speeches: this is a fight for freedom. **This is not someone else 's fight, this is our fight, and it's a fight we absolutely must win.** **As a grandpa, dad, and businessman, I refuse to lose our country to radicals and woke liberals with their socialist agenda. I refuse to jeopardize America's future. I know you feel the same.

_**[**Can I personally ask you to join me in this fight for Freedom, Peter?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61466778:JLZWMZVNx:m:1:3331421248:770C42B6124C45D65467CA67C667A3C5:r "Can I personally ask you to join me in this fight for Freedom, %%=v\(@sFirstName\)=%%?")**_**
---
| | [FIGHT FOR FREEDOM WITH RON JOHNSON >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61466778:JLZWMZVNx:m:1:3331421248:770C42B6124C45D65467CA67C667A3C5:r "button")
---
| Paid for by Ron Johnson For Senate, Inc.
---
PO Box 1159
Oshkosh, WI 54903-1159
[Privacy Policy](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61466779:JLZWMZVNx:m:1:3331421248:770C42B6124C45D65467CA67C667A3C5:r)
Text RON to 85541 for mobile alerts!

If you would prefer to donate by mail, please send your contribution to the following address.

RON JOHNSON FOR SENATE, INC.

Oshkosh, WI 54903-1159

name: Mark Meckler, COS Action
subject: Sign the National Convention of States Petition!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Convention of States Action
body:
I urge you, right this second, to sign the National Petition for an Article V Convention of States to save America.
[View this message in your browser](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z9g317r7jlslvnb4knnhjv39ulabtilbeskd51p0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t56egn4tblm1on4t1kmepradrmeej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hfecrkcjhm9db169ib2ormcgojap33mmoredhkspgecdpkcpijas70egqmec3ge3jt4s3ic9j71cj6e3ib6or7m9q6ccbkmdg6fclicooj1cj6c3gbaor0s2qj2cdl66qn48d245p25oh4cdhm2pr4c1h64or24no)
| | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zdtcdj26evv9a99lchevqi4vvacp8bn7lcubkm3g_rp22sh2s8i66or1cti60oj2cdh2bs)
---
Fellow Patriot, [**I urge you, right this second, to sign the National Petition for an Article V Convention of States to save America**.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zr87mb1v4e391ss36ighjpse9teggiag50eorkio_rp22sh2s8i66or1cti60oj2cdh2bs) An army of conservative heroes including **_Mark Levin, Ben Shapiro, Sean Hannity,_** and** _Lt. Col. Allen West_** have joined our movement to call for an Article V Convention of States. [**Just click here to add your name to this national petition. And then PLEASE forward this email to every single person you know.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z9k6u1fjl79iimnci0pkh3lieb1jlirakjf7lgo0_rp22sh2s8i66or1cti60oj2cdh2bs)
---
[**Sign The Petition**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zsv6a68vhfrmkup66o8aom4g5kbqnbljenkje16o_rp22sh2s8i66or1cti60oj2cdh2bs)
---
Our nation is spiraling out of control. Debt threatens to cripple our economy. Federal spending has never been higher -- nor has our deficit. And the politicians in Washington won't do anything to save us. _In fact, most of them are part of the problem!_ A Convention of States is our only hope. You see, our Founding Fathers were brilliant men. They left an emergency clause in the Constitution in case the federal government got too big and out-of-control. **Article V of the Constitution allows the states to bypass Congress and the President to call a Convention of States to propose amendments to our Constitution that will rein in the federal government.** Well, conservative leaders all across the country -- along with over **_FIVE MILLION_** grassroots patriots -- believe it is time to invoke Article V and call a Convention of States for the express, _limited_ purpose of imposing fiscal restraints and term limits on Congress and limiting the power, scope, and jurisdiction of the federal government. And I hope you do, too. With the socialists in control in Washington, it's time to take action before it's too late! It's time for "We the People" to use the most powerful weapon in our arsenal - the Constitution - to fight back against Washington's overreach. [**Please sign the National Petition for an Article V Convention of States right now, and please ask everyone you know to do the same.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z10f86ek8iqhdm7b4dvb6fbo12n4roc3q787olko_rp22sh2s8i66or1cti60oj2cdh2bs) Here at Convention of States Action, we are working overtime to convince the required 34 state legislatures to call for an Article V convention to place limits on the power and jurisdiction of the federal government. **We have already passed the COS Resolution through the state legislatures in 19 states, including four since the start of this year alone -- bringing us over __HALFWAY__ to calling a Convention of States and taking the power back from the "ruling class" in Washington!** This year alone, the Resolution has passed out of committee in Massachusetts, Pennsylvania, Iowa, and Kansas -- paving the way for the next round of states to pass! With dozens of states currently considering the COS Resolution, _NOW_ is our window of opportunity to double down and secure the needed victories to cross the finish line! We have a citizen activist army operating in all 50 states, working tirelessly to urge their state legislators to act in accordance with the will of the people and demand that they pass this critically important Resolution. **A Convention of States is our only chance to pass important and long overdue measures like a balanced budget amendment, term limits on Congress and the D.C. Swamp, and limits on the scope and jurisdiction of the federal government.** The politicians in Washington wouldn't dare limit their own power. Therefore, we the people need to do it! But in order for that to happen, we need millions and millions of patriotic Americans like you to sign this important national petition. We need to show the members of the state legislatures that the American people are ready for a constitutional solution as big as our nation's problems, an Article V Convention of States. [**Simply click here to sign and we’ll deliver it directly to your state legislators, free of charge. This is our best chance to save America from an out-of-control federal government.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z068emmcbeor10seg1oe3qjcn5ilrs3v1fpkpge8_rp22sh2s8i66or1cti60oj2cdh2bs) Washington won't fix itself. The federal government is too big, and the politicians are too invested in its growth. We the people must take control through our state legislatures. [**Please join the fight to call a Convention of States. Sign the petition today, and urge every freedom-loving American to do the same.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zv14qnc4ntap3092uvh6cr3n3na7i9bb0s9l5kv0_rp22sh2s8i66or1cti60oj2cdh2bs)
---
[**Sign The Petition**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z3vo79ss6mbl5v5gfoor2lb1k46b56j4rijvqn10_rp22sh2s8i66or1cti60oj2cdh2bs)
---
Thank you, and may God bless America! For America, Mark Meckler President Convention of States Action
---
Paid for by Convention of States Action
---
5850 San Felipe
Suite 580A
Houston, TX 77057
---

It's time for "We the People" to use the most powerful weapon in our arsenal - the Constitution - to fight back against Washington's overreach. Here at Convention of States Action, we are working overtime to convince the required 34 state legislatures to call for an Article V convention to place limits on the power and jurisdiction of the federal government. We have already passed the COS Resolution through the state legislatures in 19 states, including four since the start of this year alone -- bringing us over HALFWAY to calling a Convention of States and taking the power back from the "ruling class" in Washington! This year alone, the Resolution has passed out of committee in Massachusetts, Pennsylvania, Iowa, and Kansas -- paving the way for the next round of states to pass! With dozens of states currently considering the COS Resolution, NOW is our window of opportunity to double down and secure the needed victories to cross the finish line! We have a citizen activist army operating in all 50 states, working tirelessly to urge their state legislators to act in accordance with the will of the people and demand that they pass this critically important Resolution. A Convention of States is our only chance to pass important and long overdue measures like a balanced budget amendment, term limits on Congress and the D.C. Swamp, and limits on the scope and jurisdiction of the federal government. The politicians in Washington wouldn't dare limit their own power. Therefore, we the people need to do it! But in order for that to happen, we need millions and millions of patriotic Americans like you to sign this important national petition. We need to show the members of the state legislatures that the American people are ready for a constitutional solution as big as our nation's problems, an Article V Convention of States. Washington won't fix itself. The federal government is too big, and the politicians are too invested in its growth. We the people must take control through our state legislatures. Thank you, and may God bless America! For America, Mark Meckler President Convention of States Action Paid for by Convention of States Action 5850 San Felipe Suite 580A Houston, TX 77057 If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Trumptrainnews, . 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Great America Update
subject: Restoring hope in our country
body:
You may be discouraged by the Left’s dominance in our colleges and universities [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6472%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=ViMTUZQGZ4WpFKzD0NHpvQ&sysid=1)
| | | This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c76066%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Oowe17683UnqpDhLzNQEJA&sysid=1) Fellow American, [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c76066%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Oowe17683UnqpDhLzNQEJA&sysid=1) You may be discouraged by the Left’s dominance in our colleges and universities, and its increasing influence in K-12 education. But we must not lose hope. Instead, we must fight back with the truth. Hillsdale College has been engaging the Left on the battlefield of education from the beginning. That’s why we’ve turned our course, [**“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c76067%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=04sJIVfqNIecXO7mZlbalA&sysid=1) into a DVD set, and I’d like you to have a copy. Taught by historian Wilfred McClay and based on his recently published history of America, **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”** presents a full, unbiased account of America’s past. Hillsdale’s goal in producing this course is to **restore the kind of intelligent patriotism --especially among our young people--that is essential to preserving free government.** **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”** is a powerful counterweight to _The New York Times’_ “1619 Project,” which is injecting the idea that America is an essentially unjust nation into the curricula of America’s K-12 schools. Please consider getting [**“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c76067%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=04sJIVfqNIecXO7mZlbalA&sysid=1) as a DVD set for your home library or to give as a gift. Presenting real American history is the surest means of preserving liberty. Quantities are limited, so reserve your copy today. [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-great-american-story-dvd**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c76068%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=mWdw8clD7g2R7PPNK12EqA&sysid=1) Thank you for your partnership with Hillsdale College and your support of its mission on behalf of liberty. Sincerely, Bill Gray Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College

name: Cristen Wohlgemuth
subject: This is blatant government overreach!
body:
Michael and Chantell Sackett have been fighting for 15 years to build a home on the private property they own near Priest Lake i
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztdl8alch18eqnbhne2afq7d7e2f71gigmf7aa5g_rp22sh2s8i66or1cti64o32cph238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jmgr32t5nmepradrmeej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf0shlcloe4s3k6li3as70eaqjbdtie9g67cpk6ao72tr5ecom0plgcdqrcpr3c1jt4s3icgr31cj6e9q32tj0s2q6ac70mkom9pj6coojeddl61r64phkc2pmcdtgmlin49fg)
| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zv162l0truccffn1btcjt6otbced777s2g9v6cpo_rp22sh2s8i66or1cti64o32cph2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend of Liberty, Michael and Chantell Sackett have been fighting for 15 years to build a home on the private property they own near Priest Lake in Bonner County, Idaho. It’s not for the usual reasons like a lack of building supplies or unresponsive contractors. It’s because the Environmental Protection Agency (EPA) declared that their land is a wetland. But here’s the kicker. The Sacketts’ land is not wet. There’s no water on it! Still, the government is going after them. And if the couple doesn’t comply with the EPA’s outlandish regulations, they could face fines up to $32,500 _per day_! The Sacketts have been dragged through the courts for years fighting for their property rights—**and yours**. Now, their case will be argued before the U.S. Supreme Court. And MSLF has lent them support in their fight against this blatant government overreach. That’s why I’m emailing you today with a special request. I’m hoping you will stand with the Sacketts and show them you support their fight by signing our petition today. If the EPA is allowed to trample the lives of private citizens like the Sacketts with no opposition, there’s no telling who could be next. But your voice today will push back against this injustice and show the government that you stand for freedom and the private property rights of every American citizen. **Please sign the petition below declaring your desire to stand against this blatant overreach by the EPA.**
* I am standing for the private property rights of Michael and Chantell Sackett.
* I am standing against unelected bureaucracies that threaten the rights of individual citizens.
* I am asking the U.S. Supreme Court to rule against the EPA’s blatant government overreach.

Please sign our petition right now at this secure link: **[https://mslegal.org/subscribe/sackett-petition/](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zk1rk6u8sdpnjs4d7v2n46k55dukaop7u217rst0_rp22sh2s8i66or1cti64o32cph2bs)** For Liberty! Cristen Wohlgemuth President & CEO Mountain States Legal Foundation
---
