name: Mark Meckler, COS Action
subject: Sign the National Convention of States Petition!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Convention of States Action
body:
I urge you, right this second, to sign the National Petition for an Article V Convention of States to save America.
| | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z3nnv2pmlj2ssbdlnmkgeor31e5td8dopmvbc5eg_rp22sh2s8i66or1cti64o32c5h2bs)
---
Fellow Patriot, [**I urge you, right this second, to sign the National Petition for an Article V Convention of States to save America**.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z2u03fntgnmabbgg4jnhl3a73ktmmjsgrj6ub41o_rp22sh2s8i66or1cti64o32c5h2bs) An army of conservative heroes including **_Mark Levin, Ben Shapiro, Sean Hannity,_** and** _Lt. Col. Allen West_** have joined our movement to call for an Article V Convention of States. [**Just click here to add your name to this national petition. And then PLEASE forward this email to every single person you know.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zmd6hl79h186m8v8sv0sj2q4qj4jkpk3u0tcp0p0_rp22sh2s8i66or1cti64o32c5h2bs)
---
[**Sign The Petition**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zdpege05oh1st30vb5dec8247uccmm5p8phiclkg_rp22sh2s8i66or1cti64o32c5h2bs)
---
Our nation is spiraling out of control. Debt threatens to cripple our economy. Federal spending has never been higher -- nor has our deficit. And the politicians in Washington won't do anything to save us. _In fact, most of them are part of the problem!_ A Convention of States is our only hope. You see, our Founding Fathers were brilliant men. They left an emergency clause in the Constitution in case the federal government got too big and out-of-control. **Article V of the Constitution allows the states to bypass Congress and the President to call a Convention of States to propose amendments to our Constitution that will rein in the federal government.** Well, conservative leaders all across the country -- along with over **_FIVE MILLION_** grassroots patriots -- believe it is time to invoke Article V and call a Convention of States for the express, _limited_ purpose of imposing fiscal restraints and term limits on Congress and limiting the power, scope, and jurisdiction of the federal government. And I hope you do, too. With the socialists in control in Washington, it's time to take action before it's too late! It's time for "We the People" to use the most powerful weapon in our arsenal - the Constitution - to fight back against Washington's overreach. [**Please sign the National Petition for an Article V Convention of States right now, and please ask everyone you know to do the same.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z2pv1vrnvj3bgj5amdatl74djjt8j8it0arig1ro_rp22sh2s8i66or1cti64o32c5h2bs) Here at Convention of States Action, we are working overtime to convince the required 34 state legislatures to call for an Article V convention to place limits on the power and jurisdiction of the federal government. **We have already passed the COS Resolution through the state legislatures in 19 states, including four since the start of this year alone -- bringing us over __HALFWAY__ to calling a Convention of States and taking the power back from the "ruling class" in Washington!** This year alone, the Resolution has passed out of committee in Massachusetts, Pennsylvania, Iowa, and Kansas -- paving the way for the next round of states to pass! With dozens of states currently considering the COS Resolution, _NOW_ is our window of opportunity to double down and secure the needed victories to cross the finish line! We have a citizen activist army operating in all 50 states, working tirelessly to urge their state legislators to act in accordance with the will of the people and demand that they pass this critically important Resolution. **A Convention of States is our only chance to pass important and long overdue measures like a balanced budget amendment, term limits on Congress and the D.C. Swamp, and limits on the scope and jurisdiction of the federal government.** The politicians in Washington wouldn't dare limit their own power. Therefore, we the people need to do it! But in order for that to happen, we need millions and millions of patriotic Americans like you to sign this important national petition. We need to show the members of the state legislatures that the American people are ready for a constitutional solution as big as our nation's problems, an Article V Convention of States. [**Simply click here to sign and we’ll deliver it directly to your state legislators, free of charge. This is our best chance to save America from an out-of-control federal government.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zti7830uq15actvjbu9lt89vg0sgtg0hoehnhe8o_rp22sh2s8i66or1cti64o32c5h2bs) Washington won't fix itself. The federal government is too big, and the politicians are too invested in its growth. We the people must take control through our state legislatures. [**Please join the fight to call a Convention of States. Sign the petition today, and urge every freedom-loving American to do the same.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z229itcos63aug8fvtavl5tder3a9odkvgl81sd8_rp22sh2s8i66or1cti64o32c5h2bs)
---
[**Sign The Petition**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z1k6igijtcjd9rqpukivp017c6e0qndg2pupnd7g_rp22sh2s8i66or1cti64o32c5h2bs)
---
Thank you, and may God bless America! For America, Mark Meckler President Convention of States Action
---
Paid for by Convention of States Action
---
5850 San Felipe
Suite 580A
Houston, TX 77057
---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Kevin McCarthy
subject: Re: Pulling the plug on campaign ads
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
The truth is - we have not been able to raise enough money to keep our ads on the air through election day.

| |
---
| | |
---
| Peter,

This is GOP Leader Kevin McCarthy. Unfortunately, I come bearing some bad news:

**We 're going to have to cancel our advertising buys unless we see a massive surge of grassroots support this evening.**

_**Here 's the lay of the land:**_
We started off this election cycle ambitious as ever. The polls were in our favor. A record 33 Democrats announced their retirement. And I personally vetted & recruited the best class of candidates I've seen to date.

_**NOW:**_ We've taken a turn for the worst. Democrats have pulled ahead in the polls & SURGED ahead in fundraising - while our fundraising has come to a complete standstill.

The truth is - we have not been able to raise enough money to keep our ads on the air through election day.
---
| | [HELP KEEP OUR ADS ON TV](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61464816:6jMhBZVMN:m:1:3317145305:B40C96788B88C1C50BA969E1E788B333:r)
---
| According to my team, if we can manage a $30,000 surge by midnight tonight - we can manage to keep our candidates on air through the end of the month. I know that sounds like a ton, but if everyone reading this, chips in $25 - $75 we can CRUSH this goal.

Peter, our incumbents need defense on the airwaves, and our new recruits need name recognition. We simply CANNOT just brunt Pelosi's attacks on the airwaves without any response.

_**[I'm humbly asking you to help ENSURE our candidates' ads can remain up on the airwaves:](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61464816:6jMhBZVMN:m:1:3317145305:B40C96788B88C1C50BA969E1E788B333:r "I’m humbly
asking you to help ENSURE our candidates’ ads can remain up on the airwaves:")**_

Let me first say I’m so grateful for this team. We just had a killer end-of-quarter grassroots fundraising push, all thanks to yinz guys. 🥰 So I hate to come right back to your inbox with another ask. Seriously. But here are three reasons why, as soon I saw Nate’s new forecast, I knew I didn’t have a choice:
1. 538 has the entire Senate rated as a toss-up!!! Yep, Dems staying in control of the Senate could come down to a single race (ours).
2. They’re projecting a vote margin of just 0.3% in our race. Doing the math, that’s like, a few thousand PA voters at most. That’s the kind of *tiny* margin that could tip either way purely based on how hard we campaign.
3. Dr. Oz is primed to spend TONS of money attacking me. My dude is so rich, the limit basically does not exist.

So if we don’t want Dr. Oz and his buddies Trump + McConnell to tip the scales against us with massive, MAGA-y ad campaigns, we can’t skip a beat with our online fundraising. [**Please, if you’re ready to defeat Dr. Oz, flip this seat, and keep the Senate blue, consider splitting a donation of any amount between my campaign and Seth Moulton today so we aren’t outspent.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/51801300/370360302/934264986?refcode=221002&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNmJjZjU5MC01MTQyLWVkMTEtYjQ5NS0wMDIyNDgzMmU0Y2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kFS13qxUiEQi7FKcRJcslNOPHYr3ic1x_NI1ZNN-IIo=) With your help, I know that we’ll be able to keep up with Dr. Oz and his MAGA money through donations of $5, $25, or whatever yinz can pitch in. It’s how we’ve run this campaign so far, and how it’s going to stay. Thank you for fighting back today. TBH, I’m really hoping our team will see your name pop up on ActBlue when you make your first-ever (!) donation. John Fetterman
Lt. Governor of Pennsylvania

body:
Whatever you’ve been able to give has made a huge impact in this movement.
Fair Fight |

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/51801778/370362377/1793776944?refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20221002_n_thankyou_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNmQ5MjAyMS01MjQyLWVkMTEtYjQ5NS0wMDIyNDgzMmU0Y2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_REI_jZ9PIVwgVxZ4VWC6f75iLk0FbXyl0pht98Jm_Y=&emci=8e83cb73-d940-ed11-b495-00224832e4ca&emdi=f6d92021-5242-ed11-b495-00224832e4ca&ceid=1037277)

| | I want to start by saying thank you. Thank you for being a part of this movement and thank you for your continued support. Early voting is almost upon us in Georgia, and with you on our team, we’ve been able to hit the ground running as we turn your contributions into tangible resources in this fight to protect the freedom to vote. Whether that’s been by exposing voter suppression tactics or educating all eligible voters on every step of voting, whatever you’ve been able to give has made a huge impact in this movement. And as we look towards early voting, November 8, and beyond, we are prepared for whatever tactics bad actors will use to try and suppress the vote. Because of your support, the team here at Fair Fight Action is heading into one of the most consequential elections prepared to respond to whatever comes our way. We’re ready to keep fighting alongside you and remain steadfast in our mission to ensure elections remain accessible to all eligible voters by making the process as smooth as possible. Thanks so much for being a part of this movement. We couldn’t be more grateful to have you in this fight to protect the freedom to vote. Onward Together, Cianti Stewart-Reid
Executive Director, Fair Fight Action [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/51801779/370362378/1008416958?refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20221002_n_thankyou_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNmQ5MjAyMS01MjQyLWVkMTEtYjQ5NS0wMDIyNDgzMmU0Y2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_REI_jZ9PIVwgVxZ4VWC6f75iLk0FbXyl0pht98Jm_Y=) | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/51801780/370362379/1008416958?refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20221002_n_thankyou_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNmQ5MjAyMS01MjQyLWVkMTEtYjQ5NS0wMDIyNDgzMmU0Y2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_REI_jZ9PIVwgVxZ4VWC6f75iLk0FbXyl0pht98Jm_Y=)

From the bottom of my heart, I’m deeply grateful for everyone who pitched in to help hit our September goal. I also know not everyone can always make a donation, and there are so many ways to be in this fight — from making calls and knocking on doors to getting the word out to your family and friends. It all adds up, and I appreciate everything you can do. Person to person, one conversation and one contribution at a time, we’re growing our grassroots movement. We’re getting ready to protect and expand our Democratic majorities. We’re fighting to elect champions for working people up and down the ballot. And side by side, we’ll keep fighting for bold reforms that touch people’s lives and put power in the hands of working people. It’s only possible because of supporters like you. And it is an honor to fight by your side. The moment my fundraising numbers become public on Monday night, all of the most powerful, corrupt, and well-funded actors that I have fought to hold accountable will be poring over my fundraising numbers. They’ll be looking for any hint of weakness – and we cannot afford to give them one.

Because, to be honest with you, Peter, my nonstop quest for justice and equality in New York has earned me a _lot_ of powerful enemies. They will eagerly jump on _any_ opportunity they find to poke holes in our final election year push and give my Republican opponent an advantage over me. That’s why this exclusive match opportunity could not have come at a better time.

**Between my GOP opponent accepting tens of thousands of dollars from a “Stop the Steal” conspiracy theorist and the Republican Attorneys General Association raising millions to remove progressive attorneys general like me from office, missing my public filing goal could be _detrimental_ to my campaign. clean_body: | | | Peter, with only one day left before my critical public fundraising deadline, I’m still falling short of my goal. = Thanks to an extremely generous group of donors, every dollar I raise before midnight tomorrow will be MATCHED – but if we fall short of this goal, we WILL be leaving this amazing opportunity on the table. Peter, at a moment when so many of our fundamental rights are being trampled on, my work as attorney general has never been more important. So I have to ask: = | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you, Letitia \-----Forwarded Message------ Sender: Letitia Subject: Before my numbers go public Date: Sat, Oct 1, 2022 | | | | | = Peter, my FINAL public filing deadline of the election year is in just two days, and I need your help. After an impressive end-of-quarter push, I only have to raise another $30,000 before MIDNIGHT on Oct. 3 to hit my last major fundraising goal. I know that may sound like a lot, but here’s why I’m confident we can pull this off: A generous group of donors has agreed to MATCH the next 1,000 donations made to my campaign before midnight on Monday. So I must ask: = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = The moment my fundraising numbers become public on Monday night, all of the most powerful, corrupt, and well-funded actors that I have fought to hold accountable will be poring over my fundraising numbers. They’ll be looking for any hint of weakness – and we cannot afford to give them one. Because, to be honest with you, Peter, my nonstop quest for justice and equality in New York has earned me a lot of powerful enemies. They will eagerly jump on any opportunity they find to poke holes in our final election year push and give my Republican opponent an advantage over me. That’s why this exclusive match opportunity could not have come at a better time. Between my GOP opponent accepting tens of thousands of dollars from a “Stop the Steal” conspiracy theorist and the Republican Attorneys General Association raising millions to remove progressive attorneys general like me from office, missing my public filing goal could be detrimental to my campaign. So please: = | | = Thank you for being in this fight with me. Only a little over one month to go! Letitia | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. James for NY P.O. subject: Expose the College Cartel
body:
I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time. [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c6035%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=3Pm1HeHJYuNSfgGektkcTw&sysid=1)

---
Fellow Patriot, I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time. _And now I want to send YOU a copy of the evidence against America's colleges and universities -- my NEW BOOK,_**The College Scam.** [**Will you claim YOUR copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY AMOUNT, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c86212%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=51rmGuAcma%2bkOV78xVlL5w&sysid=1)
---
[](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c86211%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=hp136bFaCGBia8J4dFVerQ&sysid=1)
---
_I was proud to share my new book,_ The College Scam,_
with President Donald Trump._
---
**I've spent 10 years leading Turning Point USA, the _BIGGEST_ and most _IMPACTFUL_ pro-America student organization with 500,000+ student activists in all 50 states.** And at Turning Point USA, I've met THOUSANDS of college students from every corner of the country -- and I've criss-crossed America to speak at HUNDREDS of colleges and universities. So I have seen firsthand how the College Cartel is BRAINWASHING an entire generation to hate our country and our freedom. _And I know that YOU have seen firsthand how their racist, sexist, Socialist ideologies have escaped college campuses and TAKEN OVER our culture, our politics, our media, our government, and our lives._ **I knew that I had to EXPOSE the College Cartel and put an END to the College Scam for good -- and that's why I wrote my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_.** Now I want to reach as many grassroots patriots AS POSSIBLE with _The College Scam_ to learn the TRUTH about the College Cartel and their attacks on America. [**I'd like to send you a copy of my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_ , as a special thank-you for a gift of ANY amount to Turning Point USA. Will you claim your book right now?**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c86213%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=XKpS4f2bQRH%2fbjRymp7%2baQ&sysid=1)
---
[Get your copy](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c86214%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Y%2fE%2fv3J06I3dTNEe75aloQ&sysid=1)
---
I wrote this book as an ESSENTIAL GUIDE for every patriot concerned about young people and the future of our country. When you read _The College Scam,_ you'll learn:
* my 10-point case that exposes higher education -- so YOU can be the judge

* the real reasons that administrators and professors attack American Greatness

* how the government and the education PR machine brainwashed a generation into taking on massive debt for minimal gain

**_And I want you to know \-- this isn't just another book about Campus Leftists_.** Instead, it combines FRONTLINE EXPERIENCE from my 10 years criss-crossing America to speak with students ... EXTENSIVE RESEARCH into the dirty secrets of higher education (and how the government props it up!) ... and a PROSECUTOR'S INTENSITY to present my case against the College Cartel. [**Can I send you a copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY amount, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c86225%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=JTSrODkNA9RxHqzDEBOh5Q&sysid=1) That means you'll get a copy of this exciting new book AND help support Turning Point USA's critical work to EXPOSE the Left’s college scam, DEFEAT the radical Left, and WIN the American Culture War!
---
[Get your copy](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c86214%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Y%2fE%2fv3J06I3dTNEe75aloQ&sysid=1)
---
The College Cartel has created and spread the WORST and MOST TOXIC beliefs behind the Left's War on American Culture. And no one has exposed the FULL TRUTH of the College Scam -- until now. [**You don't want to miss it! Please claim your copy of _The College Scam_ RIGHT NOW. All I'm asking for is a gift of any amount to Turning Point USA to help cover shipping -- and support our efforts to WIN the American Culture War.**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c86226%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=RX2g3aEXEo4%2bIcS1DdEcqw&sysid=1) Thank you for helping me EXPOSE the College Cartel and fight back against their toxic ideologies in the American Culture War!
---
Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA

body:
I need you on this team...

Hey Derek — just a few quick FYIs for you before the week gets started.
1. Pennsylvania is the swingiest swing state, and this Governor’s race will be close.
2. My opponent, Doug Mastriano, is dangerous, he's determined, and he has a path to victory if we don’t stop him.
3. Everything – and I mean everything — is on the line in this election. Our rights, our democracy, our values, you name it – it's on the ballot.

Look, Derek, we’re a little over a month out from Election Day and the stakes and the stress levels are high. But for as close as the polls are, I know that we have you on my team to get our campaign over the finish line. **[Will you donate for the first time today to help us gain some ground before the clock runs out on this election?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/51805189/370376575/-586780698?refcode=email_100222_fyi_paactive&amount=5&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&refcode2=a28c9c53-5642-ed11-b495-00224832e4ca&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTY5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMjhjOWM1My01NjQyLWVkMTEtYjQ5NS0wMDIyNDgzMmU0Y2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KZoeaXpZbdYxOKYc5QDeDF2Xb37cjnjXCnVztA2t5Qc=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [Donate $5 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/51805190/370376576/-586780698?refcode=email_100222_fyi_paactive&amount=5&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&express_lane=true&refcode2=a28c9c53-5642-ed11-b495-00224832e4ca&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTY5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMjhjOWM1My01NjQyLWVkMTEtYjQ5NS0wMDIyNDgzMmU0Y2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KZoeaXpZbdYxOKYc5QDeDF2Xb37cjnjXCnVztA2t5Qc=)

It’s about whether Pennsylvania is a place where you can raise a family in a community with safe streets and high-paying union jobs. Most importantly, it’s about making sure our democracy passes this crucial test at an uncertain time.
**[Derek, I need your help to make sure we don’t come up short on Election Day. name: Kevin McCarthy
subject: 🚨 Re: Pulling the plug on campaign ads 🚨
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
The truth is - we have not been able to raise enough money to keep our ads on the air through election day.

| |
---
| | |
---
| Peter,

This is GOP Leader Kevin McCarthy. Unfortunately, I come bearing some bad news:

**We 're going to have to cancel our advertising buys unless we see a massive surge of grassroots support this evening.**

_**Here 's the lay of the land:**_
We started off this election cycle ambitious as ever. The polls were in our favor. A record 33 Democrats announced their retirement. And I personally vetted & recruited the best class of candidates I've seen to date.

_**NOW:**_ We've taken a turn for the worst. Democrats have pulled ahead in the polls & SURGED ahead in fundraising - while our fundraising has come to a complete standstill.

The truth is - we have not been able to raise enough money to keep our ads on the air through election day.
---
| | [HELP KEEP OUR ADS ON TV](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61466922:6e4LXZVEN:m:1:3331421248:D7ED4BD3ACA878EBF802ADA124316757:r)
---
| According to my team, if we can manage a $30,000 surge by midnight tonight - we can manage to keep our candidates on air through the end of the month. I know that sounds like a ton, but if everyone reading this, chips in $25 - $75 we can CRUSH this goal.

Peter, our incumbents need defense on the airwaves, and our new recruits need name recognition. We simply CANNOT just brunt Pelosi's attacks on the airwaves without any response.

_**[I'm humbly asking you to help ENSURE our candidates' ads can remain up on the airwaves:](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61466922:6e4LXZVEN:m:1:3331421248:D7ED4BD3ACA878EBF802ADA124316757:r "I’m humbly
asking you to help ENSURE our candidates’ ads can remain up on the airwaves:")**_

name: Raphael Warnock
subject: this latest news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
With experts at FiveThirtyEight saying Senate control will be decided here, this surge in Republican spending could put this seat and our entire majority in serious danger.
| | |
---
This latest news has me concerned, friend:
**National Republicans are outspending us to launch massive ad buys, smear me on the airwaves, and flip this seat. Now, polls show me 2 points down to Herschel Walker.**
With experts at _FiveThirtyEight_ saying Senate control will be decided here, this surge in Republican spending could put this seat and our entire majority in serious danger.
**That's why we just launched a new TV ad to fight back and spread our people-powered message. But unless we close our significant budget gap by midnight tonight, our ads could go dark, and we could be outspent by the GOP.**

name: Deroy Murdock
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zbr0btoj790a9jg70t1p0hu34r3upd1570o3ua8g_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk4qj4ttkumqn4s9nmorb79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4ongmpor2tdgegqj8phimlh72sj3ccon6d1h6lg7fcr4s5pj6cjjemob8cthmap61puie1p64pjgm9j71p5jcdjr4t3665qb6p9nm8p6cclgm9j61o5lcdge1d9h66qj3dbi46h22sh2s8i66or1cti6eob2cjh2bs)
This sponsored message from Deroy Murdock is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zjbjcfbv2s4ggm2ghqu8q2tu3afjlu9a4ng5s478_rp22sh2s8i66or1cti6eob2cjh2bs) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zuvsol179patp5mnurjoqqvc9een7vifjagam44g_rp22sh2s8i66or1cti6eob2cjh2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z2dc34q78v9apkkvk7ave2gp3av67brh7rcb55rg_rp22sh2s8i66or1cti6eob2cjh2bs)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College

His warning that the basic right outlined in the U.S. Constitution is losing traction echoes sentiments he expressed during a conference on religious freedom last summer, in Rome. During an address at the Catholic University of America, Justice Alito described the role his religious convictions play in his work as a judge in the high court. He described his faith as having a ‘real-world’ impact on the decisions he makes. name: Andrew P. McIndoe
subject: Share your thoughts on American energy independence
body:
Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office | | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=d9f07e5efa454396bbea5f9e3c8d8cc5&_e=NbV_PPMVlGEaR8joy-zmquQYy2amj-j4iYnff69Jyat9l49Yes0OxaRmPXzvhg-uqGM-qSIQzeIKd7sVVBZuTccByQpfPzuH9-IqU_Z5ve0G3lrMMAfOtRAXgafbWNPjvoQTE7bqi0zoTGhXa9iCn0KxfLQD6eDLHbXaG0siQZFNjZaixBeTGn1XLA2y7xwrKNzjIegFKVKLEtEPNkeDz7uD4N8S27m11wqzOVITOdWa7suCJvEjcy25J_E-jl_hecN_dYsQZBN8Rl3_7y-owyG0ZTX_PKkj-A1dXOxIp719CEPB9RXTXJ-3NduSWkknA-KQlxi_KwG1_Tkj-2Iqo8spiynp9bkDxqr-hGFBqCgaaHCuxRUpbDTKRO0U9gjw)
---
Dear Fellow Conservative, Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office, and I’m sure you’ve felt the pinch at the pump just like the rest of your fellow Americans. There’s no doubt in my mind that our nation’s citizens are in need of relief. But instead, President Biden has throttled U.S. energy production. And he has trapped much of our nation’s vast energy reserves behind a wall of bureaucratic red tape. That’s why I’m sending you this email today. I’d like to hear how the Biden administration’s energy policies have affected you and your family. [**Would you be willing to share your thoughts in this brief 8 question survey?**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=d9f07e5efa454396bbea5f9e3c8d8cc5&_e=NbV_PPMVlGEaR8joy-zmquQYy2amj-j4iYnff69Jyat9l49Yes0OxaRmPXzvhg-uqGM-qSIQzeIKd7sVVBZuTccByQpfPzuH9-IqU_Z5ve0G3lrMMAfOtRAXgafbWNPjvoQTE7bqi0zoTGhXa9iCn0KxfLQD6eDLHbXaG0siQZFNjZaixBeTGn1XLA2y7xwrKNzjIegFKVKLEtEPNkeDz7uD4N8S27m11wqzOVITOdVxwrFlaaWCWmTGFomi1PbfkIgyqIO-Xo89djB5HS2yxjvbsEaRjMcQyJK7SoEuFnkKoCVlgImu_U2NOSZnoYnuFjUTR2XjBMwoS6plyZUAp3IEDtzR2xr9h1ftbHhyXZa9SjmA-ZaH5us62ocJ8bQe) By doing so, you will help The Heritage Foundation understand what people like you think—and use your answers to fight back against the Biden administration’s radical anti-energy agenda. The survey should only take a few minutes of your time, but your opinion is incredibly valuable. **You can get started right now using this secure link:[https://secured.heritage.org/energy-independence-survey/](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=d9f07e5efa454396bbea5f9e3c8d8cc5&_e=NbV_PPMVlGEaR8joy-zmquQYy2amj-j4iYnff69Jyat9l49Yes0OxaRmPXzvhg-uqGM-qSIQzeIKd7sVVBZuTccByQpfPzuH9-IqU_Z5ve0G3lrMMAfOtRAXgafbWNPjvoQTE7bqi0zoTGhXa9iCn0KxfLQD6eDLHbXaG0siQZFNjZaixBeTGn1XLA2y7xwrKNzjIegFKVKLEtEPNkeDz7uD4N8S27m11wqzOVITOdV3hB0t4HHgmHgeuto6JQplQ42-YjT_6VDAofRhEznLY6lchyQ-hwJfbBU6LdGeI3n_tN5micY9qDOK07tE8aM1NsLVZ_2BTWTO6otPY4G2V2mYhgoSCKF5LJOHDvDrnDBrvKQgZPFwsrnqhGj-ijc1)** Thank you so much for your time. I am truly grateful. Best, Andrew P. McIndoe

name: Mike Pompeo
subject: How I Found God
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHAMPION AMERICAN VALUES
body:
When I started my time at the United States Military Academy, two young men invited me to a Bible study.

| |
---
| | | | | [](http://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=08610e9f35af45228b464f4f99101c67&_e=halsfFUP7sdHos-AkUvqRAzX-iS0sKaDzNWAvfrSC3GM7equWcFKxKfApwFn_5majTC6lmyPfJIHAhuL5MhyUvozOwulLrhMQ_Puw-O3senq2isPtuuytyrg6MidjAmKS0uXoDEbs0Lh0VwoQrKnHqqevMtRTJUhmjAbmo2lUw44vSRlTTitg24bU0Qjr4tbmyW6DYyhmbhIvM6iIZvgoV2C4SkvGC7OgbheeCQ_mrdzegVR1NOdd9Wqe3clsVzO7SwwRhxCgivK18R4r_4scaJTNR0BuZ0CSx6C-7pRiYJ3fAOEuXM_KN7R-cLjVPgxFUrksPWmNyXVanaIQlrHuxYrd6boXiyA9P1JkoTlTfgVxuCHs9op8ONB6atKgOSUI4StR21YvW099UeyP7Y6GME5war4sMTd04sUjlQRMsE%3D)
---

Like a lot of people, I grew up going to church and had a relationship with God that wasn't especially strong. But as I grew older that changed.

When I started my time at the United States Military Academy, two young men invited me to a Bible study.

They were very intentional to me in explaining God's Word. After some study and discipleship with them, they helped me begin my walk with Christ.

**Since then, faith has been central to my life.** I keep a Bible open on my desk, and read every morning from the Good Book.

---
| [](http://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=08610e9f35af45228b464f4f99101c67&_e=halsfFUP7sdHos-AkUvqRAzX-iS0sKaDzNWAvfrSC3GM7equWcFKxKfApwFn_5majTC6lmyPfJIHAhuL5MhyUvozOwulLrhMQ_Puw-O3senq2isPtuuytyrg6MidjAmKS0uXoDEbs0Lh0VwoQrKnHqqevMtRTJUhmjAbmo2lUw44vSRlTTitg24bU0Qjr4tbmyW6DYyhmbhIvM6iIZvgoV2C4SkvGC7OgbheeCQ_mrdzegVR1NOdd9Wqe3clsVzO7SwwRhxCgivK18R4r_4scUmaFu_kJPR-LVF5_EuW1s8Mp5IGLTAxwuqC5_xYdteCv38c0IGHWH-eV5ytkwrT7_fU44xDs-qLD9194Qk8dCmVBntYk07YpZeCHO9RoeCGHzPFqbn1Y_Ohoc0sEw_RNmSw_wsazc4PYYICb-1pmNA%3D)
---

Like you, I am also confronted with a highly complex set of problems, and I need the wisdom to try and make the right calls. _**So I need my mind renewed with the truth of the Gospel each day.**_

Unfortunately, faith-driven judgments are few and far between in Washington. Our leaders act without moral clarity and the consequences have been devastating.

If we are to restore honesty, integrity, and morality to our government, __**[we must elect more faith-driven leaders.](http://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=08610e9f35af45228b464f4f99101c67&_e=halsfFUP7sdHos-AkUvqRAzX-iS0sKaDzNWAvfrSC3GM7equWcFKxKfApwFn_5majTC6lmyPfJIHAhuL5MhyUvozOwulLrhMQ_Puw-O3senq2isPtuuytyrg6MidjAmKS0uXoDEbs0Lh0VwoQrKnHqqevMtRTJUhmjAbmo2lUw44vSRlTTitg24bU0Qjr4tbmyW6DYyhmbhIvM6iIZvgoV2C4SkvGC7OgbheeCQ_mrdzegVR1NOdd9Wqe3clsVzO7SwwRhxCgivK18R4r_4scZFaNparkfu_0goscnjTyDBpml-WS4wfwPdrPt7vCu6UTLdEPrXmVeEY4gNctB8RsPSkITglOT803PBugUoj6jgXlO2t2LdL7wqbOATdZ3vObxP55R3bLkL8-efFMc_ptBotnACFVkMe-OtEMw08TJ0%3D "we must elect more faith-driven leaders.")**__

clean_body: When I started my time at the United States Military Academy, two young men invited me to a Bible study. | | | | | | | Like a lot of people, I grew up going to church and had a relationship with God that wasn't especially strong. But as I grew older that changed. When I started my time at the United States Military Academy, two young men invited me to a Bible study. They were very intentional to me in explaining God's Word. After some study and discipleship with them, they helped me begin my walk with Christ. Since then, faith has been central to my life. I keep a Bible open on my desk, and read every morning from the Good Book. | Like you, I am also confronted with a highly complex set of problems, and I need the wisdom to try and make the right calls. name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: Is persecution coming?
body:
I was just reading through the Sermon on the Mount—arguably Jesus’s most famous and resonating sermon

| | | [](http://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=75ed168451da4abf960422b4373d103f&_e=6U5I6StjCWY1b7N4sMXucLAa2t77VnY0UrxmGh8UVQKHoMeNXfRy0YA_WNccZ2MLWG7fDm8J90vYuW3PsXIIWAOuBbNnzAsGBlMZkNy2SDsqKq3Bbntrn7-mD8B6jvnMxhAxqzlFzo6sdMp_0-kRWCy4rKlkITPGrn4M3TxwzZWY6eLJAheQMdzUEspXN6m2XAddDrIhr_zaxA1JUq7R1UhkKu3I6Qs0HlHYYU_kuE1ndMsniymY6WVnWcLRTMRKvoJ3N5OhdftL0THT9OSF2N_Hm-D7nI9GSuDa27OimU5EtOMZDYg8nbLGDDDMf5tT8YguEDl4LYOAx1jUVX1WTqz6Y5Swjixqn6U4hVzIPmODq8F7E2_hPk3mjZsQqVM5)
---
| Hello friend,

I was just reading through the Sermon on the Mount--arguably Jesus's most famous and resonating sermon--and I thought about how a certain passage is likely to become even more relevant in the days ahead. I'm talking about Matthew 5:11-12, where Jesus said:

_" Blessed are you when people insult you and persecute you, and falsely say all kinds of evil against you because of Me. Rejoice and be glad, for your reward in heaven is great; for in the same way they persecuted the prophets who were before you."_

As the days get darker spiritually, as our liberties are being trampled on and chipped away, as Christians are categorized by our culture as close minded bigots--it's not hard to foresee a future where religious persecution is intensified.

If things continue on their current trajectory, it is only a matter of time before things go from _uncomfortable_ to _unthinkable_.

What are we to do when persecution comes our way? How does Jesus instruct us to react? He doesn't tell us to just hold on and endure. He doesn't tell us to just sit tight and bear it.

As with so many other passages in the Sermon on the Mount, Jesus ups the ante of what we would consider "normal" behavior. Jesus says that in the face of persecution we are to "rejoice and be exceedingly glad"!
---
| | I've written a new book that looks closely at the Sermon on the Mount. It's called _18 Minutes with Jesus: Straight Talk from the Savior about the Things That Matter Most_. We're offering a copy of this book to anyone who donates generously to the ministry of Pathway to Victory this month.

When you give, you are helping to broadcast the truth of God's Word across the nation and around the world. Your donation can help to change the course of a life from darkness to light, from despair to hope, and from worry to peace.
---
| [](http://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=75ed168451da4abf960422b4373d103f&_e=6U5I6StjCWY1b7N4sMXucLAa2t77VnY0UrxmGh8UVQKHoMeNXfRy0YA_WNccZ2MLWG7fDm8J90vYuW3PsXIIWAOuBbNnzAsGBlMZkNy2SDsqKq3Bbntrn7-mD8B6jvnMxhAxqzlFzo6sdMp_0-kRWCy4rKlkITPGrn4M3TxwzZWY6eLJAheQMdzUEspXN6m2XAddDrIhr_zaxA1JUq7R1UhkKu3I6Qs0HlHYYU_kuE1yl1VuHiC8BSWy715q1ODkoFWdO4KiH3CdbWIEs7MX9n0tSj7Mpv52LJ8_JpWDAYGH3RTTpoZrWplpUgb_9PbNjr-_QaYJ0-0-dosrbki2YEBlxDUSVkO2GREEvK2TyyT8IUX8-I3Ovn2nj-zWvRRb)
---
| Thank you for whatever you can give to help: **[https://ptv.org/donate/18-minutes-with-jesus-from-dr-robert-jeffress/](http://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=75ed168451da4abf960422b4373d103f&_e=6U5I6StjCWY1b7N4sMXucLAa2t77VnY0UrxmGh8UVQKHoMeNXfRy0YA_WNccZ2MLWG7fDm8J90vYuW3PsXIIWAOuBbNnzAsGBlMZkNy2SDsqKq3Bbntrn7-mD8B6jvnMxhAxqzlFzo6sdMp_0-kRWCy4rKlkITPGrn4M3TxwzZWY6eLJAheQMdzUEspXN6m2XAddDrIhr_zaxA1JUq7R1UhkKu3I6Qs0HlHYYU_kuE1unWPwv8YzCr8ln2W0gdc6Ho2aqoqaW_U3YMhuT1Shl8tW06aOeGK7M76gFSLdFG-fkUNGcoLh79cToJ43e6VD7XwHD-iB7it5sSlP0gBWAZ_ugb_iAIx3Qla4DMK3uHwrfvhcIJNVpdCtCUsIwmfO)**

I give thanks to God that we still have the opportunity to openly and boldly declare the Word of God here in America, and I pray that the Church would take advantage of that freedom while it lasts. **Let 's do _all_ we can to share the gospel _while_ we can.**

God bless you.

Sincerely,
Dr. Robert Jeffress |
---

name: Ric Grenell
subject: Don’t let the cabal destroy a good man
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LAXALT FOR SENATE
body:
Save an America First Patriot before it's too late

This is Fmr. Acting Director of National Intelligence Ric Grenell.

I don't send confidential briefings like this often, so I need you to pay close attention.

I've just received word from my sources that operators at the **HIGHEST LEVEL** of the Democrat Party are colluding to destroy one man: **Adam Laxalt.**
**[**SAVE ADAM LAXALT**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61462255:JVCj_ZVRN:m:1:3345639852:BFDC58FBBF26CE59291F92FA8BB51F90:r)**
---

Adam is running for the US Senate seat in Nevada - the ONE SEAT that will decide everything.

The Democrat elites know that when Adam wins in November, **they will LOSE their liberal Senate majority.** That's why they're pulling all the strings to stop him.

Fake attack ads, publishing hit pieces in their newspapers, **ALL DIRTY TRICKS** are on the table. Frankly, I've never seen anything like it.

That's why I've reached out to you today. It's up to true patriots like you to stop the Democrat cabal in their tracks before they destroy another good man.
**[**RUSH HELP**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61462255:JVCj_ZVRN:m:1:3345639852:BFDC58FBBF26CE59291F92FA8BB51F90:r)**
---

Please, we have the power to stop them, but only if we act right now.

Stop what you're doing and rush help to Adam before it's too late. We won't get another chance at this.

Thank you, and God Bless.

Richard Grenell

* * *

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61462256:JVCj_ZVRN:m:1:3345639852:BFDC58FBBF26CE59291F92FA8BB51F90:r) **A personal note from Adam Laxalt:**
Peter, I wanted to reach out personally and say thank you for your support.
I'm not going to lie to you, the fight to save our country won't be easy. But with patriots like you on my team we WILL win this race.
We've reached a critical moment in the campaign cycle and your support is more important now than ever before. Right now I'm under attack- **the Democrats have already spent $76 MILLION to destroy my campaign.**
[**That 's why I'm asking you to chip in whatever you can right now.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61462256:JVCj_ZVRN:m:1:3345639852:BFDC58FBBF26CE59291F92FA8BB51F90:r) The fight to flip Nevada and retake the Senate majority depends on you.
Thank you for all your support,
Adam Laxalt

[**DONATE NOW**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61462256:JVCj_ZVRN:m:1:3345639852:BFDC58FBBF26CE59291F92FA8BB51F90:r)
---

name: Mark Meckler, COS Action
subject: Sign the National Convention of States Petition!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Convention of States Action
body:
I urge you, right this second, to sign the National Petition for an Article V Convention of States to save America. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0881%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=yfBFxmJ99uvn4bhsR6KIeQ&sysid=1)
| | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c45838%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=hBJPgxjC4mxejDVhzDAMkQ&sysid=1)
---
Fellow Patriot, [**I urge you, right this second, to sign the National Petition for an Article V Convention of States to save America**.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c45839%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ZBSTsKzgeRxJrnbC5LJY9A&sysid=1) An army of conservative heroes including **_Mark Levin, Ben Shapiro, Sean Hannity,_** and** _Lt. Col. Allen West_** have joined our movement to call for an Article V Convention of States. [**Just click here to add your name to this national petition. And then PLEASE forward this email to every single person you know.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c45830%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=rWWZDCZFUt7qlsloXNIwGw&sysid=1)
---
[**Sign The Petition**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c45831%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=XAOQS5LpQ74haXWgx8%2fp8g&sysid=1)
---
Our nation is spiraling out of control. Debt threatens to cripple our economy. Federal spending has never been higher -- nor has our deficit. And the politicians in Washington won't do anything to save us. _In fact, most of them are part of the problem!_ A Convention of States is our only hope. You see, our Founding Fathers were brilliant men. They left an emergency clause in the Constitution in case the federal government got too big and out-of-control. **Article V of the Constitution allows the states to bypass Congress and the President to call a Convention of States to propose amendments to our Constitution that will rein in the federal government.** Well, conservative leaders all across the country -- along with over **_FIVE MILLION_** grassroots patriots -- believe it is time to invoke Article V and call a Convention of States for the express, _limited_ purpose of imposing fiscal restraints and term limits on Congress and limiting the power, scope, and jurisdiction of the federal government. And I hope you do, too. With the socialists in control in Washington, it's time to take action before it's too late! It's time for "We the People" to use the most powerful weapon in our arsenal - the Constitution - to fight back against Washington's overreach. [**Please sign the National Petition for an Article V Convention of States right now, and please ask everyone you know to do the same.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c45832%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=mhoxg5BN1AiaaJqsQaK0nw&sysid=1) Here at Convention of States Action, we are working overtime to convince the required 34 state legislatures to call for an Article V convention to place limits on the power and jurisdiction of the federal government. **We have already passed the COS Resolution through the state legislatures in 19 states, including four since the start of this year alone -- bringing us over __HALFWAY__ to calling a Convention of States and taking the power back from the "ruling class" in Washington!** This year alone, the Resolution has passed out of committee in Massachusetts, Pennsylvania, Iowa, and Kansas -- paving the way for the next round of states to pass! With dozens of states currently considering the COS Resolution, _NOW_ is our window of opportunity to double down and secure the needed victories to cross the finish line! We have a citizen activist army operating in all 50 states, working tirelessly to urge their state legislators to act in accordance with the will of the people and demand that they pass this critically important Resolution. **A Convention of States is our only chance to pass important and long overdue measures like a balanced budget amendment, term limits on Congress and the D.C. Swamp, and limits on the scope and jurisdiction of the federal government.** The politicians in Washington wouldn't dare limit their own power. Therefore, we the people need to do it! But in order for that to happen, we need millions and millions of patriotic Americans like you to sign this important national petition. We need to show the members of the state legislatures that the American people are ready for a constitutional solution as big as our nation's problems, an Article V Convention of States. [**Simply click here to sign and we’ll deliver it directly to your state legislators, free of charge. This is our best chance to save America from an out-of-control federal government.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c45833%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=U1avDpWS6OR37LAPiBmnkA&sysid=1) Washington won't fix itself. The federal government is too big, and the politicians are too invested in its growth. We the people must take control through our state legislatures. [**Please join the fight to call a Convention of States. Sign the petition today, and urge every freedom-loving American to do the same.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c45834%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=6D9JNZHzrJCWcEiimOAzbw&sysid=1)
---
[**Sign The Petition**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c45831%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=XAOQS5LpQ74haXWgx8%2fp8g&sysid=1)
---
Thank you, and may God bless America! For America, Mark Meckler President Convention of States Action
---
Paid for by Convention of States Action
---
5850 San Felipe
Suite 580A
Houston, TX 77057
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0881%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=yfBFxmJ99uvn4bhsR6KIeQ&sysid=1)_

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0881%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=yfBFxmJ99uvn4bhsR6KIeQ&sysid=1)

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: wacko
body:
Derek, I must admit I’d never heard this one before.
Stephen Colbert just called my Republican opponent “the kookiest, zaniest, conspiracy wacko this side of nutso Banana Junction.” I’m not one for name calling, but Colbert is right.
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_mha?refcode=20221002_CGVA_Hassan [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_mha?refcode=20221002_CGVA_Hassan]
Don Bolduc wants to defund the Department of Homeland Security, abolish the Department of Education, and is even open to getting rid of the FBI. That’s on top of his support for decimating Medicare and ending Social Security altogether. So yes, I think it’s fair to call this “wacko.”
Bolduc’s primary victory only raises the stakes of this race. T op Republican outside groups have doubled down on their commitment to flipping New Hampshire, and Mike Pence has already made a big fundraising trip to help bolster Bolduc.
I hope I can count on you to fight back, everyone because the last thing New Hampshire – or the United States – needs is Don Bolduc in the Senate. Please split $25 between my campaign and CommonGood right now to make sure this election denier NEVER makes it to Congress. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_mha?refcode=20221002_CGVA_Hassan]
DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_mha?refcode=20221002_CGVA_Hassan&amount=25]
DONATE $35 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_mha?refcode=20221002_CGVA_Hassan&amount=35]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_mha?refcode=20221002_CGVA_Hassan&amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_mha?refcode=20221002_CGVA_Hassan&amount=100]
DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_mha?refcode=20221002_CGVA_Hassan&amount=250]
Donate ANY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_mha?refcode=20221002_CGVA_Hassan]
Polls are tight and since we only defeated our Republican opponent by 1,017 votes in our last race, we really need all hands on deck.
Thank you.
Thank you.
With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan
(This is a sponsored send hosted by CommonGood. CommonGood is dedicated to helping Democratic campaigns and organizations win critical races in Virginia and across the country.)

Common Good Virginia
PO Box 26112
Arlington, VA 22215
If you would like to opt-out of future emails from Common Good Virginia, click unsubscribe: https://go.terrymcauliffe.com/p/kLtAki73Jk-9WaBIIAMDXQ2?unsubscribedata=yRPTgMaus6pZqz8D5NKkCMBs8YAgWs0GQKXP8kqDCTw4r9fhC6zILR3%2BzSNUKLSS8T23R5EHBCYpoqdAb1NMFvZ4IZqeueZeJX0n6Hhh%2BDAQRbfJGyCPdL%2B8bKN8Az8l%2F3WZRYn1N9MXtoenzM7H6to3uhj1d%2FoS5%2B12wtvgLj0aFwYIiTzMNfV4P0MDZ8xxOrlc0ONKAXu55Naol6RBKprVEBltFwQIhkVchcIugK1CHCcQNGJvdtraioN81PLQtGmk8agrsH%2BNwzPma2dvcZZRyzG9fgihhaSA0xkFQjG2%2BhKxwwNMIejipIUa4Dc7IA6%2BLfoJFQ1261oTVQxCwgNLKnIexF1ni5683Z%2BFLkqt6WwYU5VMM9UfQR2w58dejhhkrrkWCE10jKVd9%2B2y1UbaE%2FC1MNLoT%2B5k0IschLE%3D .

name: Andrew P. McIndoe
subject: The state of America’s energy independence
body:
Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office, and I’m sure you’ve felt the pinch at the pum
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zud7l4lpnuf6mk1mqijgtkerqomp0h9s207gcvdo_rp22sh2s8i66or1cti69oj6c9h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jmgr32t5nmepradrmeej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf9opn6mpj9p3m6ar3cc9le6om6o3ksjh7bd5immq7eclj6mr3ed34c5ir1o33c3jt4s3icgr31cj6e9q32tj0s2q6ac70mkom9pj6coojeddl61r62pjksapm2ptgmlin49fg)
| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4sj6q830c0103sctolneansiiv33o667drvvfa8_rp22sh2s8i66or1cti69oj6c9h2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative, Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office, and I’m sure you’ve felt the pinch at the pump just like the rest of your fellow Americans. There’s no doubt in my mind that our nation’s citizens are in need of relief. But instead, President Biden has throttled U.S. energy production. And he has trapped much of our nation’s vast energy reserves behind a wall of bureaucratic red tape. That’s why I’m sending you this email today. I’d like to hear how the Biden administration’s energy policies have affected you and your family.
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbqv6tbvqk51ju8rup1oqof5rm7evn3ns7vbonm0_rp22sh2s8i66or1cti69oj6c9h2bs)
---
[**Would you be willing to share your thoughts in this brief 8 question survey?**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z1f3kma6kr0718gkspugbcbbqgna2aom3u78f280_rp22sh2s8i66or1cti69oj6c9h2bs) By doing so, you will help The Heritage Foundation understand what people like you think—and use your answers to fight back against the Biden administration’s radical anti-energy agenda. The survey should only take a few minutes of your time, but your opinion is incredibly valuable. **You can get started right now using this secure link:[https://secured.heritage.org/energy-independence-survey/](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0469k6gc6l05fc8e8fb1htim8d0jrm5l9232eh0_rp22sh2s8i66or1cti69oj6c9h2bs)** Thank you so much for your time. I am truly grateful. Best, Andrew P. McIndoe
VP, Development
---

clean_body: Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office, and I’m sure you’ve felt the pinch at the pum | | | | | Dear Fellow Conservative, Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office, and I’m sure you’ve felt the pinch at the pump just like the rest of your fellow Americans. There’s no doubt in my mind that our nation’s citizens are in need of relief. But instead, President Biden has throttled U.S. energy production. And he has trapped much of our nation’s vast energy reserves behind a wall of bureaucratic red tape. That’s why I’m sending you this email today. I’d like to hear how the Biden administration’s energy policies have affected you and your family. | | By doing so, you will help The Heritage Foundation understand what people like you think—and use your answers to fight back against the Biden administration’s radical anti-energy agenda. The survey should only take a few minutes of your time, but your opinion is incredibly valuable. You can get started right now using this secure link: Thank you so much for your time. I am truly grateful. Best, Andrew P. McIndoe VP, Development | | The Heritage Foundation 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE Washington D.C. 20002 If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for American Action News, . 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

subject: thank you so much

body:
quick note from me to top supporters

Hey there – I just wanted to send a note thanking you for all your support throughout this race. Any campaign is only as strong as the team behind it — and the incredible power and resilience of this grassroots movement is why I know we can deliver a big victory for Colorado on November 8th. **I’m going to be honest with you: these next few weeks are going to be tough. We’re up against right-wing special interest groups who are determined to flip this seat, and we’re going to need to work hard to make sure we win. But I know that we can do it. ** I know that because I’ve seen the strength of our movement firsthand. I’ve seen the dedication of our volunteers, our campaign team, the passion of our supporters, and Coloradans from all walks of life. **So as we kick off this month I’m asking you to do whatever you can to help us in these final weeks. Whether it’s[making a donation](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/51810978/370398793/1236544332?refcode=email_100222_thankyou&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Njc5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxODI2NTJmZi01ZTQyLWVkMTEtYjQ5NS0wMDIyNDgzMmU0Y2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NdvLkNL8c9Tu0ViKXLU51KJO3tgEfpv7ib0-Lf3ZtJo=), [volunteering your time](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/51810979/370398794/2084203887?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Njc5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxODI2NTJmZi01ZTQyLWVkMTEtYjQ5NS0wMDIyNDgzMmU0Y2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NdvLkNL8c9Tu0ViKXLU51KJO3tgEfpv7ib0-Lf3ZtJo=&emci=e1a59722-f440-ed11-b495-00224832e4ca&emdi=182652ff-5e42-ed11-b495-00224832e4ca&ceid=25481868), or simply reminding your friends and family to [check their registration](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/51810980/370398795/-233926731?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Njc5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxODI2NTJmZi01ZTQyLWVkMTEtYjQ5NS0wMDIyNDgzMmU0Y2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NdvLkNL8c9Tu0ViKXLU51KJO3tgEfpv7ib0-Lf3ZtJo=&emci=e1a59722-f440-ed11-b495-00224832e4ca&emdi=182652ff-5e42-ed11-b495-00224832e4ca&ceid=25481868), every little bit helps. ** Thank you for all that you’ve done, and I hope you’ll continue to stand with us in these final weeks. -Jared | | [DONATE →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/51810981/370398796/1236544332?refcode=email_100222_thankyou&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Njc5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxODI2NTJmZi01ZTQyLWVkMTEtYjQ5NS0wMDIyNDgzMmU0Y2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NdvLkNL8c9Tu0ViKXLU51KJO3tgEfpv7ib0-Lf3ZtJo=)

| Hey team — **We have some tough news.** Our finance team has been crunching the numbers all weekend, but despite all of our combined efforts, unfortunately, we did not hit our September $35,000 End-of-Quarter goal. **First, we wanted to _thank every single person_ who donated to try and help us reach our goal.** We knew $35,000 was ambitious, but our teams on the ground are knocking on doors, launching major statewide online and TV advertising campaigns, and getting out the vote _every way possible._ We _know_ just who we’re up against — extremist groups who are spending millions to try and beat us, so we had to set competitive goals to give our campaigns the _absolute best shot at winning._ **But, team, we were so close — $1,185 short to be exact.** So, as we prepare for the final stretch until the midterms — basically _just one month to go,_ we’re bracing ourselves for some tough decisions ahead. _We can either cut our budget in these final days or raise the last $1,185 we planned to spend on our teams on the ground._ [**Team, will you join us with one final donation towards our EOQ goal body:
I’m concerned by what I’m seeing in New Hampshire and Republicans’ ruthless efforts to oust Democratic Senator Maggie Hassan.
| | |
---
Hi there,
I’ve long wished we lived in a time when laws were not necessary to safeguard us from inequality. But laws – and the elected officials who write them – are what determine access to the voting booth, whether someone can have a safe abortion, or how much you pay for prescription drugs.
I’m committed to electing lawmakers who believe that everyone deserves a fair shot at getting ahead and staying ahead, and I have to tell you that I’m concerned by what I’m seeing in New Hampshire and Republicans’ ruthless efforts to oust Democratic Senator Maggie Hassan.
Maggie won her last election by just 1,017 votes, and Mitch McConnell and his allies are spending over $58 million to defeat her.**[_Before I go on, can you please chip in to her reelection campaign? She won her last race because of people like you._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/51812807/370405851/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk1797-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMDdhYThlOC02MjQyLWVkMTEtYjQ5NS0wMDIyNDgzMmU0Y2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ImS5b5BO3uAQ2FO3oZdUHNqEY4noB6UTj4oaURLCDU4=)**

Let me make this clear. If Maggie Hassan _hadn’t_ won her last election, the Affordable Care Act would’ve been repealed and Republicans would currently hold the Senate majority.
There are a lot of Republicans – all in lockstep with Mitch McConnell – who will do anything to defeat her this year. They know that if they defeat Maggie, they regain control of the Senate chamber.
**No one has ever regretted getting off the sidelines, friend.** And now, with the most extreme Republican Party of my lifetime teetering on the edge of regaining power, we need all hands on deck. **[Please rush $3 or as much as you can right now to win in New Hampshire and protect the Senate majority.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/51812812/370405856/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk1797-fr-nd&recurring=0&amount=3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMDdhYThlOC02MjQyLWVkMTEtYjQ5NS0wMDIyNDgzMmU0Y2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ImS5b5BO3uAQ2FO3oZdUHNqEY4noB6UTj4oaURLCDU4=)**
Thank you,
_Barbra_

name: Jim Roberts, American Veterans Center
subject: Will you buy a beer for a veteran?
body:
The American Veterans Association (AVC) is looking for generous patriots like you to BUY A BEER FOR A VETERAN to enjoy at our 25
[View this message in your browser](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z8ihkor6tpi8k0er2ktm6ssq330co63g0f9qnq8g_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t56egn4tblm1on4t1kmepradrmeej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf3cbgc2orbcb1cljbddb6e4qbbcbh65r35cjlm1in9dr2eqob7cjj6ap61odhc3jt4s3icgr31cj6e9q32tj0s2q6ac70mkom9pj6coojeddl6upb4phmcapmadtgmlin48d245p25oh4cdhm2pr2c9gecpr24no)
| | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2znj8p0nvcgs95lghh7q76eqdn5vnbf4mq4i3igq8_rp22sh2s8i66or1cth64o76cth2bs)
---
Friend, Will you buy a beer for a veteran? The American Veterans Association (AVC) is looking for generous patriots like you to BUY A BEER FOR A VETERAN to enjoy at our **25th Annual Veterans Conference** this November ... _Can we count on you to chip-in?_ **[Thank a veteran for their service by sponsoring a part of, or all of their 25th Annual Veterans Conference experience. ](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zrhhvtnmbt6fnkoouchvinbca3f0gsek1blslbrg_rp22sh2s8i66or1cth64o76cth2bs)**
---
[**Sponsor a Veteran**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zqvea3qojv65pq2ffc35sp4u6oga3vo2a2qmgdr0_rp22sh2s8i66or1cth64o76cth2bs)
---
If you would like to thank a veteran, but cannot attend AVC’s 25th Annual Veterans Conference in person, this is an opportunity to show your appreciation ... _Simply by chipping-in to_** _BUY A BEER_** _or sponsor a_** _VETERAN_** _for the weekend! _ **Your gift today could provide:** **$10** \- Snack for a vet **$20** \- Beer for a vet **$35** \- Feed a vet for one full day **$75** \- Provide transportation for a vet **$225** \- Lodging for a vet for the conference **$675** \- Sponsor a vet’s entire conference trip
---
[**Sponsor a Veteran**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zbqi4isiib404a049ljoln8ur1npbsijl899bgt0_rp22sh2s8i66or1cth64o76cth2bs)
---
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zi9g1uac2vobeiucdjndngfcubsfhabnu8ui1hv0_rp22sh2s8i66or1cth64o76cth2bs)
---
Or, you can make a BIGGER IMPACT by sponsoring a Veteran’s room, meals and transportation ... No matter the size of your gift, **_even just a $10 SNACK, $20 BEER or MORE_ ,** you can sponsor part of a veteran’s experience at this year’s big event! **[Generous patriots like you all across the country are chipping-in $10, $20, $35, $75, $225 or more right now. Show your appreciation by sponsoring a veteran today!](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z76n43lrveo667bvcj79l8lma6f91o5d6ljupof0_rp22sh2s8i66or1cth64o76cth2bs)**
---
[**Sponsor a Veteran**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z71eiaq4qjjs9sm85qdia4msqm6qppa5d9hj7sk0_rp22sh2s8i66or1cth64o76cth2bs)
---
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zp9gii919c39poaa8khv5rr87p6dfa8jo455qm68_rp22sh2s8i66or1cth64o76cth2bs)
---
**AVC is on a mission to honor and celebrate America’s brave veterans, and to preserve and promote their legendary stories, from World War II to today. ** Sharing a beer gives veterans of all generations an opportunity to share their stories and experiences with other service members and friends in attendance, and will help to provide an enjoyable weekend for all of our heroes! Say, “Thank you for your service,” by contributing $10 or more today. **[Please make your most generous gift now. ](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zbba7599q1s9nd5hln9mu4lufo6nbi0qc3kp0ufg_rp22sh2s8i66or1cth64o76cth2bs)** Thank you, Jim Roberts Chairman & Founder American Veterans Center
---
[**Sponsor a Veteran**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z2o74c0a24n1ktmrv8oa8hl86obkrk69837piucg_rp22sh2s8i66or1cth64o76cth2bs)
---
---
|
---
---

I've just received word from my sources that operators at the **HIGHEST LEVEL** of the Democrat Party are colluding to destroy one man: **Adam Laxalt.**
**[**SAVE ADAM LAXALT**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61469279:JwfOeZVnN:m:1:3334294963:A3F17F67FDC32555D6F54661C7739EAB:r)**
---

Adam is running for the US Senate seat in Nevada - the ONE SEAT that will decide everything.

The Democrat elites know that when Adam wins in November, **they will LOSE their liberal Senate majority.** That's why they're pulling all the strings to stop him.

Fake attack ads, publishing hit pieces in their newspapers, **ALL DIRTY TRICKS** are on the table. Frankly, I've never seen anything like it.

That's why I've reached out to you today. It's up to true patriots like you to stop the Democrat cabal in their tracks before they destroy another good man.

---

Please, we have the power to stop them, but only if we act right now.

Stop what you're doing and rush help to Adam before it's too late. We won't get another chance at this.

Thank you, and God Bless.

Richard Grenell

* * *

[**That 's why I'm asking you to chip in whatever you can right now.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61469280:JwfOeZVnN:m:1:3334294963:A3F17F67FDC32555D6F54661C7739EAB:r) The fight to flip Nevada and retake the Senate majority depends on you.

Adam Laxalt

name: Kari Lake
subject: Did you see me on Tucker Carlson?
body:
| | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=7a1b80d48fcc4a9bb5fe1daa74463a03&_e=LuT4OLJdydCj0QDbaYBVHY31MBj4jQUUFLwr6gp_9wAeif4A0M2PsKmiQCyUjOJ5OlVLqdvKOgWhOTiFlpnlRKDZ_HntIDhrQ0RkMDTfgfL78Vd0WIJpIj2Dmg6KTf0DmjnW1ieHu9NIyS1505zlcPh_EliM_Gg3bS1VIE9l7D9MCQUZILxF1XEB5FlF82NqHd9EIORp7eIN6rycpBiqXt02GYiuuwaIfaC_75KqJZ0KlIfydmPXOfB54LxII_vFZb2egz0ENNqX0xaCvO_LoAMnd7otyFB7GRum2anncHo-KG5bmBUu_jHMvAt3rU5_733tqZUrdRn86AoCLi4mgJdJ3Hf972_5GicghtgRWF-qNVkAjjiSj6p3VoBLmYpFvspaHjS34OSKXBm8IoI7bQ%3D%3D)
---
| | Friend,
If you turn on the news, you've probably heard it...
The media is calling me a fascist, a racist, and a threat to Democracy.
**That's how I know I'm doing something right! **
As I discussed with Tucker Carlson recently, _if these elites are NOT calling you all of these slurs and attacking you, then you're probably not truly representing the people. _
---
[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=7a1b80d48fcc4a9bb5fe1daa74463a03&_e=LuT4OLJdydCj0QDbaYBVHY31MBj4jQUUFLwr6gp_9wAeif4A0M2PsKmiQCyUjOJ5OlVLqdvKOgWhOTiFlpnlRKDZ_HntIDhrQ0RkMDTfgfL78Vd0WIJpIj2Dmg6KTf0DmjnW1ieHu9NIyS1505zlcPh_EliM_Gg3bS1VIE9l7D9MCQUZILxF1XEB5FlF82NqHd9EIORp7eIN6rycpBiqXt02GYiuuwaIfaC_75KqJZ0KlIfydmPXOfB54LxII_vFDIqgPLuhzer2gbnaIh3C45HzNodNZrRjYkhKRsu0tH6MRoruti8ht_WWrUj5LekS-igt660Edzd_4F-SF7y6J_mFVuYDWpaS1-0ggm1x9lsDacQxYzgRZG5UEurnj6X5dNxodhUfxA87_edDAqpv0Q%3D%3D)
---
[**WATCH NOW >>**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=7a1b80d48fcc4a9bb5fe1daa74463a03&_e=LuT4OLJdydCj0QDbaYBVHY31MBj4jQUUFLwr6gp_9wAeif4A0M2PsKmiQCyUjOJ5OlVLqdvKOgWhOTiFlpnlRKDZ_HntIDhrQ0RkMDTfgfL78Vd0WIJpIj2Dmg6KTf0DmjnW1ieHu9NIyS1505zlcPh_EliM_Gg3bS1VIE9l7D9MCQUZILxF1XEB5FlF82NqHd9EIORp7eIN6rycpBiqXt02GYiuuwaIfaC_75KqJZ0KlIfydmPXOfB54LxII_vFk0SXcy4IEN5EASPMaz9nnankuoT9GhYRanx3aBAm3GTmE07xlCbwmM5Cfle1_LG7OaQlPbcE_gpQaDWmqK_vHD_wtwjWUpAC-2pkYGGlHbp6JGWRJjcdNDipOmpybBc1m_jNASq-z5EO_qGyopqKFw%3D%3D)
---
Friend, I know you've probably been called the same names if you've ever stood for strong borders, constitutional values, or mentioned you only believe in TWO genders. The left has undoubtedly tried to intimidate you and scare you into silence. _And for too long, it 's worked! _ For years, Republicans stood on the sidelines while the Radical Left waged war on our values. [**IT 'S TIME TO FIGHT BACK >> **](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=7a1b80d48fcc4a9bb5fe1daa74463a03&_e=LuT4OLJdydCj0QDbaYBVHY31MBj4jQUUFLwr6gp_9wAeif4A0M2PsKmiQCyUjOJ5OlVLqdvKOgWhOTiFlpnlRKDZ_HntIDhrQ0RkMDTfgfL78Vd0WIJpIj2Dmg6KTf0DmjnW1ieHu9NIyS1505zlcPh_EliM_Gg3bS1VIE9l7D9MCQUZILxF1XEB5FlF82NqHd9EIORp7eIN6rycpBiqXt02GYiuuwaIfaC_75KqJZ0KlIfydmPXOfB54LxII_vFaE3iamwkKrbHC1v1422JO5l_DKi79wPbflMVCSmiMi_AJbL7nbbYVdMx6jp8b7Q-pSa4AhyFUJYwcLVjPhaboieVuJKj71vDT2lQaV5JNw525Q4sJjIcLRiHSLvgnNMOW_-D8YiTXggprDV1_25Czw%3D%3D) We stayed quiet while they turned our schools into indoctrination centers. We did nothing while our border was wide open for drugs and criminals to walk into our communities. We refused to fight back when they called us the most terrible names you've ever heard. **Then real, conservative leadership came along. THE NEW RIGHT, as I like to call it. ** _We told the truth: But we cannot be afraid of the left. We can only fear what happens if we do not stand up to them._ **I won 't be silent. I'm going to fight. Because that's what we need to do to SAVE AMERICA.**

clean_body: | | | | | Friend, If you turn on the news, you've probably heard it... The media is calling me a fascist, a racist, and a threat to Democracy. That's how I know I'm doing something right! As I discussed with Tucker Carlson recently, if these elites are NOT calling you all of these slurs and attacking you, then you're probably not truly representing the people. Friend, I know you've probably been called the same names if you've ever stood for strong borders, constitutional values, or mentioned you only believe in TWO genders. The left has undoubtedly tried to intimidate you and scare you into silence. And for too long, it 's worked! For years, Republicans stood on the sidelines while the Radical Left waged war on our values. We stayed quiet while they turned our schools into indoctrination centers. We did nothing while our border was wide open for drugs and criminals to walk into our communities. We refused to fight back when they called us the most terrible names you've ever heard. Then real, conservative leadership came along. THE NEW RIGHT, as I like to call it. We told the truth: But we cannot be afraid of the left. We can only fear what happens if we do not stand up to them. I won 't be silent. I'm going to fight. Because that's what we need to do to SAVE AMERICA. It starts in Arizona. Thank you in advance for helping carry the NEW RIGHT over the finish line in Arizona in November. Sincerely, Kari Lake Candidate for Arizona Governor | | | Sent to Reclaiming American Freedom subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Andrew P. McIndoe
subject: Are the Biden administration’s energy policies affecting you?
body:
Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office | | | [](http://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=aed9cf0f39344159b345c4efa33aed0d&_e=fMFhHDm4Xao-aPK7OKEMWh3XCvksjbbWlHhRYgIPHAWsqGnDl2sQQHoN4KY_geXNY6-eHgr2cBB0JXcZj_6O6SumzShYAE_UWycvIVwB1z7EztaT5cx14TMkaEUVonD1lWaMlu61YN-0jXtcwOkJGpxWKNmnyCDzP5xTaDnNXhBBkPAV-YHgXgJpPl3u7ea0u5FUWdkzxTcDxM9E_HtC5rnyDHilmAAoq48L-0-DoTInuWL-wxxIvZd8asuy_rYGLQPrFZ1FyN0V0T_IHqQh13MEFoWK6nHgqgv1crAPze6RKRgf63QUCBwhr-MQJ2Ou1YizdiJSduTR2i7fLA_NQgOY6MiSJole1bUnZlOzvukGJX3-5z8lt0khxUvdTF6D)

Dear Fellow Conservative, Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office, and I'm sure you've felt the pinch at the pump just like the rest of your fellow Americans. There's no doubt in my mind that our nation's citizens are in need of relief. But instead, President Biden has throttled U.S. energy production. And he has trapped much of our nation's vast energy reserves behind a wall of bureaucratic red tape. That's why I'm sending you this email today. I'd like to hear how the Biden administration's energy policies have affected you and your family. [**Would you be willing to share your thoughts in this brief 8 question survey?**](http://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=aed9cf0f39344159b345c4efa33aed0d&_e=fMFhHDm4Xao-aPK7OKEMWh3XCvksjbbWlHhRYgIPHAWsqGnDl2sQQHoN4KY_geXNY6-eHgr2cBB0JXcZj_6O6SumzShYAE_UWycvIVwB1z7EztaT5cx14TMkaEUVonD1lWaMlu61YN-0jXtcwOkJGpxWKNmnyCDzP5xTaDnNXhBBkPAV-YHgXgJpPl3u7ea0u5FUWdkzxTcDxM9E_HtC5rnyDHilmAAoq48L-0-DoTKZNXhgc8ecCuf-JwfIv9UPdzteiAs4hVID77S-TpIBLLN_FH3epfQkkHEqSfIZOe5Z5xflZ155xJE_AD6bdH3M7GqkEMIYIN_oGAHv58U53i4Wo1nSFoLZ2kIVqvRbAJTA-rgydEoMmhBlnjK1pMF3) By doing so, you will help The Heritage Foundation understand what people like you think--and use your answers to fight back against the Biden administration's radical anti-energy agenda. The survey should only take a few minutes of your time, but your opinion is incredibly valuable. **You can get started right now using this secure link:[https://secured.heritage.org/energy-independence-survey/](http://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=aed9cf0f39344159b345c4efa33aed0d&_e=fMFhHDm4Xao-aPK7OKEMWh3XCvksjbbWlHhRYgIPHAWsqGnDl2sQQHoN4KY_geXNY6-eHgr2cBB0JXcZj_6O6SumzShYAE_UWycvIVwB1z7EztaT5cx14TMkaEUVonD1lWaMlu61YN-0jXtcwOkJGpxWKNmnyCDzP5xTaDnNXhBBkPAV-YHgXgJpPl3u7ea0u5FUWdkzxTcDxM9E_HtC5rnyDHilmAAoq48L-0-DoTKmzRnsX5zCoAq11EQoWNle_S_NbGyxDqnzSo8fE88ps3ZTGFR25pFAMIZzS6p_AFAvp74Fz65Kf-w32tncQ2rCDF2J16c0lb0ppS-P-M_rJ3tJNEs76QVC7A7BR4-WZhK_TKGT1ycHk5AoxwQLq_S6)** Thank you so much for your time. name: Cristen Wohlgemuth
subject: This is blatant government overreach!
body:
Michael and Chantell Sackett have been fighting for 15 years to build a home on the private property they own near Priest Lake i
[View this message in your browser](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zdbna6rspsn5cdcqmvccklrr883kubk1lqv88ou8_rp22sh2s8i66or1cth68o32c3h238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kuij791lmkp79dhk6eojacpl6er7actl6tr779hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4onkc9p79o5ic2rj9ohlmhrm1cpkc9jr1cjheip7adj1e1i69c5me3gm2c30e8pbfduie1p68dhgm9j74t1hepge1d3563gbacb4spj6cc9n6mqjfclhcoq61cr4cuobapbi4no)
| | | [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zq269samcitvmv510sd706hq1tf1490mj38ro0u8_rp22sh2s8i66or1cth68o32c3h2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend of Liberty, Michael and Chantell Sackett have been fighting for 15 years to build a home on the private property they own near Priest Lake in Bonner County, Idaho. It’s not for the usual reasons like a lack of building supplies or unresponsive contractors. It’s because the Environmental Protection Agency (EPA) declared that their land is a wetland. But here’s the kicker. The Sacketts’ land is not wet. There’s no water on it! Still, the government is going after them. And if the couple doesn’t comply with the EPA’s outlandish regulations, they could face fines up to $32,500 _per day_! The Sacketts have been dragged through the courts for years fighting for their property rights—**and yours**. Now, their case will be argued before the U.S. Supreme Court. And MSLF has lent them support in their fight against this blatant government overreach. That’s why I’m emailing you today with a special request. I’m hoping you will stand with the Sacketts and show them you support their fight by signing our petition today. If the EPA is allowed to trample the lives of private citizens like the Sacketts with no opposition, there’s no telling who could be next. But your voice today will push back against this injustice and show the government that you stand for freedom and the private property rights of every American citizen. **Please sign the petition below declaring your desire to stand against this blatant overreach by the EPA.**
* I am standing for the private property rights of Michael and Chantell Sackett.
* I am standing against unelected bureaucracies that threaten the rights of individual citizens.
* I am asking the U.S. Supreme Court to rule against the EPA’s blatant government overreach.

Please sign our petition right now at this secure link: **[https://mslegal.org/subscribe/sackett-petition/](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zc83u5i2lecl3rhisj1klau6m5rtvdt6vg3kh02o_rp22sh2s8i66or1cth68o32c3h2bs)** For Liberty! Cristen Wohlgemuth President & CEO Mountain States Legal Foundation
---

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: A historic opportunity
body:
|
---
| | From the Desk of Dr. Ben Carson: Hello, In 1973, the U.S. Supreme Court decided the case Roe v. Wade. And since that day, more than 63 million babies have been killed through abortion in our country. It was the most destructive ruling in the history of our nation. And it led to an anti-life ideology that still infects America to this day. From what I've been told, you are someone who values and respects life in all its stages, and I'm guessing this makes you sick to your stomach just like it does to me. But the tide is changing, and that's why I asked if I could send you this email today. [](http://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2b19959aafd0438e8e85cbfee79b6db1&_e=8cAyU8o3V8xS1Ya8_QToIDbSj8PZGwmGhimdSO9QtA1QPqdeM-TjDohsjhy241_S53R7lLJ6iWib4B8cnOmhwvRVN6QszJ8nPUFQUvkdvjWSE8KharGrG86QDnqSOutOiL7f4aipz7cKDNWpbyiBbqd47tlaDA7yq8n98jbNE8b2eHCSRU0EHScGV1VcO_M-bHL80tV2xRiP45mXej-jSUZBzJZxzSVBCCIlvHeFqZafSCu4kYKhQEVWBHFcRyCuy-RY-lg0-nTNTXJmh9whmvPFcsZEBW8lkrVGjJPF_PAQb56U9OLkVjkBW_TB-n0k3DepNAIqDIrBUikJfPiLk6sHbENZ5kd48u_L4o3g7KZbVjJgRxPeak3zL96wYlFK)
_Dr. Ben Carson, Founder and Chairman of American Cornerstone Institute_ The U.S. Supreme Court's decision to overturn Roe gives us a historic opportunity to rebuild a culture of life.
