name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: The most critical lawsuit for our children
body:
| | | Peter, Imagine that you've just been called into the middle school principal's office to have a "serious talk" about your daughter. You're worried -- is it her grades? Her behavior? Is she hurt? Instead, the principal tells you that your daughter -- your 12- year-old little girl -- is now your son. That behind your back, the school has been "educating" your preteen daughter \-- for months, in total secret -- about how to "transition" her gender. And they instructed her to keep it hidden from you...because you "can't be trusted." That you, her parent, are not "safe." But now, she has a new name. New pronouns. A new bathroom. And you just need to accept it. _Wouldn 't you be furious?_ I know I would be! So it's no surprise that's exactly how Jessica Konen felt when she was called into her daughter's California middle school and this nightmare played out in real life. **Now, Jessica is fighting back and suing the school district -- plus the principal and the two teachers who "groomed" her daughter -- and she needs your help to win justice in a court of law. ** [**Will you please make an urgent, tax-deductible donation to the Center for American Liberty and help us fund this lawsuit while generating a nationwide wave of support for Jessica and her daughter?**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61461845:6tG1qZVJN:m:1:3339843426:2CE306CA04B0E9FB30513BA980F16B00:r) I hope you will, because as infuriating as that story is, the details are even more outrageous. Would you believe Jessica's daughter was just eleven when she was lured by these teachers to join their so-called "Equality Club"? **_They first convinced this little girl that she was bisexual. Then, as they sunk their hooks deeper, they told her -- not long after her twelfth birthday -- that really, she was probably "transgender." _** "But don't tell your parents!" they warned. In fact, they operated the entire club under a cloak of secrecy. No permission slips were signed. No attendance was taken. No membership lists were kept. Meetings were scheduled for lunchtime -- instead of after school, like other clubs -- so parents wouldn't begin to wonder where their kids were. What were they hiding?? If you've followed the growing nationwide problem of teachers "grooming" young, confused students -- you probably know some of the predatory tactics these teachers often use to manipulate vulnerable children into believing they're "transgender" or "non-binary." This case was no exception. In fact, these two teachers even let some of their secrets slip on leaked audio from a Teachers Association conference! Discussing how they managed to target so many new recruits for their club, one of the teachers confessed: "We totally stalked what they were doing on Google." **These teachers zeroed in on confused and troubled students and -- instead of helping them -- they further filled these children 's heads with lies and more confusion. ** [**Which is why I 'm asking you to make an urgent donation of $35 or more today if you agree with our lawsuit against these teachers, the principal, and the Spreckels Union School District.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61461845:6tG1qZVJN:m:1:3339843426:2CE306CA04B0E9FB30513BA980F16B00:r) My name is Harmeet Dhillon. I'm a lawyer, and the founder of the Center for American Liberty. You may recognize me from one of my many Fox News appearances with Jessica Konen or other plaintiffs my nonprofit organization is representing in lawsuits against government officials who violate Americans' rights. Today, I'm asking you to join us in support of Jessica's case. It's clear that the defendants deprived Jessica Konen of her civil rights as a parent, that they conspired to do so, and that they inflicted emotional distress on both Jessica and her daughter. Those legal claims and more are at the heart of our lawsuit. I believe our evidence lays out a very strong case. But you must remember, this is a California school district and the defense's case will be funded by the government. And it will pay whatever it takes to defend leftist ideologies. [**That 's why, I hope you'll also consider making a generous donation of $25, $35, $50 or $100 to help fund our case. **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61461845:6tG1qZVJN:m:1:3339843426:2CE306CA04B0E9FB30513BA980F16B00:r) The Center for American Liberty is a nonprofit organization, meaning we receive no government funding -- _unlike the deep-pocketed defendants in most of our cases._ Because of this, we rely on support from generous Americans who can recognize an injustice and want to see it set right. Our nonprofit status also means your donation is tax-deductible to the fullest extent allowed by law. We've seen evidence of this type of "grooming" at schools across the country. And it's not just in places like California! Dangerous teachers like this are unfortunately in classrooms across the country. Thankfully, the tide seems to be turning against them. Earlier this year, Governor DeSantis outlawed teachers from having these sexualized conversations with their young students. And elsewhere, parents have gotten involved with their local school boards to run for office and change policies that have put radical gender ideology ahead of student safety or parental rights. Those are political solutions. **Ours is a legal one.** And I believe that, in order to fully purge this predatory behavior from our schools, we need to fight this battle on all available fronts. Won't you please help us win this fight in a court of law?**[Join the fight with a generous donation of $35 or more so the courts, the plaintiffs, the defendants -- everybody -- will know how big the nationwide movement to protect kids has grown. ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61461845:6tG1qZVJN:m:1:3339843426:2CE306CA04B0E9FB30513BA980F16B00:r)** ** ** No parent should have to endure what Jessica Konen and her daughter did, and it's up to us to use the full force of the law to make sure no teacher is allowed to get away with this again. Thank you,
---
| |
---
|
---
| | P.S. Winning this case will not only get justice for the Konen family, but also strike a blow against these dangerous school policies nationwide. **[Which is why I hope we can count on your generous tax-deductible donation of $25, $35, $50 or more to help us win this lawsuit and others like it. Thank you!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61461845:6tG1qZVJN:m:1:3339843426:2CE306CA04B0E9FB30513BA980F16B00:r) **
---
| | [**Donate Now
**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61461845:6tG1qZVJN:m:1:3339843426:2CE306CA04B0E9FB30513BA980F16B00:r)
---
| | [ ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61461845:6tG1qZVJN:m:1:3339843426:2CE306CA04B0E9FB30513BA980F16B00:r)

name: Andrew P. McIndoe
subject: We scored your state’s elections—here’s what we found
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vsMcUIzhDN

Your right to vote in a free and fair election is your most
essential civil right. Your vote is not only a civic duty, but
also how you ensure elected officials are putting your ideas and
interests ahead of their own.

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osMcUIzhDN

Dear
Fellow Conservative,

Your
right to vote in a free and fair election is your most essential
civil right.

Your vote
is not only a civic duty, but also how you ensure elected
officials are putting your ideas and interests ahead of their
own.

Voting is
how you have your say in the way your nation, your state, and
your local community are being run. And free and fair elections
are the bedrock of a functional democracy.

Unfortunately, proven instances of election fraud have been
growing across the country. And if you think things are bad now,
just imagine how bad they'll be if the people who are supposed to
protect the integrity of our elections continue to be unable (or
unwilling) to do so.

You and
every American deserve a transparent electoral system that makes
it easy to vote and hard to cheat-and we must work together to
pressure elected officials to uphold the security and fairness of
our elections right now.

If you're
worried about the fairness and security of elections in your home
state, now you can see where it currently ranks against others
with our free election integrity scorecard.

With this
free interactive map, you'll get real-time look at the election
laws and regulations of each state and the District of Columbia.
The scorecard compares 12 key metrics of security and fairness.

To find
out how fair, secure, and transparent the election laws are right
now where you live, click the link below to get your free access
to this valuable resource now:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/60849870:sMcUIzhDN:m:3:2532013465:59607A2092FB6A664672B937D49ADEF0:r

I know
election integrity is important to you, so I didn't want you to
miss it.

Regards,

Andrew P.
McIndoe
VP,
Development

P.S. This
free resource is designed to help responsible voters like you
understand where things must be improved to ensure a truly
democratic election process survives in the U.S. Click here to
access this critical Election Integrity Scorecard now »

The
Heritage Foundation 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE Washington
D.C. 20002

name: Marco (Personal)
subject: I’m desperate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
body:
It's Marco and I’m still $5,724 short of my last End of Quarter Goal before Election Day.
[View this message in your browser](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zociq036br1jk9nce714to4unr67a6b2rdruofv0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t56ej3fctmekp76t1heipnacpne4pqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65thjeli64sjncip6ctj4sdoeao9lm5j3at336lge1cthccordcblesrm2sb46dgefkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3cup78phheipm6ptmchj38o5icpge1db3c3gbac9hmkorash1k8gn48n24hhm6ob7chhm0ob0c8iv0)

|
---
| | | Friend,

It's Marco and I'm still $5,724 short of my last End of Quarter Goal before Election Day. I'm pleading with you, Friend, even if it is $12...will you give today so I can reach my extended deadline goal?

---
| [](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zpgiahubqnj7bjd3p8nbc5toh4q12qvnrmi251g8_rp22sh2s8i66or1cti66o31c1h2bs "Marco gif")
---

People think they need to write huge checks in order to make a difference but that's just not true. I need folks who can give $5, $7, $12.55 or even $18 today to reach my extended deadline goal.

In Quarter 3, my opponent ruthlessly attacked me on TV and multiple polls proved that her plan is working because we're TIED in the polls. Now, I have to file how much I raised this quarter with the FEC, **and I 'm terrified that falling short will only give my opponent the momentum she needs.**

The odds are against us, but I believe in **you** , Friend. **[Can you please send in $7 right now to defend America?](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z0ohbudnod6cb958ojoq9lf3ie807neqvivs4gi0_rp22sh2s8i66or1cti66o31c1h2bs "Can you please send in $7 right now to defend America?")**
---
| | | [SEND $7 NOW >>](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zfha00dhc9irph7rphhuhdd263l2bdsv2as3v918_rp22sh2s8i66or1cti66o31c1h2bs "SEND $7 NOW")
---
I'll reach out again soon with update numbers,

Marco

**P.S.** Only 2% of people will donate to this email. Will you be one of the few who steps up?
---
| | | | |

* * *
---
[](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z01kol2obd8tpo46u4n7isbu0hjrrd42edqjebbo_rp22sh2s8i66or1cti66o31c1h2bs "First, Democrats gained more momentum than ever after Roe v. Wade, raising a record-shattering $80M. Then, Nancy Pelosi launched a major nationwide fundraising operation to defeat Marco Rubio. Now, Marco's falling millions of dollars behind Nancy Pelosi.") This is no joke. **My opponent already votes with Nancy Pelosi 100% of the time,** and now that they are actively campaigning together, I'm starting to get nervous.

I'm starting to get nervous because I am one of the most vulnerable Republicans up for re-election this November and Pelosi knows that if the Dems defeat me, they will have full access to pass their liberal agenda.

**The Filibuster will be abolished.

Speech will be censored.**

**And conservatives will be silenced.**
| | [HELP MARCO DEFEAT PELOSI >>](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z9fc8ede9s4aqalq09hae1hkkabn3nlsqdg94k08_rp22sh2s8i66or1cti66o31c1h2bs "Help Marco Defeat Pelosi")
---

What you decide to do in the next 30 seconds could very well change the course of American history. If I lose, it will be a nightmare for conservative values.

**[So please, can you chip in $5 to help me fight back against Pelosi, the entire Democrat establishment, and their new MASSIVE warchest of cash?](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zstbi947csfhplps1a47t8gc85m5k1ep19ee3rog_rp22sh2s8i66or1cti66o31c1h2bs "So please, can you chip in $5 to help me fight back against Pelosi, the entire Democrat establishment, and their new MASSIVE warchest of cash?")**
| | | [](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zld19d7lkn3shjfl6s2u3nd2n3idhot3pnt4m2r8_rp22sh2s8i66or1cti66o31c1h2bs "Countdown to Election Day")
---

Hey it's Marco and I just checked my watch - **we 're running out of time.**

I just don't know what to do. I keep asking myself, _" Is it even worth reaching out to them again?"_

I know you get a lot of these, and I know it can be overwhelming looking at all the requests. But if you respond to just 1 today, please, make it this one. I am being outraised 3 to 1, and polls are tied. They're saying this may be my closest race yet. **They 're saying I'm in the fight of my life.**

So, I'm humbly coming to you - hat in hand - asking one last time: **[Will you please send in just $17 to help me get our country back on track and prospering again?](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zoo0io22ct5dttlpqbu2l36lhv9ncs7h44sfvff8_rp22sh2s8i66or1cti66o31c1h2bs "Will you please send in just $17 to help me get our country back on track and prospering again?")**
| | **[SEND $17](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z0oh5hb5g9gfip4ed4imhhc5ik5usabd9pvgit3o_rp22sh2s8i66or1cti66o31c1h2bs "SEND $17")**
---

| Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
---

Miami, FL 33153
[Privacy Policy](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z0phjk2ek1vij0q26phat6p20t2p3sah8fl84jdg_rp22sh2s8i66or1cti66o31c1h2bs)

Team MTO

She's up for re-election in 2022, and we need to start building our grassroots movement to keep her seat safe. **Help Maggie protect our elections system and create a stronger democracy! In two days, everyone will be able to see how much support Maggie earned for making our elections accurate, transparent, and accessible. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | | = | = | | = | = | | = If Maggie falls behind, her opponent will have a chance to pull ahead – putting the vote of every New Mexican in jeopardy. Let’s show them that we won’t let that happen. If you’ve been waiting to donate, now is when you can make the most impact. Use this link to rush any amount before midnight tomorrow → = Forward, Team MTO Maggie Toulouse Oliver serves the state of New Mexico as Secretary of State, where she is dedicated to fighting for clean and fair elections devoid of dark money and outside influence. She's up for re-election in 2022, and we need to start building our grassroots movement to keep her seat safe. Help Maggie protect our elections system and create a stronger democracy! body:
Gov. Lujan Grisham is hard at work building a brighter future for New Mexico
| | |
---
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/51816528/370420210/-1540418300?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1539-ot-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOWFlMmFmYi02YjQyLWVkMTEtYjQ5NS0wMDIyNDgzMmU0Y2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DqEfFFcNQAgCKUpF1VWgAuHgQGiTbqKTIk0ABOkvxW0=)
_Hey there, Peter! Gov. Lujan Grisham is hard at work building a brighter future for New Mexico, and our team is putting in the elbow grease to keep our state blue. Keep scrolling for critical updates on our race!
– Team MLG_
|
---
**Debate Update**
After a stellar performance in last week’s debate, Gov. Lujan Grisham is gearing up for round two! She’s scheduled to face off against her GOP opponent Wednesday, Oct. 12 – and if we’re going to be ready for his next onslaught of attacks, we need all the help we can get. [**Join this people-powered movement and chip in $5 now to help us spread the truth about the GOP's far-right agenda.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/51816529/370420211/-1540418300?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk1539-ot-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOWFlMmFmYi02YjQyLWVkMTEtYjQ5NS0wMDIyNDgzMmU0Y2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DqEfFFcNQAgCKUpF1VWgAuHgQGiTbqKTIk0ABOkvxW0=)
|
---
**Supporting Educators**
Gov. Lujan Grisham raised pay for educators, and it’s paying off in the classroom. A new report found that over 300 new teachers are now working in New Mexico schools this year. With the semester in full swing, those additional teachers make a big difference in providing students with the best possible education.

Additionally, Gov. Lujan Grisham signed an executive order to streamline paperwork for educators – saving teachers about 3,500 hours per year.**That means more time spent on lesson plans and in the classroom – educating our state’s next generation of leaders.**
|
---
**Voter Outreach**
With Election Day right around the corner, Team MLG is ramping up our efforts to get out the vote. We're running phone banks, knocking on doors, and spreading the word about the Governor's agenda to keep New Mexico blue. We're so grateful to have a huge network of grassroots supporters on this team. [**If you are a New Mexico resident who would like to volunteer to elect Democrats down the ballot this November, please follow this link to join our team.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/51816530/370420212/-1262296065?refcode=jtk1539-ot-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOWFlMmFmYi02YjQyLWVkMTEtYjQ5NS0wMDIyNDgzMmU0Y2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DqEfFFcNQAgCKUpF1VWgAuHgQGiTbqKTIk0ABOkvxW0=&emci=699d0b0d-e940-ed11-b495-00224832e4ca&emdi=39ae2afb-6b42-ed11-b495-00224832e4ca&ceid=24265352)
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/51816531/370420213/-1262296065?refcode=jtk1539-ot-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOWFlMmFmYi02YjQyLWVkMTEtYjQ5NS0wMDIyNDgzMmU0Y2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DqEfFFcNQAgCKUpF1VWgAuHgQGiTbqKTIk0ABOkvxW0=&emci=699d0b0d-e940-ed11-b495-00224832e4ca&emdi=39ae2afb-6b42-ed11-b495-00224832e4ca&ceid=24265352)
|
---
**Team MLG Merchandise**
Are you ready to rep Team MLG? From bumper stickers to coffee mugs to yard signs, our online store is packed with campaign merchandise. Stepping out in these snazzy Team MLG items will help us spread the word to keep New Mexico blue – and support our campaign in the process. **[Check out our online store by following this link.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/51816532/370420214/-1074086322?refcode=jtk1539-ot-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOWFlMmFmYi02YjQyLWVkMTEtYjQ5NS0wMDIyNDgzMmU0Y2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DqEfFFcNQAgCKUpF1VWgAuHgQGiTbqKTIk0ABOkvxW0=&emci=699d0b0d-e940-ed11-b495-00224832e4ca&emdi=39ae2afb-6b42-ed11-b495-00224832e4ca&ceid=24265352)**
|
---
**Follow Us on Social Media**
Follow us at [**@Michelle4NM**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/51816533/370420215/-2133875671?refcode=jtk1539-ot-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOWFlMmFmYi02YjQyLWVkMTEtYjQ5NS0wMDIyNDgzMmU0Y2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DqEfFFcNQAgCKUpF1VWgAuHgQGiTbqKTIk0ABOkvxW0=&emci=699d0b0d-e940-ed11-b495-00224832e4ca&emdi=39ae2afb-6b42-ed11-b495-00224832e4ca&ceid=24265352) on Twitter, [**@michellelujangrisham**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/51816534/370420216/1312126551?refcode=jtk1539-ot-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOWFlMmFmYi02YjQyLWVkMTEtYjQ5NS0wMDIyNDgzMmU0Y2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DqEfFFcNQAgCKUpF1VWgAuHgQGiTbqKTIk0ABOkvxW0=&emci=699d0b0d-e940-ed11-b495-00224832e4ca&emdi=39ae2afb-6b42-ed11-b495-00224832e4ca&ceid=24265352)** ** on Instagram, or [**Michelle Lujan Grisham**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/51816535/370420217/-1190876960?refcode=jtk1539-ot-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOWFlMmFmYi02YjQyLWVkMTEtYjQ5NS0wMDIyNDgzMmU0Y2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DqEfFFcNQAgCKUpF1VWgAuHgQGiTbqKTIk0ABOkvxW0=&emci=699d0b0d-e940-ed11-b495-00224832e4ca&emdi=39ae2afb-6b42-ed11-b495-00224832e4ca&ceid=24265352) on Facebook to stay in the loop on the latest from our team.
|
---
**Looking Ahead**
Mark your calendars! Later this month, we’ll be celebrating Gov. Lujan Grisham’s birthday. You can look forward to our next newsletter for exciting updates on the surprise we’ve got in store!
|
---
_Thanks for supporting Gov. Lujan Grisham's vision for New Mexico.

– Team MLG_
Gov. Lujan Grisham is a 12th-generation New Mexican who has dedicated her life to public service. She became the first elected Democratic Hispanic woman to serve as a U.S. Governor in 2019 – and she has been taking bold action to preserve our climate, expand access to education, and safeguard reproductive freedoms ever since. Now, she’s running for reelection to continue building a brighter future for our state. | [Donate Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/51816536/370420218/-1540418300?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1539-ot-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOWFlMmFmYi02YjQyLWVkMTEtYjQ5NS0wMDIyNDgzMmU0Y2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DqEfFFcNQAgCKUpF1VWgAuHgQGiTbqKTIk0ABOkvxW0=)

We're running phone banks, knocking on doors, and spreading the word about the Governor's agenda to keep New Mexico blue. We're so grateful to have a huge network of grassroots supporters on this team. | Team MLG Merchandise Are you ready to rep Team MLG? From bumper stickers to coffee mugs to yard signs, our online store is packed with campaign merchandise. Stepping out in these snazzy Team MLG items will help us spread the word to keep New Mexico blue – and support our campaign in the process. | Follow Us on Social Media Follow us at on Twitter, on Instagram, or on Facebook to stay in the loop on the latest from our team. | Looking Ahead Mark your calendars! Later this month, we’ll be celebrating Gov. Lujan Grisham’s birthday. You can look forward to our next newsletter for exciting updates on the surprise we’ve got in store! | Thanks for supporting Gov. Lujan Grisham's vision for New Mexico. – Team MLG Gov. Lujan Grisham is a 12th-generation New Mexican who has dedicated her life to public service. She became the first elected Democratic Hispanic woman to serve as a U.S. Governor in 2019 – and she has been taking bold action to preserve our climate, expand access to education, and safeguard reproductive freedoms ever since. Now, she’s running for reelection to continue building a brighter future for our state. | = = | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. | | Paid for by New Mexicans for Michelle, John Wertheim, Treasurer Contributions or gifts to New Mexicans for Michelle are not deductible for income tax purposes. Individuals and political action committees may contribute up to $10,400 per election. New Mexicans for Michelle may not accept contributions from foreign nationals, banks, or contributions made in the name of another. Contributions can be mailed to the following address: P.O. Box 25422 Albuquerque, NM 87125

In September of 2017, Supreme Court Justice Amy Coney Barrett sat before members of the U.S. Senate to answer questions. She was being considered for a seat on the 7th Circuit Court of Appeals. During the hearing, Democratic Senator Dianne Feinstein of California raised concerns over Barrett’s Catholic faith. Specifically, the senator explained that she had an ‘uncomfortable feeling’ that the now Supreme Court Justice would not be able to separate her ‘dogma’ from the law she would be charged with upholding. READ MORE](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zpllp5jdf9kgftm47n5p1m8jtib2t7q88nj9jp40_rp22sh2s8i66or1cth66ob4clh2bs)

Rep. Walorski was a key ally to President Biden in his push to end hunger in the U.S. by 2030. Rep. Jackie Walorski and two of her staff members were killed in a car accident in August. name: Sen. Raphael Warnock
subject: What my parents taught me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
Friend: I wasn't born with a silver spoon in my mouth
| | |
---
Friend: I wasn't born with a silver spoon in my mouth – not even close.
I grew up in public homes on the west side of Savannah, Georgia. I had 11 brothers and sisters – and while my family was short on money, we were long on love and faith.
My parents showed me the meaning of hard work – and always told us kids we could do anything we put our minds to. Thanks to their support, I became the first in my family to earn a college degree. Now, thanks to this grassroots team, I'm fighting in the Senate to make sure every child can achieve their American dream.
**But I'll be honest: With _NPR_ calling me the most vulnerable Democrat up for reelection, the only way I can keep this seat blue and win our critical fight for justice is with your help.** **[So I’m personally asking, friend: Will you donate $5 or more right now to help me defend my seat, keep the Senate blue, and secure a better, brighter future for Georgia and our country?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/51800994/370359389/-598064402?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk4114-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NjI2NTY3NS00YTQyLWVkMTEtYjQ5NS0wMDIyNDgzMmU0Y2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FCoDXUXfn-isXoh5w3SZyUbKpNAv_0bJAvq9dWTfBxo=)**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/51800995/370359390/-598064402?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk4114-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NjI2NTY3NS00YTQyLWVkMTEtYjQ5NS0wMDIyNDgzMmU0Y2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FCoDXUXfn-isXoh5w3SZyUbKpNAv_0bJAvq9dWTfBxo=)
Thank you for being a part of this movement. I'm honored to have your support.
– Sen. Raphael Warnock

But I'll be honest: With NPR calling me the most vulnerable Democrat up for reelection, the only way I can keep this seat blue and win our critical fight for justice is with your help. = = Thank you for being a part of this movement. I'm honored to have your support. – Sen. Raphael Warnock | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. For your reference, any donor history or identification in this message reflects what we have on file for the email address [dpwillis67@gmail.com] to which this message was sent. If you have donated from another address or via another method, many thanks for supporting our historic campaign for Senate! | | © 2022 | Paid for by Warnock for Georgia. Title and affiliation are provided for identification purposes only. Warnock for Georgia PO Box 52227 Atlanta, GA 30355 United States

| Statement From Senate Republican Leader Rob Ortt On Lifting of Travel Restriction at Canadian Border Starting 10/1
---
The lifting of burdensome travel requirements at the Canadian border is long overdue and welcome news, particularly for our border communities that have suffered economically for more than two years.
New Yorkers saw the freedom to connect and gather with family and friends suppressed during the pandemic - a freedom that should never again be in the hands of an overbearing government.
I have been calling for the travel restrictions to be removed for months, because our economy in Western New York is directly correlated with a strong relationship with our Canadian neighbors.
This is great news for the economy and tourism in Western New York, and I am thankful to my partners in government at all levels who worked together to get this done.

| Statement From Senate Republican Leader Rob Ortt On The NYS DOL Commissioner's Decision to Accept the OT Threshold Reduction Mandate
---
| "Today's decision by the New York State Department of Labor Commissioner is the wrong one. By approving this recommendation from a board composed of unelected bureaucrats, this mandate will devastate family farms still reeling from the pandemic.
It is clear Albany's one-party ruling class doesn't care about family farms and seems hell-bent on destroying agriculture in New York State.
This is nothing short of a scheduled collapse of New York's agricultural industry."

name: Andrew P. McIndoe
subject: Share your thoughts on American energy independence
body:
Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office, and I’m sure you’ve felt the pinch at the pump just like the rest of yo | | | [](http://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=29c9868bf2404288a2d2a04e7f8ad0c1&_e=sUdC-AyhCM6m8E2EgL-88_YZ8xakeRLD31Zz2pefEVEO3WO7hlt7FJAG4ADgkfYwE3Q_lkRg4TyukU1lMShbxOyANg-1SdITCx03WVFTpY2zPlk0roifMije5SXaM06EBHbwKVrWtZWds_tXBYAmKH1tWQtM9eEwHvPf5EKI2lfhJn3tsMQYOEcmKT5m4P8QEivCk2gDr4ErFiPLl-baonNXin1DFOkN57mYSLrRxJAXLerglIQqVMxhQNxy8ZHQRDVgWlLLyLHC2w7r3vIaonpupuXCmBMBw9sUyfTP8UboIFOtmC5mhBgMuYJRnFca3yMS6oelpKNwsT9bQ9AhKTbtMSG_QVMXEHIIIvGXGtkfw5gdimyn_81Mm1MW-KzO)
---
Dear Fellow Conservative, Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office, and I'm sure you've felt the pinch at the pump just like the rest of your fellow Americans. There's no doubt in my mind that our nation's citizens are in need of relief. But instead, President Biden has throttled U.S. energy production. And he has trapped much of our nation's vast energy reserves behind a wall of bureaucratic red tape. That's why I'm sending you this email today. I'd like to hear how the Biden administration's energy policies have affected you and your family. [**Would you be willing to share your thoughts in this brief 8 question survey?**](http://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=29c9868bf2404288a2d2a04e7f8ad0c1&_e=sUdC-AyhCM6m8E2EgL-88_YZ8xakeRLD31Zz2pefEVEO3WO7hlt7FJAG4ADgkfYwE3Q_lkRg4TyukU1lMShbxOyANg-1SdITCx03WVFTpY2zPlk0roifMije5SXaM06EBHbwKVrWtZWds_tXBYAmKH1tWQtM9eEwHvPf5EKI2lfhJn3tsMQYOEcmKT5m4P8QEivCk2gDr4ErFiPLl-baonNXin1DFOkN57mYSLrRxJChdz74c2KINr8hS6GG0CzrpOLkebeJZmg4kEf0zpevBxPcV_pcT0ah-ERbZC3X2Qdv1m92Ev3TCZ2sPzhJq5kkXvpCUVA4OrE7x7N57fitSUsMAWYp8ciBhi1z39Z3JNdLxRn5FjymfMPEMGFR2ci2) By doing so, you will help The Heritage Foundation understand what people like you think--and use your answers to fight back against the Biden administration's radical anti-energy agenda. The survey should only take a few minutes of your time, but your opinion is incredibly valuable. **You can get started right now using this secure link:[https://secured.heritage.org/energy-independence-survey/](http://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=29c9868bf2404288a2d2a04e7f8ad0c1&_e=sUdC-AyhCM6m8E2EgL-88_YZ8xakeRLD31Zz2pefEVEO3WO7hlt7FJAG4ADgkfYwE3Q_lkRg4TyukU1lMShbxOyANg-1SdITCx03WVFTpY2zPlk0roifMije5SXaM06EBHbwKVrWtZWds_tXBYAmKH1tWQtM9eEwHvPf5EKI2lfhJn3tsMQYOEcmKT5m4P8QEivCk2gDr4ErFiPLl-baonNXin1DFOkN57mYSLrRxJB-e1STtz8LFNH075PeiZIeShSCW7-zmILZenrW_WsH-airlClNYTHHi7lfeROfEbQ-b35kqLiTY11gpRQKn2ENdsYgAqyndqEMKnS9qtldAQ1kI-uWqv9Q99lQSL7-qxd5gHaycnwL-cc-hoTabEH6)** Thank you so much for your time. I am truly grateful. Best, Andrew P. McIndoe
VP, Development

subject: Share your thoughts on American energy independence
body:
Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office | | | [](http://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e2cfba849634496aa0a3770a69f3e58f&_e=7w1YEjMj7GBjoQci2rjcO7OZ6Aa_WspD85Hf2k14A-pCZCqX9EFeAvqV2husdfZhOTtzuOp3gDP1nNn-eZkcfrVZ19xfmxHnBSaExHIBp67qMaV7xycZD2P-etsfRdGWPkVAuihawfzvxlUn4Lhp834GrL48Jx9Ol2WUrYOcaM0bEPHd6oxJ-kIW1_XIdgUukNRZkVT7LUqBf8E1MPLP9_vsWtIa_o9Q_UzvfZ_b2QXTb8FIc4IAmaMco7KJANokuaKv4fzLEkb2E6NUnuTVvc8YFSA-hUiQ21f0OfmF-DoBnAGuJe-r6d94M08FXm2P4ML0Vyoybx152pn1rA-dCo4JQsXiZ3ux9SQ1K3DBn84taP_T-lCwGa4N_lKSVhK8)

Dear Fellow Conservative, Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office, and I'm sure you've felt the pinch at the pump just like the rest of your fellow Americans. There's no doubt in my mind that our nation's citizens are in need of relief. But instead, President Biden has throttled U.S. energy production. And he has trapped much of our nation's vast energy reserves behind a wall of bureaucratic red tape. That's why I'm sending you this email today. name: Tiffany Smiley
subject: My story in pictures
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Smiley for Washington, Inc
body:
I wanted to share these special moments with you. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6485%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=YK3xEupS8S2PpT%2fNHwBENg&sysid=1)
I wanted to share these special moments with you.

| |
---
| | | Friend,

My name is Tiffany Smiley and I wanted to tell you a little bit about myself and why I’m running for the U.S. Senate in Washington.

I grew up in Pasco, Washington where I helped out on my family’s farm and learned the value of hard work.

---
| [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c76061%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=8vwlXVW9BWTJ%2be9KIViW7A&sysid=1 "I helped out on my family’s farm and learned the value of hard work.")
---

I went on to play soccer at Whitworth College, where I also studied to become a nurse so I could pursue my passion of helping others in need.

---
| [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c76062%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2fSG2uW74bX5Jpwjb4MyVIA&sysid=1 "I went on to play soccer at Whitworth College")
---

I married my high school sweetheart Scotty, who went on to serve our country in the United States Army while I started my nursing career.

---
| [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c76063%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=o3CjD7b3QT2ZX317weLuTQ&sysid=1 "I married my high school sweetheart Scotty")
---

In 2005, I received a call that changed both our lives forever, Scotty was severely wounded by a suicide bomber in Iraq, causing him to fall into a coma and permanently lose sight in both of his eyes.

I immediately booked a flight for Walter Reed Medical Center to be by Scotty’s side.

---
| [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c76064%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=c%2bskoWYSfkCgkcidEam28Q&sysid=1 "Scotty was severely wounded by a suicide bomber in Iraq")
---

When I arrived, Scotty was still in trauma care, and I was informed that he would never be able to serve his nation again in uniform. They even asked me to sign a document, right there on the spot, consenting to Scotty’s immediate discharge from the Army.
_**I refused. **_
Since that day I've made it my mission to ensure Scotty, and every veteran gets the benefits and care they earned.

---
| [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c76075%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=aNuc%2bqh%2bV1nLtS8YIdBDng&sysid=1 "Since that day I've made it my mission to ensure Scotty, and every veteran
gets the benefits and care they earned.")
---

Scotty went on to serve as America’s first blind active-duty Army officer, breaking barriers for many who followed along the way.

---
| [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c76076%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=9sxksbhdzgW4bIbWR%2fzf%2bw&sysid=1 "Scotty went on to serve as America’s first blind active-duty Army officer,
breaking barriers for many who followed along the way. ")
---

It’s not every day you hear about American women going up against the U.S. Military. But we defied the government in a big way--_and won._

We stood up to a broken bureaucracy because it was the right thing to do. I will always stand up for our heroes and continue being an advocate for our veterans in the U.S. Senate.

---
| [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c76077%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=4PwxC0CAXz1EDdxXQ%2flC1w&sysid=1 "I will always stand up for our heroes and continue being an advocate for
our veterans in the U.S. Senate.")
---

In 2007, we welcomed our first child. While Scotty will never be able to ‘see’ our children’s faces, he’s always been an incredible father and hero to our boys.

---
| [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c76078%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=oJkviUJKRFQDnHoOEpudjQ&sysid=1 "In 2007, we welcomed our first child.")
---

Now, our family is taking on a new challenge. I'm running for US Senate to help families across the country achieve the American Dream and save our country from Joe Biden and Patty Murray.

I will take the same fight and optimistic spirit I’ve shown throughout my life to help Washington families secure a better life. I believe that now, more than ever, Washingtonians need a voice to find solutions to their unique problems and end the partisan gridlock in Congress.

---
| [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c76079%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Z88bTijiB6kTMewSn4kMVA&sysid=1 "Washingtonians need a voice to find solutions to their unique problems and
end the partisan gridlock in Congress.")
---

My family began this journey in the halls of Walter Reed and we look forward to continuing this journey in the halls of the United States Capitol.

I would love for the next photo in this story to be us winning this race with my family by my side.

We can’t do that, however, without your help, friend. _**[So please, can you chip in just a few bucks to help us keep up the momentum we’ve achieved so far.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c76070%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=5oO86%2feuCIiUxDESGduuIw&sysid=1 "So please, can you chip in just a few bucks
to help us keep up the momentum we’ve achieved so far. ")**_

---
| | | [KEEP TIFFANY IN THE FIGHT](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c76071%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Pv%2fWKb8WScn0U08Rot9w5w&sysid=1 "KEEP TIFFANY IN THE FIGHT")
---
| | | [STAND UP FOR AMERICA](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c76072%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Fx8Nig%2fqyVmC5PBUM7BBfQ&sysid=1 "STAND UP FOR AMERICA")
---

I know with your support we can win this.

Sincerely,

Tiffany Smiley

---
| |

---
* * *
---
| [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c76073%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=wfYuCbupRyvREzEqyXonFQ&sysid=1 "All Eyes On Washington")
---
Hey, it’s Tiffany Smiley.

The Washington Senate race is now the #1 battleground race in the COUNTRY!

Needless to say, all eyes are on us. We are in the FINAL DAYS until the November election, and Patty Murray is flooding millions into our state.

We are in an uphill battle, and I can’t make it up to the top without you. Not just Washingtonians, but all Americans deserve a real leader with real solutions. Together, we can ensure that the American Dream is not lost.

_**[Rush support now to be a part of history](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c76074%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=1GXEcIYfhNO4ucUjkmLSEg&sysid=1 "Rush support now to be a part of
history")**_.

Let’s raise money and WIN,

Tiffany Smiley

---
| | | [JOIN TEAM SMILEY](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c76085%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=rLGz6xIBYJ5COBcbeD00NQ&sysid=1 "JOIN TEAM SMILEY")
---
| [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c76086%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=70mY5oAPXKTPsE4a%2fj1p8A&sysid=1 "Alert!")
---

Team Smiley here with a RED ALERT!

You know we don't often beg, plead, or panic, but Tiffany is facing a key deadline, and we're OUT of time.

Whether or not you choose to act will decide the outcome of the Washington U.S. Senate Election:

Tiffany is currently being outraised and outspent by her 30-year incumbent opponent. We need all hands on deck to turn things around TODAY.

There's no time to wait on the sidelines.

_**[That's why we're HUMBLY asking for your help in the next 15 minutes!](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c76087%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=EXnYof5fBYofLJrIbR5aKw&sysid=1 "That's why we're HUMBLY asking for your help
in the next 15 minutes!")**_

This is our only chance to make history and restore a brighter future for Washington and all of America. We need Tiffany Smiley in the U.S. Senate, plain and simple.

Our team doesn't want to have to deliver bad news to Tiffany later today, so we're calling on our grassroots team, including YOU, to help increase our momentum!

Tiffany is a veterans' advocate and mother of 3! She is the new, fresh leadership we desperately need in Washington! Tiffany will be your #1 supporter in the U.S. Senate.

We're out of time. There's nowhere else to turn. Tiffany needs us at this moment. _**[Step up now!](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c76088%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=VuYAO4EiODmEgzpKwq6%2feg&sysid=1 "Step up now!")**_

---
|
---
---

**_Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Army or Department of Defense._**
---
| Paid for by Smiley for Washington, Inc.
---

PO Box 1058
Richland, WA, 99352

[Privacy Policy](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c76089%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Br%2fCZ460wAMgtIZ2a1XtOQ&sysid=1)

_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6485%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=YK3xEupS8S2PpT%2fNHwBENg&sysid=1)_

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6485%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=YK3xEupS8S2PpT%2fNHwBENg&sysid=1)

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: They defaced Max Rose’s campaign signs with swastikas, even though he’s a veteran who served to defend their freedoms. Lets respond by supporting the best of America, and our democracy, by standing with Max Rose and his campaign.
body:
Thank you for upholding democratic values
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| | | | | _Peter,_ **_We can’t get over this story...They drew a swastika on his campaign sign in Staten Island. _** **_And as former Congressman Max Rose--running again for the seat he held and barely lost in 2020---pointed out in his response, it's a simple message: They want him dead. They want his two-yr old son dead. Jews aren't to exist in their world._** [**Please join Blue Amp Action in supporting Max Rose with $2, $5, $10 or whatever you can afford. Because if those Nazi symbols could speak, they'd remind us they're quite literally the death of democracy. That is on the ballot.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T70591b99-0822-45cb-ac7e-378e393fffc6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) No matter if it's South Carolina or Staten Island, the former where parishoners were murdered just for the color of their skin in Emmanuel AME Church, or in Staten Island, where Rose is being threatened with death just for running for office. For existing. This veteran, former Congressman, American patriot will not back down. Rose will fight for our country, our democracy, as he's done before. A patriot, unlike Republican Congresswoman Malliotakis, who after her party's base laid siege to our Capitol, murdering Capitol Police because of her party's rhetoric, had the gall to vote to reject electoral votes and overthrow our 200 yr old democracy.
---
|
---
| | | | | | [DONATE NOW](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te9baab6f-95b2-4653-a2e9-555fe78fbdb9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| **_Malliotakis giddily joins in ripping away basic freedoms women had for a half century, supporting the Dobbs decision and voting against codifying Roe into law. She even voted to allow the government to ban birth control. YES, MALLIOTAKIS WOULD BAN BIRTH CONTROL. _** **_We have a simple choice. Max Rose, a public servant in both our military and halls of Congress, who fought for our democracy, or Malliotakis, who voted to toss its electoral votes--TO OVERTHROW IT. Do we want Rose? Or the swastikas with which Malliotakis' fascist friends threaten Max Rose and anyone they deem "different?"_** **__This seat could determine who controls The House. Even more than that,_ _it's a question of whether we'll let the swastikas win.__** [**Please join Blue Amp Action in supporting Max Rose with $2, $5, $10 or whatever you can afford. Because if those Nazi symbols could speak, they'd remind us they're quite literally the death of democracy. That is on the ballot.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tcc576baa-9d5b-441b-9ed8-659e1d8ae5cd/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **_Thank you for all you have done, and will do, to not let the swastikas win._** Cliff

clean_body: Thank you for upholding democratic values | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Peter, We can’t get over this story...They drew a swastika on his campaign sign in Staten Island. And as former Congressman Max Rose--running again for the seat he held and barely lost in 2020---pointed out in his response, it's a simple message: They want him dead. They want his two-yr old son dead. Jews aren't to exist in their world. No matter if it's South Carolina or Staten Island, the former where parishoners were murdered just for the color of their skin in Emmanuel AME Church, or in Staten Island, where Rose is being threatened with death just for running for office. For existing. This veteran, former Congressman, American patriot will not back down. Rose will fight for our country, our democracy, as he's done before. A patriot, unlike Republican Congresswoman Malliotakis, who after her party's base laid siege to our Capitol, murdering Capitol Police because of her party's rhetoric, had the gall to vote to reject electoral votes and overthrow our 200 yr old democracy. | | | | | | | | Malliotakis giddily joins in ripping away basic freedoms women had for a half century, supporting the Dobbs decision and voting against codifying Roe into law. She even voted to allow the government to ban birth control. YES, MALLIOTAKIS WOULD BAN BIRTH CONTROL. We have a simple choice. Max Rose, a public servant in both our military and halls of Congress, who fought for our democracy, or Malliotakis, who voted to toss its electoral votes--TO OVERTHROW IT. Do we want Rose? Or the swastikas with which Malliotakis' fascist friends threaten Max Rose and anyone they deem "different?" This seat could determine who controls The House. Even more than that, it's a question of whether we'll let the swastikas win. Thank you for all you have done, and will do, to not let the swastikas win. name: Ryan Zinke - Navy SEAL
subject: Closing the curtains on my campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Zinke for Congress
body:
If you would prefer not to receive future emails, visit here.
I'm at my wits' end, Peter. Pelosi and the Democrats just have too much power, too many connections, and too much in their fundraising war chest. At this point, if I don't do a total 180 on the fundraising front, not only will my race be in danger, **_but Republicans may never win another race this year._** **Peter, this is Ryan Zinke. I served as President Trump 's Secretary of the Interior and I was the commander at SEAL Team 6.** **I 'm also running for Congress in the most critical race in the nation. I will never give up on this race, I will never back down - because Navy SEALs never quit.** But if Pelosi can destroy me in this race, I can guarantee you no other Republican will have a chance. **I have Trump 's endorsement, I lead the team of Navy SEAL's running for Congress, and I have more battle experience than anyone else.** [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61464887:6VZMUZVPN:m:1:3317145305:BECEE524BE7C3BACAB81C2B2095E0C81:r) The point is, Peter, I'm the toughest Republican running for office. If I can't beat Pelosi - no one can. So, I'm going to be blunt with you. [**If you chip in just $25 right now**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61464887:6VZMUZVPN:m:1:3317145305:BECEE524BE7C3BACAB81C2B2095E0C81:r), I can promise you that we will blow my fundraising goal out of the water and ruin Pelosi's plan to destroy our nation. I'm humbly asking you, as a warrior who's fought for this nation for my entire life, will you help me out? [**DONATE TODAY**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61464887:6VZMUZVPN:m:1:3317145305:BECEE524BE7C3BACAB81C2B2095E0C81:r) You have my word, as a former Navy SEAL and commander at SEAL Team 6, if you help me out, I will return the favor in Congress. Thank you for your support, Ryan Zinke [**DONATE TODAY**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61464887:6VZMUZVPN:m:1:3317145305:BECEE524BE7C3BACAB81C2B2095E0C81:r)

Peter, Jim Jordan here. I'll keep this huddle brief.

President Trump called on us to take back the House- but if we miss another critical fundraising deadline _we are going to fail.

The Left is out raising and outspending us. Pelosi's cronies are raking in huge sums of cash and spending it in some of our most competitive battleground districts to ensure our America-First candidates drown.

I'm only sending this Hail Mary to the most loyal Pro-Trump patriots because I know you won't let us down. This is your _last chance_ to help House Republicans make it to the endzone.

**It 's game over without you.**

It's all up to you. If you ignore our pleas and drop the ball, then our chances of winning are gone.

Can you rush $25 by midnight to help us take back the House and fire Nancy Pelosi?

body:
Pennsylvania’s 17th District is one of the most competitive races in the country, and Chris Deluzio is only one point ahead of his radical opponent.
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/51817985/370425333/-863883417?refcode=em_fr_2022.10.02_b1_pa17ra_all&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MTQ5MTg2NC03MDQyLWVkMTEtYjQ5NS0wMDIyNDgzMmU0Y2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oYKnNXsmDAdzGWF0O4Fl3Y_5tNgiwQDWKUakoHMvl80=) Hi Derek –

**Pennsylvania’s 17th District is one of the most competitive races in the country.** According to recent polling, Chris and his opponent are neck-and-neck, and **election experts are saying this race could determine which party controls the House.**

**Let’s be clear: Falling short in PA-17 could mean handing Kevin McCarthy the Speaker’s gavel.**

The other side knows this too, which is why they’re spending big – _**over $7.5 million**_ – to try to sway undecided voters before they hear Chris’s positive message of fighting for our common good.

If Kevin McCarthy gets his hands on the Speaker’s gavel, he’ll enact **an anti-American agenda** that will hurt hardworking folks and send our jobs overseas. Just last week, McCarthy announced his potential agenda includes _**a national abortion ban, restricted voting rights, and healthcare that’s a ripoff.**_

**_Pennsylvanians deserve better._**

[**Derek, everything is on the line this election, so it’s all hands on deck to ensure we win here in PA-17. clean_body: Pennsylvania’s 17th District is one of the most competitive races in the country, and Chris Deluzio is only one point ahead of his radical opponent. | = Hi Derek – Pennsylvania’s 17th District is one of the most competitive races in the country. According to recent polling, Chris and his opponent are neck-and-neck, and election experts are saying this race could determine which party controls the House. Let’s be clear: Falling short in PA-17 could mean handing Kevin McCarthy the Speaker’s gavel. The other side knows this too, which is why they’re spending big – over $7.5 million – to try to sway undecided voters before they hear Chris’s positive message of fighting for our common good. If Kevin McCarthy gets his hands on the Speaker’s gavel, he’ll enact an anti-American agenda that will hurt hardworking folks and send our jobs overseas. Just last week, McCarthy announced his potential agenda includes a national abortion ban, restricted voting rights, and healthcare that’s a ripoff. Pennsylvanians deserve better. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thanks for your support, Team Deluzio | Chris Deluzio is a voting rights lawyer and Iraq war veteran running for Congress in Pennsylvania's 17th District. He'll be a champion for our unions, fight to guarantee good healthcare for every American, take on corporate power, and advocate for bold action to protect and strengthen our democracy. This is one of the most competitive districts in the country, and Democrats have to hold it in order to keep their House majority in 2022. = | = = | Paid for by Chris Deluzio for Congress Chris Deluzio for Congress PO Box 16210 Pittsburgh, PA 15242 United States Chris Deluzio is a United States Veteran. Peter — I just wanted to send you a quick thank you.

With just a month until Election Day, our fundraising goals are critical to our ability to raise the money this campaign needs to protect this brand-new district and ward off extreme Republican opponents.

**And thanks to you, we reached our End of Quarter fundraising goal! This is so important to our campaign. So thank you.**

I’m doing everything I can to support our progressive agenda in Congress. I’ve fought for a shorter workweek, stronger LGBTQ+ rights, and critical veteran care.

I’ve helped secure some of President Biden’s most important priorities from COVID relief to infrastructure to inflation and climate change.

But right now – anything is possible. We could lose everything and go back to a Trump presidency with MAGA Republicans in power. Or we can keep Biden in office and save our Democratic majorities.

_**Whatever happens comes down to you, so thank you for being in this fight with me.**_

**_Should Mike DeWine agree to a debate with Nan Whaley? Take our poll:_**

Friend,

For the longest time, it has been an assumption that politicians debate their opponents. It’s a central part of our democracy — it’s one of the best ways for people to get to know the candidates and make their voting decisions.

So then, why does Mike DeWine refuse to debate Nan Whaley? There are just weeks to go until the general election, and now would be a perfect time to put the two on a stage together.

Nan Whaley and her team have requested a debate numerous times, but DeWine refuses to show up and face his opponent. **What is he afraid of?**

[**What do _you_ think? Do you want to see Nan Whaley debate Mike DeWine? Take our one-question poll:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/51820120/370428109/-1685790714?refcode=em22_221002_DeWine_e1srv_gq_act_dbt_TODP_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_221002_DeWine_e1srv_gq_act_dbt_TODP_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZGJkMzhhOS03MzQyLWVkMTEtYjQ5NS0wMDIyNDgzMmU0Y2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gW-obpvqjay85KPZv9RHIGlCjpr13RQzcOD-ZyWUfDs=&emci=8c20d49d-f040-ed11-b495-00224832e4ca&emdi=edbd38a9-7342-ed11-b495-00224832e4ca&ceid=25291327)

Friend,

This is Dr. Oz.

Our opportunity to take control of Congress is slipping away.

My socialist opponent's massive cash advantage is beginning to swing the polls in his favor. And voting is only a few weeks away!

My friends, America is worth fighting for.

Americans cannot afford to sit on the sidelines while the radical Left continues to gain ground.

We have a chance to slam the brakes on the Left's agenda RIGHT NOW by winning my Senate race and flipping control of Congress. But my opponent raised **$8.3 MILLION** to bring home a win.

---
| | [MAKE A DIFFERENCE IN THE NATION'S #1 SENATE RACE](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z3a1irejt8is1lnmi2peer62b6vglgurh4lo2opg_rp22sh2s8i66or1ctj60o32c1h2bs)

We're less than **40 DAYS** until Election Day. At this point, every hour and every dollar counts in our mission to defeat liberal John Fetterman.

We cannot afford to fall behind on fundraising when Fetterman is bringing in so much extra cash.

_**[That's why I'm hoping you'll spare $10, $20, $30, or whatever you can to help win this crucial battleground election and end the far Left's disastrous reign.](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z3sc9t8c9t0n0ucpl5idn9t67rstou20794ghsm8_rp22sh2s8i66or1ctj60o32c1h2bs "That’s why I’m hoping you’ll spare $10, $20, $30, or whatever you can to help win this crucial battleground election and end the far Left’s disastrous reign.")**_

If John Fetterman wins, it will only get worse. We CAN'T let that happen. "Join our team and finish this fight with a quick contribution." name: Kevin McCarthy
subject: Re: Pulling the plug on campaign ads
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
The truth is - we have not been able to raise enough money to keep our ads on the air through election day.

| |
---
| | |
---
| Peter,

This is GOP Leader Kevin McCarthy. Unfortunately, I come bearing some bad news:

**We 're going to have to cancel our advertising buys unless we see a massive surge of grassroots support this evening.**

_**Here 's the lay of the land:**_
We started off this election cycle ambitious as ever. The polls were in our favor. A record 33 Democrats announced their retirement. And I personally vetted & recruited the best class of candidates I've seen to date.

_**NOW:**_ We've taken a turn for the worst. Democrats have pulled ahead in the polls & SURGED ahead in fundraising - while our fundraising has come to a complete standstill.

The truth is - we have not been able to raise enough money to keep our ads on the air through election day.
---
| | [HELP KEEP OUR ADS ON TV](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61465091:JLBc0ZVNZ:m:1:3253819041:B9ACD512EB98FB58A1B19DDA34664BDB:r)
---
| According to my team, if we can manage a $30,000 surge by midnight tonight - we can manage to keep our candidates on air through the end of the month. I know that sounds like a ton, but if everyone reading this, chips in $25 - $75 we can CRUSH this goal.

Peter, our incumbents need defense on the airwaves, and our new recruits need name recognition. We simply CANNOT just brunt Pelosi's attacks on the airwaves without any response.

_**[I'm humbly asking you to help ENSURE our candidates' ads can remain up on the airwaves:](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61465091:JLBc0ZVNZ:m:1:3253819041:B9ACD512EB98FB58A1B19DDA34664BDB:r "I’m humbly

The DOJ has been completely WEAPONIZED as the Democrats' enforcement arm!

Make no mistake - they're doing everything they can to silence, smear, and intimidate the Left's political enemies!

House Republicans have HAD ENOUGH.

name: ChrissyHoulahan.com
subject: What if Election Day were to conclude with Chrissy's far-right Republican opponent winning PA-06?
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/51821403/370430522/-1072566757?refcode=jtk713-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MjRjNzQ1Yy03NDQyLWVkMTEtYjQ5NS0wMDIyNDgzMmU0Y2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=deZ7FfI8DsNy1_CbDMYRUr4I8KL9LSzYUlUKFBbLyIA=&emci=52d8eb3b-913e-ed11-a27c-281878b83d8a&emdi=524c745c-7442-ed11-b495-00224832e4ca&ceid=21278485)
---
Derek, let's imagine this for a moment: What if Election Day were to conclude with Chrissy's far-right Republican opponent winning PA-06? What follows would be, well bad... A Republican-controlled House and a string of heart-breaking legislation. Kevin McCarthy and his allies would try to, among other things, enact a nationwide ban on abortion, roll back voting rights, and undo progress we’ve made to both combat climate change and build an economy that works for both working people and small businesses.
We know this would be devastating. But these is precisely the stakes of this election. **[So we're reaching out to you to ask: Can you please donate $5 or as much as possible to keep PA-06 blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/51821404/370430523/-256290429?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk713-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MjRjNzQ1Yy03NDQyLWVkMTEtYjQ5NS0wMDIyNDgzMmU0Y2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=deZ7FfI8DsNy1_CbDMYRUr4I8KL9LSzYUlUKFBbLyIA=)**
Losing five seats means handing over control to Republicans who are set on pushing through harmful legislation. Even worse, Chrissy's extremist opponent is poised to take our district backward, saying that lawmakers should focus on reducing the number of abortions to "zero."
With Roe v. Wade being overturned, it's more important now than ever to protect and expand our House majority. This won't be easy, but with your support, we can fight back and ensure Chrissy is reelected.
**This campaign is powered by folks like you who share Chrissy's vision that we can, in fact, make Pennsylvania a better state for everyone. We need to get that message out on the doors, TV, mail boxes, and more. All of that costs money, and we need your help.[Derek, can you donate $5 to help protect PA-06 and the House majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/51821405/370430524/-256290429?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk713-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MjRjNzQ1Yy03NDQyLWVkMTEtYjQ5NS0wMDIyNDgzMmU0Y2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=deZ7FfI8DsNy1_CbDMYRUr4I8KL9LSzYUlUKFBbLyIA=)**

name: DLCC Newsletter
subject: State Dems fight to protect the environment while State Republicans target LGBTQ+ children with hateful legislation… and everything else you need to know in the states recently.
body:
Welcome to the latest edition of the DLCC's newsletter, October 2nd, 2022. | | |

name: Team DNC
subject: Make your first donation of 2022 to invest in our vision for the midterms and beyond.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, **[www
body:
There are only 37 more days until the midterms. With your support we will build a better America and defend the progress we’ve already created. | |
---
**Last month, tens of thousands of generous donors stepped up for our party in a big way to help hit our fundraising goal.** That support is critical as we approach next month’s midterm elections. But, Derek, it’s crunch time. We only have 37 days left to elect Democrats who will defend reproductive rights, health care, and so much more. We can’t do it without your immediate support. **This is our last full month before Election Day. It’s all hands on deck, which means we’re counting on you to chip in $7 for the first time this year. We have a real chance to win next month -- but only if we’re all in for the fight ahead.**

clean_body: There are only 37 more days until the midterms. With your support we will build a better America and defend the progress we’ve already created. | | Last month, tens of thousands of generous donors stepped up for our party in a big way to help hit our fundraising goal. That support is critical as we approach next month’s midterm elections. But, Derek, it’s crunch time. We only have 37 days left to elect Democrats who will defend reproductive rights, health care, and so much more. We can’t do it without your immediate support. This is our last full month before Election Day. It’s all hands on deck, which means we’re counting on you to chip in $7 for the first time this year. We have a real chance to win next month -- but only if we’re all in for the fight ahead. Democrats have made so much progress for workers and families across the country, but there is still more change that we can make together. We still cannot do it without your support to elect Democrats nationwide. If we can expand our majorities, Democrats can codify Roe \-- but if Republicans take back control, they’ll continue pushing a nationwide abortion ban. Thankfully, the DNC is in a much stronger position because of this team and even a donation made in these final weeks will make a big difference. Thank you again for being a part of this, The Democrats Manage how often you receive DNC emails, . If you no longer wish to receive emails from the DNC, **. name: Mark Kelly
subject: I want to call a few of the folks who chip in TODAY
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
#

Friend —
I want you to know just how important you are to this campaign. When I think about my most important supporters, it’s not about how much they gave.
I think about the people who were there when I needed them most. So far, nearly 1 million people have contributed to either my first campaign or my re-election.
Now that we’re so close to the election and attack ads are already running, I need you more than ever.
But here’s the thing, the polls have shrunk our lead to just 1% and National Republicans have announced another nearly $7 MILLION on TV attack ads to beat us in these final weeks.
And I have to be honest with you: September was a strong month for us, but it didn’t make up for how slow this summer was — so we can’t afford to have a slow October just weeks before the election.
**Because of that, I want to do something a little special. I want to call a few of the folks who chip in TODAY. So, chip in and you could be hearing from me soon:**
[**Can you please make your first online $3 contribution to my re-election campaign? Help us reach our fundraising goals and defend this seat from the corporate special interest groups that want to beat us. And if you donate today, you might be one of the people I reach out to.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-oct22.7U3p1A&refcode=em221002-1-7&t=1&akid=4078%2E6688874%2E3tTW7S)

name: Oscar, Teens for Tina
subject: The only candidate Gen-Z can trust
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Tina Kotek
body:
|
#
---
Hey Peter! I’m Oscar, a senior at Franklin High school and lead organizer with Teens for Tina! We work to mobilize students to get involved in politics, and in just a few months, Teens for Tina has already **mobilized more than 60 high school students** from around Oregon to take action and get involved in the campaign. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/51823771/370432750/1448267334?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&refcode=AU_TK_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20221002_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Mzc2NDQ3NS03NjQyLWVkMTEtYjQ5NS0wMDIyNDgzMmU0Y2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1OxiTeO7M2VZgbBFo0CSux6u8mx-lt0QKKKG4vhXS7s=) _That’s me in the front in the navy shirt_ 🤩 I got involved with Tina’s campaign and helped launch Teens for Tina because there is no one I trust more than her to fight for what’s right — whether it’s our schools, our climate, or our safety. While Tina’s opponents, Christine and Betsy, threaten to make Oregon worse for Gen-Z, Tina understands the issues most important to young people. We care about issues like climate change, reproductive rights, gun violence prevention, and social justice. It’s been SO rewarding to support a candidate who understands young people and wants to work directly with them to create progress that will directly affect our future. **I’m proudly supporting Tina because she’s the only candidate who will build a better future for students like me.** **[So please, with just over a few month until election day, help us keep the momentum going. name: Cheri Beasley
subject: I hate to ask
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
As I was drinking my tea, I was reflecting on why I got into public service and why this race is so important.
#

I had a moment of free time this morning — which is a blessing these days as we sprint toward Election Day. As I was drinking my tea, I was reflecting on why I got into public service and why this race is so important. So I wanted to reach out and share a bit about the decisions that led me to run for the United States Senate.
Running for office was not something I’d ever imagined I’d do when I graduated from law school. I had never seen an African American woman sit behind the bench until I was a practicing lawyer. But it’s a moment that changed what I saw as possible, and I went on to run for judge myself.
When my first opponent said I couldn’t win because I was a mom, I put my twin sons in a stroller, and went door-to-door talking to voters. I beat him by 30 points. Ultimately, I went on to win two statewide races and become the first African American woman to serve as Chief Justice of North Carolina.
And now, Republicans are trying to bully me just like my first opponent did. Their super PACs are going to continue spending millions on false attack ads against me. But I refuse to back down.
I know firsthand that justice is too often out of reach for people. Too often the laws handed down by Washington leave our families behind while the wealthy and well-connected use our broken status quo to get ahead. And now, right-wing politicians are trying to roll back our Constitutional rights even further.
So this race is our opportunity to make real change, to give North Carolinians a leader in the Senate who will break through the division and gridlock to stand up for the people. My promise from the start of this campaign for U.S. Senate has been that I would pursue justice with a relentless refusal to see it abandoned. I will not accept a future where our children have fewer rights than we did.
But I know that flipping a Senate seat is not something any one person can do alone. It takes a dedicated grassroots effort — folks like you and me rolling up our sleeves to move mountains together.
Honestly, I wish what we’d already raised would be enough because I hate to ask for money. But Republicans are spending an average of almost $450,000 a day to attack me and try to buy this seat. So we need to make sure we have the resources to fight back and compete in every corner of our state. We must organize and speak to the hopes and needs of voters from the Appalachian Mountains to the Outer Banks.
[**So I’m leaning on you for support today. Can you please consider making a $3 donation to flip this seat and expand our senate majority? We must not allow super PACs who want to uphold a corrupt and broken status quo to buy this Senate seat.**](https://act.cheribeasley.com/go/2567?c0=cb-em-sep22.KSPoKB&refcode=em221002-1-subs&t=1&akid=1919%2E357359%2E3t1gtR)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://act.cheribeasley.com/go/2574?c0=cb-em-sep22.SgmkTI&refcode=em221002-1-subs&refcode2=1919.357359.3t1gtR&t=20&akid=1919%2E357359%2E3t1gtR)**
---
****
| **[Donate $10](https://act.cheribeasley.com/go/2575?c0=cb-em-sep22.pPVXLo&refcode=em221002-1-subs&refcode2=1919.357359.3t1gtR&t=21&akid=1919%2E357359%2E3t1gtR)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $20.22](https://act.cheribeasley.com/go/2576?c0=cb-em-sep22.Q6DrRN&refcode=em221002-1-subs&refcode2=1919.357359.3t1gtR&t=22&akid=1919%2E357359%2E3t1gtR)**
---
****
| **[Donate $50](https://act.cheribeasley.com/go/2569?c0=cb-em-sep22.emKrP0&refcode=em221002-1-subs&refcode2=1919.357359.3t1gtR&t=23&akid=1919%2E357359%2E3t1gtR)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $100](https://act.cheribeasley.com/go/2570?c0=cb-em-sep22.a7rG5c&refcode=em221002-1-subs&refcode2=1919.357359.3t1gtR&t=24&akid=1919%2E357359%2E3t1gtR)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://act.cheribeasley.com/go/2573?c0=cb-em-sep22.Wobiu4&refcode=em221002-1-subs&refcode2=1919.357359.3t1gtR&t=25&akid=1919%2E357359%2E3t1gtR)**
---
****
Our country is at a pivotal moment. The stakes are high for our democracy and our rights. But together, we have the power to transform what is possible, protect our hard-won freedom, and create a brighter future for the next generation.
Thank you for being part of this fight with us. I’m so grateful to everyone on this team.
\- Cheri
**[DONATE](https://act.cheribeasley.com/go/2567?c0=cb-em-sep22.KSPoKB&refcode=em221002-1-subs&refcode2=1919.357359.3t1gtR&t=26&akid=1919%2E357359%2E3t1gtR)**

Emails like this are a critical tool for our campaign's fundraising and organizing efforts, but if you need to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.cheribeasley.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=28&akid=1919%2E357359%2E3t1gtR). name: Katherine Fischer, Beto for Texas
subject: Will you volunteer to help elect Beto?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
In order to turn out a historic number of voters on Election Day, we need all hands on deck.
#
Right now, we’re building one of the biggest organizing programs Texas has ever seen so we can make history and elect Beto as our next Governor.

Team Beto volunteers have already accomplished some amazing things. **But in order to turn out a historic number of voters on Election Day, we need all hands on deck.**

We’re reaching out to you because our campaign needs your help to make direct, personal contact with as many Texans as we can.
[**Will you sign up today for a virtual webinar for out-of-state Team Beto volunteers?**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/57318?t=1&akid=210313%2E444211%2EJCzGv5) We'll talk about how you can make the biggest impact, and you’ll have the chance to connect with fellow supporters.
**[Sign Up »](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/57318?t=2&akid=210313%2E444211%2EJCzGv5)**
Winning in Texas won't be easy, especially with the extreme voter suppression happening right in front of our eyes. But we know that we're capable of generating historic voter turnout and electing Beto, if we put in the work right now.
Thank you for being part of this,
Katherine Fischer
Organizing Director, Beto for Texas
**[Donate now »](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/54521?refcode=ema20221002-210313&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=210313%2E444211%2EJCzGv5)**

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-footer?refcode=em20221002-210313-footer&t=4&refcode2=210313_444211_JCzGv5&akid=210313%2E444211%2EJCzGv5)**

We have a chance to slam the brakes on the Left's agenda RIGHT NOW by winning my Senate race and flipping control of Congress. But my opponent raised **$8.3 MILLION** to bring home a win.

name: Ryan Zinke - Navy SEAL
subject: Closing the curtains on my campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Zinke for Congress
body:
I'm at my wits' end, Peter. Pelosi and the Democrats just have too much power, too many connections, and too much in their fundraising war chest. At this point, if I don't do a total 180 on the fundraising front, not only will my race be in danger, **_but Republicans may never win another race this year._** **Peter, this is Ryan Zinke. I served as President Trump 's Secretary of the Interior and I was the commander at SEAL Team 6.** **I 'm also running for Congress in the most critical race in the nation. I will never give up on this race, I will never back down - because Navy SEALs never quit.** But if Pelosi can destroy me in this race, I can guarantee you no other Republican will have a chance. **I have Trump 's endorsement, I lead the team of Navy SEAL's running for Congress, and I have more battle experience than anyone else.** [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61467058:6NQRgZVNw:m:1:3331421248:BE025F078A7FC5711517E09925F5249A:r) The point is, Peter, I'm the toughest Republican running for office. If I can't beat Pelosi - no one can. So, I'm going to be blunt with you. name: Fetterman HQ
subject: NEW POLL: Dr. Oz is catching up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
This is urgent.
#
Derek, we have urgent news:
**A new Franklin & Marshall College Poll shows Dr. Oz closing the gap —
Oz is now just 3 points behind John, which is within the margin of error!!!**
**[Fight Back Now »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20221002-1?refcode=em20221002-7465&refcode2=7465_434096_BcSy-A&akid=7465%2E434096%2EBcSy-A)**
This is an all-hands-on-deck moment for us in PA. With Oz on the verge of taking the lead, we can’t afford to slow down even a bit.
**[We urgently need your help, Derek. Will you rush $5 or whatever you can so we can STOP Dr. Oz?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20221002-1?amount=5&refcode=em20221002-7465&refcode2=7465_434096_BcSy-A&akid=7465%2E434096%2EBcSy-A)**
**[Rush $5](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20221002-1?amount=5&refcode=em20221002-7465&refcode2=7465_434096_BcSy-A&akid=7465%2E434096%2EBcSy-A)**
We know exactly why Dr. Oz is catching up. His campaign + allies are DOMINATING the airwaves, and their million$ spent on attack ads are clearly paying off.
That’s why it’s essential that we ramp up our fundraising — we need to use our full grassroots strength to compete with the GOP’s massive spending in PA, ramp up John’s momentum, and defeat Dr. Oz once + for all!!
From John, Gisele, and everyone on this team... **[Will you please rush a donation right now to help us fight back?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20221002-1?amount=5&refcode=em20221002-7465&refcode2=7465_434096_BcSy-A&akid=7465%2E434096%2EBcSy-A)**
— Team Fetterman HQ 💛

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20221002-7465-footer&t=1&refcode2=7465_434096_BcSy-A&akid=7465%2E434096%2EBcSy-A)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=2&akid=7465%2E434096%2EBcSy-A)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=7465%2E434096%2EBcSy-A)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.
