name: JD Vance
subject: I'm back, but I need your help.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by JD Vance for Senate Inc
body:
for good.

| [](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=659491fa79c0432f8851d019e89a8274&_e=ylP4ah5WlFdG4pTvIIB6eKWTyLRED0mxRCh6sB8A4_XotDFAWRdJKJFy8rJwjwPtnz_DN0O6wBJ_8W19UAMSBJi54ftEpyw61YS0_LlvP-U8MvUrlrd5lGRHwXRMTJ-SuZ171QJh5roxCSvTad-4s_3S8CtH5VB0DBP1ykEczd-2zgRnIqrzCzirDIBAmz2zE3RnMYYacg850f8qKEjdVCv4RlFg26no8mZ5hKCbE-l3ln4bzx9Y2esqPZCb9-H_Fhy5XRsmB0U4N_pX52_taTtidJyU7vgKeMeQ1PzqsULweWXwp9Nv4aPJzVeSiNhqR0gcFbb5cHX-VwWj73FKea0YS7HSfKn8X_OeHyA0WgDJ-PKwovFhvLnCLjK6rSF7obarcrDGlGI-auPFSpD7oSSE46QBMMMZsqpKVsPmh4k6BgW7qnv-FVefokwYw53VoAdZfY6NVuw-7yHc32P-QQ%3D%3D)
---
Hey guys,

I spent some time reflecting and writing this, so it would mean the world if you took the time to read.

Now that we are in the **FINAL 40 DAYS** of this campaign, I've spent some time looking back on the incredible campaign we've built. From the ground up - _literally._ Even though the Establishment spent millions to defeat me, you never wavered and carried this campaign across the finish line. I am so humbled and honored by all of your support.

And now more than ever, the real battle starts. The people who run this country want to see us fail. They know that we will end their decades of failure and put the power back where it belongs - with the people. We've come too far to fail now. **[Could you chip in today to help make sure we can take the fight all the way to Washington?](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=659491fa79c0432f8851d019e89a8274&_e=ylP4ah5WlFdG4pTvIIB6eKWTyLRED0mxRCh6sB8A4_XotDFAWRdJKJFy8rJwjwPtnz_DN0O6wBJ_8W19UAMSBJi54ftEpyw61YS0_LlvP-U8MvUrlrd5lGRHwXRMTJ-SuZ171QJh5roxCSvTad-4s_3S8CtH5VB0DBP1ykEczd-2zgRnIqrzCzirDIBAmz2zE3RnMYYacg850f8qKEjdVCv4RlFg26no8mZ5hKCbE-l3ln4bzx9Y2esqPZCb9-H_Fhy5XRsmB0U4N_pX52_taTtidJyU7vgKeMeQ1PzqsUIVC8iDWqgNpXUPH5B3rVPYUvddPtzQO4lBYFfKzlXxB2y0dyKHCUbizdIf-nbhjHZOAXIg5PQUiRcocXmdxdNF3S0Cy7a1qK7UvZYI2i13LX1_vts2NsPKVjYnYQYZrf7CUfCXov_SpR4l1C1HRREhew8Im9BC_D0n91j8ZPIKyA%3D%3D)**

Although it seems like we've hit our big break, _the hardest part is far from over._ We've got a major obstacle ahead. And his name is Tim Ryan (commonly confused with Bernie Sanders.) **_[I JUST MISSED MY LAST FUNDRAISING GOAL. Donate now to help me catch up.](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=659491fa79c0432f8851d019e89a8274&_e=ylP4ah5WlFdG4pTvIIB6eKWTyLRED0mxRCh6sB8A4_XotDFAWRdJKJFy8rJwjwPtnz_DN0O6wBJ_8W19UAMSBJi54ftEpyw61YS0_LlvP-U8MvUrlrd5lGRHwXRMTJ-SuZ171QJh5roxCSvTad-4s_3S8CtH5VB0DBP1ykEczd-2zgRnIqrzCzirDIBAmz2zE3RnMYYacg850f8qKEjdVCv4RlFg26no8mZ5hKCbE-l3ln4bzx9Y2esqPZCb9-H_Fhy5XRsmB0U4N_pX52_taTtidJyU7vgKeMeQ1PzqsUIVC8iDWqgNpXUPH5B3rVPY-x-SgD29AccwLSmuVqUoA6PnNC_U3XqL8-G1OwdS5WbXqoPQUu2JcQ0BoZRMs4iqS-pXz_D8IQGPTfHunLkOXB8aC0X_6JSBmEJq9NQ1gO4FC8BFp3jwE7x6O7trhMk5BZDLO0TN9BSGRkyWsqH8kQ%3D%3D)_**

I'm running to unseat entrenched, lame-duck, career politician Tim Ryan. Because I can't see Ohio fall to an extreme socialist like Ryan. **[But he's putting up a million-dollar fight with his billionaire friends - and that's hard to keep up with.](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=659491fa79c0432f8851d019e89a8274&_e=ylP4ah5WlFdG4pTvIIB6eKWTyLRED0mxRCh6sB8A4_XotDFAWRdJKJFy8rJwjwPtnz_DN0O6wBJ_8W19UAMSBJi54ftEpyw61YS0_LlvP-U8MvUrlrd5lGRHwXRMTJ-SuZ171QJh5roxCSvTad-4s_3S8CtH5VB0DBP1ykEczd-2zgRnIqrzCzirDIBAmz2zE3RnMYYacg850f8qKEjdVCv4RlFg26no8mZ5hKCbE-l3ln4bzx9Y2esqPZCb9-H_Fhy5XRsmB0U4N_pX52_taTtidJyU7vgKeMeQ1PzqsUIVC8iDWqgNpXUPH5B3rVPY07L4wGGp9_m2inaD-FmS-nmbSNuiMnMvdFs5KpZFUAcknsarvTBg1YnmDlDh8Vl_aIYkfYCGNeqp_sqXo8Sprzrb3gdx6tI3LgR1JXixEcUi18Gr6ZdnbFV3fl30L5F4ZbR9zTNa5N_UieiV5krN3g%3D%3D)**

**Entrepreneur, marine, businessman, author, heck - even hillbilly, - whatever you want to call me, go for it. But all of these make me one thing in this race - a conservative **outsider who isn 't afraid to fight.****

And one thing an outsider will never do: **leave anyone behind. Leave _YOU_ behind.**

Because I know the feeling all too well.

We've faced too much turbulence the last few years. Joe Biden's agenda has failed normal people in this country.

Joe Biden has failed us. Joe Biden basically told us all to go kick rocks...

When I'm elected to the Senate, I want every Ohioan to feel SECURE and HEARD. The time for us to fight back was YESTERDAY! The Left is waging a war against America and everything we value. **For too long Republicans have been afraid to fight back. Well not me.**

Time to fight back.

**[_Chip in now to join my army and fight for Ohio and the rest of the nation!_](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=659491fa79c0432f8851d019e89a8274&_e=ylP4ah5WlFdG4pTvIIB6eKWTyLRED0mxRCh6sB8A4_XotDFAWRdJKJFy8rJwjwPtnz_DN0O6wBJ_8W19UAMSBJi54ftEpyw61YS0_LlvP-U8MvUrlrd5lGRHwXRMTJ-SuZ171QJh5roxCSvTad-4s_3S8CtH5VB0DBP1ykEczd-2zgRnIqrzCzirDIBAmz2zE3RnMYYacg850f8qKEjdVCv4RlFg26no8mZ5hKCbE-l3ln4bzx9Y2esqPZCb9-H_Fhy5XRsmB0U4N_pX52_taTtidJyU7vgKeMeQ1PzqsUIVC8iDWqgNpXUPH5B3rVPY5ImX5N2CM2DKkmnkaQn30vQI_oEa6awsCCAkVmyMww1TjFGsRN8O8Ni0aR9ivtpUaFroPgwjUIKLkOaGfEQKaYQsNoqGtbJ3DgRUW_ULxxPwuEvvfJEClRPrVyOIn-bPb5ayAjQK6aLHj7THLMqHbQ%3D%3D)**

Thank you endlessly for your support - I am beyond excited for what's next.

God bless and godspeed,

JD

| [**DONATE**](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=659491fa79c0432f8851d019e89a8274&_e=ylP4ah5WlFdG4pTvIIB6eKWTyLRED0mxRCh6sB8A4_XotDFAWRdJKJFy8rJwjwPtnz_DN0O6wBJ_8W19UAMSBJi54ftEpyw61YS0_LlvP-U8MvUrlrd5lGRHwXRMTJ-SuZ171QJh5roxCSvTad-4s_3S8CtH5VB0DBP1ykEczd-2zgRnIqrzCzirDIBAmz2zE3RnMYYacg850f8qKEjdVCv4RlFg26no8mZ5hKCbE-l3ln4bzx9Y2esqPZCb9-H_Fhy5XRsmB0U4N_pX52_taTtidJyU7vgKeMeQ1PzqsUIVC8iDWqgNpXUPH5B3rVPYq9ob7AD4Rw5xQYoJehKmxQodnYsBqwiuafD5weHvOee9gTa13PYVodEMNlweMEIaXSO8cY0sjQtvCcS2xFdg6iPQRJS-0R6cvGhhd6fKpiLUkA0lFNQ3YUwdpgwqyZJ2eAXctTlRUB9Raxsvn5gnQg%3D%3D)
---

clean_body: for good. | Hey guys, I spent some time reflecting and writing this, so it would mean the world if you took the time to read. Now that we are in the FINAL 40 DAYS of this campaign, I've spent some time looking back on the incredible campaign we've built. From the ground up - literally. Even though the Establishment spent millions to defeat me, you never wavered and carried this campaign across the finish line. I am so humbled and honored by all of your support. And now more than ever, the real battle starts. The people who run this country want to see us fail. They know that we will end their decades of failure and put the power back where it belongs - with the people. We've come too far to fail now. Although it seems like we've hit our big break, the hardest part is far from over. We've got a major obstacle ahead. And his name is Tim Ryan (commonly confused with Bernie Sanders.) I'm running to unseat entrenched, lame-duck, career politician Tim Ryan. Because I can't see Ohio fall to an extreme socialist like Ryan. Entrepreneur, marine, businessman, author, heck - even hillbilly, - whatever you want to call me, go for it. But all of these make me one thing in this race - a conservative outsider who isn 't afraid to fight.** And one thing an outsider will never do: leave anyone behind. Leave YOU behind. Because I know the feeling all too well. We've faced too much turbulence the last few years. Joe Biden's agenda has failed normal people in this country. Joe Biden has failed us. Joe Biden basically told us all to go kick rocks... When I'm elected to the Senate, I want every Ohioan to feel SECURE and HEARD. The time for us to fight back was YESTERDAY! The Left is waging a war against America and everything we value. For too long Republicans have been afraid to fight back. Well not me. Time to fight back. Thank you endlessly for your support - I am beyond excited for what's next. God bless and godspeed, JD | Conservative Outsider. Marine. Businessman. Author.** Ohio needs a true conservative in the U.S. Senate. It needs someone who understands how our economic and government leaders conspire to make life harder for normal Americans. Ohio needs JD Vance. If you'd like to support our campaign, you can click below to make a donation. | | ---|---|--- Paid for by JD Vance for Senate Inc. JD Vance for Senate Inc., P.O. name: Andy Beshear
subject: To the best supporters in the world.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR
body:
Thank you, Kentucky. I just want to take a moment of your time to say thank you, Peter.

Last week, my team set an ambitious goal to raise $15,000 before our end-of-month fundraising deadline. I’m pleased to report that thanks to the help of this grassroots team, we met our goal.

I'm so grateful to have each of you on this team — we wouldn’t be here without you all.

Looking ahead, I already have seven opponents in this race, and the list may get even longer in the coming months. The 2023 race for Kentucky governor will be one of the most important in the nation, and my opponents are prepared to spend vast amounts of money and do anything it takes to win. _We can’t let that happen._

With your support, I know we can continue building a stronger commonwealth and making progress for our communities.

Again, thank you so much.

— Andy | | **Andy is fighting to make the Bluegrass State the best place it can be for generations to come, and he needs you on board. body:

Peter Willis,

When Tucker Carlson's not being replayed on
Russian TV to justify Putin's latest atrocities, you can find him sharing
his delusions about Democrats between MyPillow ads on Fox News.

He recently had a meltdown about John Fetterman wearing hoodies and
shorts, triggering Dr. Oz to word-vomit: "When he dresses like that, he's
kicking authority in the balls."

Here's the truth: Tucker Carlson and Dr. Oz are triggered by Fetterman's
hoodie and shorts because they know he's one of us.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/7690?t=1011&akid=3475%2E5885482%2E8xNOiP ]John Fetterman isn't taking shit from silly fascists like Tucker
Carlson, and neither are we — so we created an exclusive vinyl sticker to
celebrate. Every $5 recurring gift gets you a sticker that looks amazing
and will help power our voter turnout operation to ensure Dr. Oz stays in

We’re just 37 days from the midterm elections. We need to be clear about what’s on the ballot this year because there’s a heck of a lot at stake. | |

clean_body: We’re just 37 days from the midterm elections. We need to be clear about what’s on the ballot this year because there’s a heck of a lot at stake. | | If Republicans win control of Congress, they want to ban abortion. And they want to criminalize it nationwide. But if we elect two more Democratic senators and hold the House, Derek, we will codify Roe. Kamala and I are counting on you to make your first contribution to the DNC ahead of this year’s all-important midterm elections. Will you make a $7 contribution to the DNC today to help defeat MAGA Republicans this November? The power to get this done is in the hands of the American people -- especially the women of America. And I don’t believe MAGA Republicans have a clue about the power of women in America. But let me tell you something, Derek: They’re about to find out. Thank you for all that you do to support Democrats nationwide. Joe Joseph R. Biden, Jr. President of the United States Manage how often you receive DNC emails, . However, during a recent conference, he repeatedly asked for the Congresswoman in search of her. | | | ~~ | | Wait, what? VP Harris is visiting the borders of other countries. When will the VP visit OUR southern border and address the crisis? | | | ~~ | | Fence-sitter: Amid a rising violent crime rate in the U.S., White House press secretary Karine Jean-Pierre could not answer “YES” or “NO” when asked if big cities in America are SAFE. | | | ~ | |

body:
| | | [](https://links.standforamericanow.com/u/click?_t=d85fab909a98477596691a746a1de4c5&_m=ae27d25e52ed403e93769e7dec958f95&_e=WXwcPDPk081M-aNYd_1dgpZzHGaOqAP9QHyWbjFFVOsOqBs8hT_TriFw8SIq8nuuFWrydfFV1-I9uazULAynGh8G1K2m-4IvqqY8jWVBqTI_B28FU3KWnhFKkv1YGw3wZayZItEAim3ajioZOkrNm8zyHNK736_iiBLfQLR-oQ5IKOqevpWk7JldS5xMSu_HcFmuXoL_XIf_RQmaEEdyJRfoqo1NgUxb7ZOq1ANxclOzL50cj-2T2wG8y4sUkPLzvrYCOtAyS9pvX8hEenK20g%3D%3D)
---
Friend,
---
It's so close! My new book, “If You Want Something Done...,” will be available to everyone on October 4. [**The book launch is quickly approaching, which is why I wanted to make sure you knew I have made my book available for pre-order so that you’ll have a copy on the way as soon as October 4 comes along.**](https://links.standforamericanow.com/u/click?_t=d85fab909a98477596691a746a1de4c5&_m=ae27d25e52ed403e93769e7dec958f95&_e=WXwcPDPk081M-aNYd_1dgpZzHGaOqAP9QHyWbjFFVOsOqBs8hT_TriFw8SIq8nuuFWrydfFV1-I9uazULAynGh8G1K2m-4IvqqY8jWVBqTInnqmzp8Cu50cWrTHGNBtEk0eVLAqcnBfx1kqFirrB2Q2Mnc4OCcw9JP4PU0ZzOLDMJU34huVGB3IYFcIwluJWJz-wcJYEaUMvIw6FrWwAIHPZilE0lsvf13YTA0IXcnQD7R5PHs9J1NEGK-130gjJztuROROtJJ8zznebXOpQzw%3D%3D)
---
[](https://links.standforamericanow.com/u/click?_t=d85fab909a98477596691a746a1de4c5&_m=ae27d25e52ed403e93769e7dec958f95&_e=WXwcPDPk081M-aNYd_1dgpZzHGaOqAP9QHyWbjFFVOsOqBs8hT_TriFw8SIq8nuuFWrydfFV1-I9uazULAynGh8G1K2m-4IvqqY8jWVBqTLjkgBDyFnhjnbFmnR6Qf_K7DBvF-vR0F-uqftmNmY3-0frAR3Y7gGm-p-8aQMDmMuFuB-MPmHBAOIc6F84IRDoRtDB4wu1Txqr58ETF1MucMGfmK4jYQh9blnSl_oGdloRHOTfSfSRjWacrD1A3DOOSbdnEg1KUNSG0WVNfFn4YA%3D%3D)
---
[**Pre-order Your Book Here**](https://links.standforamericanow.com/u/click?_t=d85fab909a98477596691a746a1de4c5&_m=ae27d25e52ed403e93769e7dec958f95&_e=WXwcPDPk081M-aNYd_1dgpZzHGaOqAP9QHyWbjFFVOsOqBs8hT_TriFw8SIq8nuuFWrydfFV1-I9uazULAynGh8G1K2m-4IvqqY8jWVBqTLT2RINCGe9ogSjtxY6sOc08wFQOREWBb2186WC1VYOHRrALmHSsgbAfAPhPiRSHyUZTU_85j8xHAO1uMtJBzr7ytPGEHEOTpWCtg1lhMGJV6RAgFlS-Z1lSpK-7ZgxxokwjiHQFa2GNpXMdl-S9maaWrYOVuVWjlfEPoNiqW7q6g%3D%3D)
---
If you love history... if you’re looking to be inspired... if you want to read about women who upended expectations and broke barriers... then this book is for you. ** ** My new book tells the stories of 10 bold, courageous, and daring women who serve as an inspiration to me. I hope they will be an inspiration to you, too. ** ** [**So, hurry and pre-order your copy today!**](https://links.standforamericanow.com/u/click?_t=d85fab909a98477596691a746a1de4c5&_m=ae27d25e52ed403e93769e7dec958f95&_e=WXwcPDPk081M-aNYd_1dgpZzHGaOqAP9QHyWbjFFVOsOqBs8hT_TriFw8SIq8nuuFWrydfFV1-I9uazULAynGh8G1K2m-4IvqqY8jWVBqTLw9mZwFbx8KPTbQ0uhdAyhJ9rWPPnvy-sCCMBlJH_RCm5AN-kY1PSz97V36pj5xDRWZZKk7HiZVsuia3rjd0J3PnbDnG7EM_eIy-UkMsUj2jBLzCpXBGBVajwLJYBAsO9YZk-PbVOBaXDDDd-hN0ClqtazzvMwAdr5qKr5OE4vvA%3D%3D) Let’s join together and learn from the incredible women who were the first, the best, the brave, and the bold. ** ** My very best,**
**
---
[](https://links.standforamericanow.com/u/click?_t=d85fab909a98477596691a746a1de4c5&_m=ae27d25e52ed403e93769e7dec958f95&_e=WXwcPDPk081M-aNYd_1dgpZzHGaOqAP9QHyWbjFFVOsOqBs8hT_TriFw8SIq8nuuFWrydfFV1-I9uazULAynGh8G1K2m-4IvqqY8jWVBqTJwOaj6l1tyG9Gw6MLoJ_xWvIvbevhR79lF68x7lQGBPgecVbp2R4vlRUbrxdwvTHsgwBUm8mmHkC1r9aKNDAb-RMOAO2RF3hjj94urmAtp3vOVCIwSIoWpwVkRjp_DgpQSTnX4l9tAQQvjABEu668F4Ce-IRNeKFncbTp5RL7wtQ%3D%3D)

clean_body: | | | Friend, It's so close! My new book, “If You Want Something Done...,” will be available to everyone on October 4. If you love history... if you’re looking to be inspired... if you want to read about women who upended expectations and broke barriers... then this book is for you. My new book tells the stories of 10 bold, courageous, and daring women who serve as an inspiration to me. I hope they will be an inspiration to you, too. Let’s join together and learn from the incredible women who were the first, the best, the brave, and the bold. name: Barbara Mikulski
subject: Patty gets things done
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
We need your help to keep her in the Senate
#
Peter,
I’ve known Patty for a long time, and together, we helped shepherd a new perspective to the U.S. Senate that meant putting families first and getting results for the people of our states.
**[Patty is a smart, dedicated leader who fights hard for Washington state – and families across the country – every day. We need to keep her in the Senate. Will you chip in $5 now to support her reelection campaign?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/51826284/370440591/-877381939?refcode=pm_em_221002_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MzU0YzMzYi04MDQyLWVkMTEtYjQ5NS0wMDIyNDgzMmU0Y2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Khd0CznMCSFGfa9tcIeaeMovlsHgdRBJtnJxoQi0onU=)**
Patty is always the first one to roll up her sleeves and get to work – whether it was helping recruit more women to run for the Senate, getting to a bipartisan budget agreement, or leading the Senate Health and Education committee during an unprecedented global pandemic. Patty gets things done.
This year, she’s up against an extreme MAGA Republican who would be another vote for Mitch McConnell’s extreme agenda to ban abortion and punish doctors for doing their jobs – and who supports the “Big Lie” that undermines our democracy.
**[The choice in this election is clear. We need to send Patty back to the Senate – and we need your help to make it happen. Please, contribute now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/51826285/370440592/-877381939?refcode=pm_em_221002_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MzU0YzMzYi04MDQyLWVkMTEtYjQ5NS0wMDIyNDgzMmU0Y2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Khd0CznMCSFGfa9tcIeaeMovlsHgdRBJtnJxoQi0onU=)**

disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
We’re running ads in WI, AZ, and GA right now thanks to supporters like you.
#
Derek -
With the FEC deadline behind us, we wanted to check in and let you know how we’re putting all those donations to work right now.
**Wisconsin**
We’re running ads in Wisconsin hammering Ron Johnson for his votes against the PACT Act. The ads feature a Wisconsin Veteran and tested extraordinarily well before we aired it widely. It will move votes.
**Arizona**
We’re on the air in Arizona going after Blake Masters for being an anti-abortion zealot who compared the health care choice to demonic sacrifice. The ads are like the ones we ran in New York that helped Pat Ryan to an improbable special election victory.
**Georgia**
We’re running ads in Georgia, not our first set. You’ll remember when we moved the needle several points earlier in the cycle with ads about Herschel Walker’s work with a sham “charity” that profited off Veterans who needed help.
All totaled, we’re set to spend over $20 million this year working to hold the House and the Senate. And the vast majority of the donations we receive come from Veterans, military family members, and those who support them by chipping in.
But with time running out, we’re asking again:
[**Can you please make a $3 contribution to VoteVets today? We’ll put it right to work reaching voters other progressive organizations can’t in the states we have to win in November.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-oct22.JOVtcm&refcode=em221002-1-30&t=1&akid=6885%2E3013755%2ETi4wlC)

name: Beto for Texas
subject: The hardest state to vote in
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
We need to act now.
#
We have a critical deadline ahead of us.
**October 11** — it’s the last day to register to vote in Texas ahead of the November 8th election.
**Our organizing team has set a massive goal to register every Texan to vote that we can before the deadline.** Our 95,000+ volunteers will be going door-to-door in neighborhoods that don't typically turn out to vote, calling Texans, and talking to students at college campuses. _But we're hoping we can count on you too._
[**Will you step up with a $3 donation today to help ensure every eligible Texan is registered to vote before the October 11 deadline? Our plans to elect Beto and defeat Greg Abbott depend on the number of Texans who come out to vote on or before November 8th.**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=bft-em-20221002-1.n11A0t&refcode=ema20221002-210324&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=210324%2E444211%2E3TUCI8)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=bft-em-20221002-1.n11A0t&refcode=ema20221002-210324&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=210324%2E444211%2E3TUCI8)**
**The truth is that Texas is the hardest state in the country to vote in — because of Greg Abbott.**
States with secure elections across the country allow people to register to vote up until — and in some states, on — Election Day! That's not all. Unlike other states, Texas mandates that those registering voters be certified by individual counties as Volunteer Deputy Registrars.
There's one reason for this: Abbott has intentionally made it more difficult to vote because he knows that if Texans come out to vote in record numbers... he will lose.
[**With the deadline quickly approaching, we need to act now. Please, will you chip in $3 immediately to fund our organizing to register thousands of new Texas voters before October 11?**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=bft-em-20221002-1.n11A0t&refcode=ema20221002-210324&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=210324%2E444211%2E3TUCI8)
Thank you for being a part of something that’s so important,
Team Beto

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-footer?refcode=em20221002-210324-footer&t=23&refcode2=210324_444211_3TUCI8&akid=210324%2E444211%2E3TUCI8)**
---
Email us: info@betofortexas.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Grassroots supporters like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Beto for Texas, PO Box 302647, Austin, TX 78703.

You wake up on the morning of Wednesday, November 9th, and this is the first thing you see once you open your phone for the morning is the headline: “GOVERNOR LUJAN GRISHAM WINS FOUR MORE.” Peter, the thought sickens me. name: Greg Landsman
subject: Thank you, friend!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Landsman for Congress P
body:
Our people-first movement

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/51812173/370403818/-1334107482?refcode=header-img&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZjdhYThlOC02MjQyLWVkMTEtYjQ5NS0wMDIyNDgzMmU0Y2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KbsJTnF3SChYF4jzbwN79TP3QinMmX-EdQcq6rXfauc=)

Folks — I can’t thank you enough.

**Thanks to supporters like you stepping up, I’m proud to report that our campaign met our critical September fundraising goal.**

For a campaign that relies on grassroots donors, not corporate PACS or dark money, that means the world.

At every moment of this campaign, especially when this team needed it most, folks like you fought back.

Over these next 5 weeks, we have a real shot to retire Rep. Chabot’s anti-choice, Big Lie extremism. **And after 26 years in Washington, that’s long overdue.**

But I need help to do that, friend. We’re in the final push of this campaign and we need to reach as many voters as possible.

Our comprehensive campaign strategy will meet voters where they’re at – at the doors, on the phones, in line at the grocery store, or on TV and radio with proven-effective ads.

[**But to fully fund those operations, I’m reliant on supporters like you chipping in a few bucks at a time. So with less than 40 days to go, I’m asking you to chip in $3, $7 or even just $1 to help this campaign meet our goals and win in November. Can I count on you to help get us there?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/51812174/370403819/1723879753?amount=3&refcode=GLFC_20221002_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZjdhYThlOC02MjQyLWVkMTEtYjQ5NS0wMDIyNDgzMmU0Y2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KbsJTnF3SChYF4jzbwN79TP3QinMmX-EdQcq6rXfauc=) | [CHIP IN $3 TO ELECT DEMOCRAT GREG LANDSMAN »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/51812175/370403820/1723879753?amount=3&refcode=GLFC_20221002_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZjdhYThlOC02MjQyLWVkMTEtYjQ5NS0wMDIyNDgzMmU0Y2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KbsJTnF3SChYF4jzbwN79TP3QinMmX-EdQcq6rXfauc=)

Appreciate you.

Greg

Our comprehensive campaign strategy will meet voters where they’re at – at the doors, on the phones, in line at the grocery store, or on TV and radio with proven-effective ads. = | = Appreciate you. _**[I know it may seem like a lot, but we can close the gap if enough PATRIOTS will stand with us. Democrats know we have the chance to flip this Senate seat in Georgia from BLUE to RED. They see that we’re virtually TIED in the polls, so they are FREAKING OUT. They know that Republicans will fight tooth and nail to keep Georgia from going BLUE AGAIN, so they are pouring resources into the state like crazy.

When you donate, you’ll be helping us win in Georgia, take back the Republican majority in the U.S. Senate, stop the Biden-Harris agenda, and get America back on track!

To victory,

Herschel Walker

body:
my opponent’s fundraising is surging, so we are matching donations

This is urgent – so please listen. **[I’m hoping I can count on you to chip in right now and have your donation automatically matched. Our fundraising is not where it needs to be, and the dynamics of the campaign fundraising environment just changed drastically, so we need all the help that we can get.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/51830964/370442776/789020647?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk1757-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxODFhYzg2YS04NDQyLWVkMTEtYjQ5NS0wMDIyNDgzMmU0Y2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XtHR2llXfCxLdVeJPsg68Vh1IWpYYGqRON7Dosd4QhU=)**
I usually try not to get _too_ in the weeds in emails like these because I find that all the jargon and the discussion of the so-called ‘horse race’ – who’s up and who’s down – can often miss the point. And especially with reproductive rights, and the integrity of our elections on the ballot, it can minimize what is at stake in this race.
But bear with me for a moment because as one of my supporters, you are an integral part of this campaign, and you deserve to know what is happening on the ground (and on the airwaves) here in New Hampshire.
**Our fundraising has been weaker than expected in recent weeks, and we were concerned about a budget hole. So we worked on recruiting a generous group of donors to double match your contributions, hoping that would put us in a better place.**
But then, my extreme, right-wing opponent – Don Bolduc – released a memo and revealed that “in the last week, [Bolduc] has already **surpassed the amount raised during the entire year.” **
**[Folks, this is serious. And I hope I can count on you to step up and give $3, or whatever you can.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/51830965/370442778/789020647?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk1757-fr-nd&recurring=0&amount=3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxODFhYzg2YS04NDQyLWVkMTEtYjQ5NS0wMDIyNDgzMmU0Y2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XtHR2llXfCxLdVeJPsg68Vh1IWpYYGqRON7Dosd4QhU=)**
Bolduc already has the GOP dark money machine on his side. With our fundraising in a slump, the surge of cash Bolduc's campaign is seeing, on top of the over $58 million GOP groups are already spending against me, is extremely troubling.

If we don’t act decisively it could tip the scales in his favor.
**[This is a make or break moment for our campaign and the future of our razor thin Senate majority. So please, step up and stand with me in this fight. ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/51830968/370442779/789020647?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk1757-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxODFhYzg2YS04NDQyLWVkMTEtYjQ5NS0wMDIyNDgzMmU0Y2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XtHR2llXfCxLdVeJPsg68Vh1IWpYYGqRON7Dosd4QhU=)**

clean_body: my opponent’s fundraising is surging, so we are matching donations | | | = This is urgent – so please listen. = I usually try not to get too in the weeds in emails like these because I find that all the jargon and the discussion of the so-called ‘horse race’ – who’s up and who’s down – can often miss the point. And especially with reproductive rights, and the integrity of our elections on the ballot, it can minimize what is at stake in this race. But bear with me for a moment because as one of my supporters, you are an integral part of this campaign, and you deserve to know what is happening on the ground (and on the airwaves) here in New Hampshire. Our fundraising has been weaker than expected in recent weeks, and we were concerned about a budget hole. So we worked on recruiting a generous group of donors to double match your contributions, hoping that would put us in a better place. But then, my extreme, right-wing opponent – Don Bolduc – released a memo and revealed that “in the last week, [Bolduc] has already surpassed the amount raised during the entire year.” = Bolduc already has the GOP dark money machine on his side. With our fundraising in a slump, the surge of cash Bolduc's campaign is seeing, on top of the over $58 million GOP groups are already spending against me, is extremely troubling. If we don’t act decisively it could tip the scales in his favor. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = With every good wish, Maggie Hassan | If you'd like to support Maggie Hassan for Senate, =. = If you’re reading this from your phone, to automatically sign up for our SMS list. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, you can . Click here to . Maggie for NH PO Box 298 Concord, NH 03302 United States Contributions or gifts to Maggie for NH are not tax deductible. Paid for by Maggie for NH |

Paul Junge is trying to pretend he is “one of us” in mid-Michigan, despite never living here. But we’ve known all along he is too extreme for Michiganders, and this latest Trump rally proved it.

Dan’s opponent stood right along side Trump, Marjorie Taylor Greene and other extremist Republican candidates as they continued to attack abortion rights and spew hate-filled rhetoric.

With just 36 days left until Election Day – and Michiganders ALREADY voting – we have to get out the truth about Junge’s extremist positions and fight back against the attacks coming at Dan.

**[Chip in any amount right now to help us in these final days to re-elect Dan, protect Democrats across Michigan and protect our Democratic House Majority.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/51831560/370443716/1325960132?amount=15&contactdata=f%2FyVcLJ1LzlJUNHjaVprIFeip99Dw6esxMu%2B81Pfh5770OH1%2F4CfSIWt%2FN%2BOyqcCNmVqY1r9Tbik24k0Hbn1K7tmMmeVFypzCmceFdZP%2FN8twzdnVDLBd6fGo8ZmXwVzx0DSbB3X0x2gcBbm7DU06g%3D%3D&refcode2=30a4aee4-8442-ed11-b495-00224832e4ca&source=EM_NBI_DK_20221002_FR_rr.1.1_0_3MO_vanity_NA_NA_rally&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMGE0YWVlNC04NDQyLWVkMTEtYjQ5NS0wMDIyNDgzMmU0Y2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3qwgxGO41mxLTiAErFIP0Vc7Llhe0nPGe4G7ygO4W94=)**

Congressman Dan Kildee – a Flint native – is proud to represent mid-Michigan. As a Democratic party leader, Dan is fighting hard to ensure every American has access to quality health care, clean water and a good-paying job. name: Pro Life Update
subject: Find out what the Founders really said
body:
I’m sure you’ve often wondered why we haven’t produced an online course on the American Founding—we’re Hillsdale Colle
[View this message in your browser](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zvq2hv15t4q0q8om015o5t6jl44nuammjvib32jg_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk1p7fcdkmcqjas3h6gonact66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2u1jrdddmm1h61cbm6ir33d9k6jjrapb4mermad9jm2q69cbielir1pdjegqeco37q9o74oj6e2p6cs74mdhmfcjkcoon5cr56upb4phge2p6co70mlhm1o5l64oracdle8gq48bi4bh28or3c5jmcpr2c9j649fg)

| | | This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zlcdcpl2n5umtjoa3bq11sl6ct9j3emq6rrpra78_rp22sh2s8i66or1ctj6eoj2cph2bs)
---
| |
Greetings friend,

I'm sure you've often wondered why we haven't produced an online course on the American Founding--we're Hillsdale College, after all.

**[Well, here it is!](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zkbi6qcg407d0mlm5n1orp6i6htkf00t4186rkig_rp22sh2s8i66or1ctj6eoj2cph2bs)**
---
| | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zav8ea05j5720lj9aje4dhfar79n3h1jn5k99mrg_rp22sh2s8i66or1ctj6eoj2cph2bs)
---
Hillsdale professor of politics, Thomas G. West is one of the great scholars and teachers of the American Founding and the author of _The Political Theory of the American Founding and Vindicating the Founders_.

In this new course, Dr. West sits down with his former student and current professor at Hillsdale's Graduate School of Government, David Azerrad, to reveal the truth about the American Founding.

As Dr. West explains, the Founders' political theory is so foreign to Americans today--even to scholars and teachers of American history and politics--that the task of uncovering the truth about the Founding is like unearthing something from a "deep and long-forgotten pit."

This course goes about this task by examining the primary arguments and decisions of the Founders, and it brings their theory to life by comparing it to the dominant views of contemporary America.

The result is an exciting, and often surprising, account of how the Founders established a free government in America and what they thought was necessary to sustain it.

That's why we're releasing our new free online course, "**The Real American Founding: A Conversation** ," on October 11, and it's why I'm offering you the opportunity to pre-register for the course using this secure link:

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/real-american-founding-preregister/](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zr3rpbqrkbvmvm00umieddvkcf8ufvjkfk9sj6o8_rp22sh2s8i66or1ctj6eoj2cph2bs)**
Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

West is one of the great scholars and teachers of the American Founding and the author of The Political Theory of the American Founding and Vindicating the Founders. In this new course, Dr. West sits down with his former student and current professor at Hillsdale's Graduate School of Government, David Azerrad, to reveal the truth about the American Founding. As Dr. West explains, the Founders' political theory is so foreign to Americans today--even to scholars and teachers of American history and politics--that the task of uncovering the truth about the Founding is like unearthing something from a "deep and long-forgotten pit." This course goes about this task by examining the primary arguments and decisions of the Founders, and it brings their theory to life by comparing it to the dominant views of contemporary America. The result is an exciting, and often surprising, account of how the Founders established a free government in America and what they thought was necessary to sustain it. Steve Thompson, Editor

# "Weird" 8-Pound Solar Device
Could Save Your Life in a
Dangerous Blackout
**#1 Most Requested Item of 2022 – Finally
Back In Stock, Inventory Limited!** [**Tested by former Navy SEAL: See it in action!**](http://post.spmailtechnolo.com/f/a/KNShLdDdjbApzw0bgQW6iQ~~/AARgdgA~~) [](http://post.spmailtechnolo.com/f/a/4sqhkWJW71OMpW2yLsOPqQ~~/AARgdgA~~) [**> > Video: This mini solar generator powers devices and weighs less than a housecat**](http://post.spmailtechnolo.com/f/a/QBhjQHSR3TVvRgx_eS2GfQ~~/AARgdgA~~) Hello I'm Cade Courtley, former Navy SEAL Platoon Commander, sniper and author of the _SEAL Survival Guide._ Recent events have taught us that it's not IF you need a backup plan... **it's WHEN.** A deadly pandemic, dangerous blackouts sweeping the nation, storms, wildfires, hurricanes, social unrest and crumbling power grids. It's sad, but facts are facts. **Crisis mode has become the new normal.** And you see the need to protect yourself and your family. So let me be clear: One of the best ways to protect your safety and comfort is to guarantee you're always fully ready, even when the power goes out. Nothing feels more vulnerable than that split second when you realize you're sitting in a dangerous blackout. All your critical devices are now on borrowed time. All your critical communications, comfort and protection, suddenly called into question. That's what happened after Hurricane Ida when thousands of families faced being without power... for WEEKS. **You simply must have a backup power plan, no matter your situation or budget.** Well now you can... Because for the **FIRST TIME EVER** you can get a breakthrough NEW solar device... That harnesses the limitless and FREE energy of the sun, and that's **_safe to use inside_** because it's fume-free, silent and never needs gasoline to run. But if you want one, you better hurry... Because customers have been practically begging for this product to hit the market. And now that these next batches of units are ready to ship from Utah, USA... these mini solar generators won't be around for long. You're among the first to know about...
# The NEW Patriot Power Sidekick
Finally... a Mini Solar Generator
that Never Needs Gas and that Costs Less than an iPhone!
[](http://post.spmailtechnolo.com/f/a/ZT7XgUr08nfoDqd1PCjvOA~~/AARgdgA~~) [**➡ YES! I Want to Protect My Family Today With Life-Saving Solar Power!**](http://post.spmailtechnolo.com/f/a/r-dDSMifVxCuQ4OI0kfGNw~~/AARgdgA~~) _"I really like how many things the Sidekick can run. I can charge my cell phone and iPad at the same time, run an electric razor, my radio, an electric blanket and so much more. It's so easy to take with you anywhere – very light!"_ _Craig W.
Police Officer_ Small and mighty, the Patriot Power Sidekick is your personal "portable power plant" that can power your phones, laptops, medical devices, radios and more! You'll also be able to run a toaster oven, a CPAP machine through the night, your TV, radios, GPS devices, lamps, small personal space heaters, fans, a mini fridge, electric blankets... **And you can use it right inside your home, because it's fume-free and SAFE.** You can't say that about a typical generator. Not by a long shot. So you can have the ultimate peace of mind that you and your family will stay connected when disaster strikes. [**You also get $243.90 worth of FREE Gifts today!**](http://post.spmailtechnolo.com/f/a/b3vut88ecvvnyQzcdLeAHQ~~/AARgdgA~~)
* Silent, Fume-FREE & Safe
* Fast Recharge
* Long-Lasting Battery
* Recharge 2,000 Times!
* Easy to Use
* Completely Portable & Easy to Use!
* Powers Your Favorite Devices
* FREE Portable 40-Watt Solar Panel Included
* and more!

That's why it's our privilege to introduce to you: [**The Patriot Power Sidekick
Is An Essential Part of
Your Preparedness Plan!**](http://post.spmailtechnolo.com/f/a/uBpp3r7jN0GNoCmr3UHvIg~~/AARgdgA~~) [](http://post.spmailtechnolo.com/f/a/lslgQ3Kxqgx07RxuD3QurQ~~/AARgdgA~~) **You'll Never Run Out of Juice** _"You can charge your phone 28 times and still have some juice left over. It has no shortage of power. It's very reliable and very good. It's the perfect addition to all of your other 4Patriots products." – Dan W._ [**➡ YES! I Want to Protect My Family Today With Life-Saving Solar Power!**](http://post.spmailtechnolo.com/f/a/pl7A83UYFhiIQzCXUgHbNw~~/AARgdgA~~)

[1]Stacey Abrams for Governor

Derek,

Falcons season is here. And just last week, Stacey stopped by a tailgate
to show her support and make it absolutely clear that momentum is on our
side. We’ve got the grassroots team that will win this election.

[ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/4397?refcode=Sa_em_221002_B1_Tailgating_S1_T1_TA_30open&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250&t=1002&akid=10404%2E1862389%2ET2RPFZ ]But first, we have to show the world just how strong our campaign is
during this final stretch. This may seem daunting, but we also know
together we will get this done. Please chip in $5 now to
power this campaign to victory.

[ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/4397?refcode=Sa_em_221002_B1_Tailgating_S1_T1_TA_30open&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250&t=1003&akid=10404%2E1862389%2ET2RPFZ ]DONATE

We need to recruit volunteers, knock on doors and encourage our supporters
to vote early this election season and we can’t do that alone.

[ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/4397?refcode=Sa_em_221002_B1_Tailgating_S1_T1_TA_30open&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250&t=1004&akid=10404%2E1862389%2ET2RPFZ ]Every cent you donate is critical to the outreach efforts of our team
and pushes us to victory in November. So please,
Derek, donate
now to help power our work to elect Stacey Abrams.

Thank you for being in this fight with us,

Team Abrams

P.S. Check out this photo of Stacey Abrams in action at the tailgate.

[ Stacey ]Stacey Abrams in a crowd at a Falcons tailgate

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

+---------------------------------+
| PAID FOR BY ABRAMS FOR GOVERNOR |
+---------------------------------+

Abrams for Governor
931 Monroe Dr NE
Ste A102 #363
Atlanta, GA 30308
United States

Contributions to Abrams for Governor are not tax deductible.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most critical
tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can click here to let

body:

Peter,

My spineless opponent Katie Hobbs has a new friend - the darling of the Radical Left and failed California Governor Gavin Newsom.

**At Hobbs 's direction - Newsom has now dumped $150,000 into Arizona overnight so the left can pay their political operatives and continue their desperate fight to win this election.**

Katie Hobbs is hiding from voters and staying away from the debate stage because she's scared to go face-to-face with voters and explain her Radical positions, and she's terrified of a one-on-one face-off with me. | [**RUSH $25 FOR MY CAMPAIGN** ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61464911:JGfX89VqN:m:1:3317145305:FA9637AAE4F197F57118FD67E56DEDC3:r)

---
**But she has a plan, and some people say it MAY work.**

**It 's simple, really - amass a big enough war chest so that Hobbs can win the election by flooding the airwaves with Leftist propaganda and scaring Republicans away from the ballot boxes, all without ever answering to the people.**

**[We can't let this happen. I WON'T LET THIS HAPPEN. But - I need your help.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61464911:JGfX89VqN:m:1:3317145305:FA9637AAE4F197F57118FD67E56DEDC3:r)**

The Left's Establishment allies and even RINOs like Liz Cheney are desperate to stop us. Still, we've got the people of Arizona on our side, and Conservative Americans across America are fighting for us tooth and nail.

**Our one problem right now is funding. We 're in the middle of a HUGE media blitz to get the truth out and combat the Fake News Media, but we're hemorrhaging cash quickly.**

**If you 're dedicated to stopping the spread of the Socialist Left and putting America First, I've created a secure donation portal for you below so you can help me level the playing field in Arizona and WIN on November 8th.**

clean_body: Help me stop them. | Peter, My spineless opponent Katie Hobbs has a new friend - the darling of the Radical Left and failed California Governor Gavin Newsom. At Hobbs 's direction - Newsom has now dumped $150,000 into Arizona overnight so the left can pay their political operatives and continue their desperate fight to win this election. Katie Hobbs is hiding from voters and staying away from the debate stage because she's scared to go face-to-face with voters and explain her Radical positions, and she's terrified of a one-on-one face-off with me. | But she has a plan, and some people say it MAY work. It 's simple, really - amass a big enough war chest so that Hobbs can win the election by flooding the airwaves with Leftist propaganda and scaring Republicans away from the ballot boxes, all without ever answering to the people. The Left's Establishment allies and even RINOs like Liz Cheney are desperate to stop us. Still, we've got the people of Arizona on our side, and Conservative Americans across America are fighting for us tooth and nail. Our one problem right now is funding. Team,
We’re proud that from the beginning, this campaign has been a grassroots effort – a campaign for Ohioans, powered by Ohioans.
So we wanted to take a minute to say thank you and tell you exactly what your donation does for our campaign.
While National Republicans and millionaire Mike DeWine are pouring ridiculous amounts of dark money into his campaign, **[when you donate to Nan Whaley, your $5 helps us:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/51814972/370413840/-1862803865?refcode=nw_em_221002_1_t2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOGE2OGY3ZS02ODQyLWVkMTEtYjQ5NS0wMDIyNDgzMmU0Y2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=l7sRByRrFZS8KLMWG9av4jxV1MOkpvR2xhIb4l8KVL8=)**

body:
I am depending on you to maintain my momentum and win
| | |
---
We’re building a grassroots movement capable of defeating Rubio, friend. **And I'm counting on donations from supporters like you to hit each of my fundraising goals.**
Poltico _increased _my chances of winning. We're gaining ground, and the GOP is taking notice. That's why they're parachuting in to halt that momentum: National Republicans already committed $10 million to keeping Florida red permanently. Missing my midnight goal makes it even harder to compete with that kind of investment.

**I am not giving up – b****ut Rubio has the advantage, and I am depending on _you _to maintain my momentum and win. name: Laurie Teper
subject: Hispanic Outreach 4 Saturdays
body:
Hi Team Geels!
We have a fantastic opportunity to reach a multitude of Hispanic voters on the following
4 Saturdays at the same location.
**October 15, 22, 29 and November 5.**
**Location: 2000 Avondale Rd in Durham**
**
**
_ALL COUNTY VOLUNTEERS:_
_Calling for at least 8, preferably more Spanish speaking volunteers to help us out. We also need at least 8 English speaking volunteers to pair up with a Spanish speaking volunteer._

_October 15 - Ice Cream Social 1:00pm-3:00pm_
* Hand out one ticket per person for free ice cream
* Hand out Palm Cards written in Spanish
* Have voter registration forms in Spanish available for those who want to register

_October 22, 29 and November 5 - Taco Food Truck & Shuttle NOON - 3:00pm_
* Hand out Palm Cards written in Spanish
* Have voter registration forms in Spanish available for those who want to register
* Hang out at the food trucks
* Accompany those who want to go to the polls and vote on the shuttle provided.
* Durham County Main Library - 300 N Roxboro St, Durham, NC 27701 - 8 minutes away!

I do realize we also need people at the polls, so consider working the polls and then heading over to Avondale or vice-versa.

Please let me know ASAP if you can volunteer for one or more of these events.

Thank you in advance!

__Fighting for Truth, Justice and Unity Together!__
Laurie Teper
Volunteer Director
Courtney Geels for Congress NC04
Email: [volunteers@courtneygeelsforcongress.com](mailto:volunteers@courtneygeelsforcongress.com)
Cell: (847)212-5651
[courtneygeelsforcongress.com](http://courtneygeelsforcongress.com)

Laurie Teper Volunteer Director Courtney Geels for Congress NC04 Email: mailto:volunteers@courtneygeelsforcongress.com Cell: (847)212-5651

Friends, Friday was our final end-of-quarter fundraising deadline of this campaign, and this incredible team HUSTLED to help reach our goal! Thank you, from the bottom of my heart, for anything and everything you have contributed to our movement for a better Maryland. With your help, we’ve surpassed yet another major milestone and are starting this final month of the race off strong. **While there’s just over a month until Election Day, mail ballots are already beginning to hit Marylanders’ mailboxes this weekend. Voting has officially begun.** The race for Maryland’s next governor is soon coming to a close, and it will set the course for our state over the next four years. Voters have a clear choice. My definition of patriotism was leaving my family, going to serve with the 82nd Airborne, and leading paratroopers in Afghanistan. My opponent’s definition of patriotism is putting on a baseball cap and asking people to join him as they went to the U.S. Capitol to contest a legal election. My priority is to create pathways to work, wages, and wealth for every Marylander, and ensure no one is left behind. My opponent cares more about banning abortion, discriminating against LGBTQ students, and making it easier to get guns. The choice is clear, but we cannot for a second let our guard down. We must continue to work hard and give it everything we’ve got to win this election and make historic change for Maryland, together. Let’s keep it up in this final month of the race, and I know we’ll be victorious. Elevate, Wes | [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/51815467/370415515/-1554509881?refcode=fl_email_na_20221002ty_wm_odpf90ds_xx_btn&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmODRiMjFiZC02YTQyLWVkMTEtYjQ5NS0wMDIyNDgzMmU0Y2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wwK0J-aLdO_G83dibuc-c50PJrJbG_d_-v_nznQj4Ew=)

**** | Wes Moore is a combat veteran, a former small business owner, and the former CEO of a leading nonprofit. Wes believes no matter where you start in life, you deserve an equal opportunity to succeed. He’s running to become Governor of Maryland and flip this state blue for the first time in 8 years. clean_body: | = Friends, Friday was our final end-of-quarter fundraising deadline of this campaign, and this incredible team HUSTLED to help reach our goal! Thank you, from the bottom of my heart, for anything and everything you have contributed to our movement for a better Maryland. With your help, we’ve surpassed yet another major milestone and are starting this final month of the race off strong. While there’s just over a month until Election Day, mail ballots are already beginning to hit Marylanders’ mailboxes this weekend. Voting has officially begun. The race for Maryland’s next governor is soon coming to a close, and it will set the course for our state over the next four years. Voters have a clear choice. My definition of patriotism was leaving my family, going to serve with the 82nd Airborne, and leading paratroopers in Afghanistan. My opponent’s definition of patriotism is putting on a baseball cap and asking people to join him as they went to the U.S. Capitol to contest a legal election. My priority is to create pathways to work, wages, and wealth for every Marylander, and ensure no one is left behind. My opponent cares more about banning abortion, discriminating against LGBTQ students, and making it easier to get guns. The choice is clear, but we cannot for a second let our guard down. We must continue to work hard and give it everything we’ve got to win this election and make historic change for Maryland, together. Let’s keep it up in this final month of the race, and I know we’ll be victorious. Elevate, Wes | = ** | Wes Moore is a combat veteran, a former small business owner, and the former CEO of a leading nonprofit. Wes believes no matter where you start in life, you deserve an equal opportunity to succeed. He’s running to become Governor of Maryland and flip this state blue for the first time in 8 years. And we need your help to do it. | = Use of military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement from the Department of Defense. | By Authority: Wes Moore for Maryland, Mary Tydings, Treasurer Wes Moore for Maryland PO Box 50123 Baltimore, MD 21211 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please . **

name: The Betsy Brigade
subject: ICYMI: This week in Betsy Brigade News
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Run Betsy Run The Betsy Brigade needs you to recapture Oregon’s independent spirit
body:
[](https://www.runbetsyrun.com/?e=40b20d4397498f3af7dfb5987b4a98d3&utm_source=rbr&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=this_week_in_brigade_news6&n=1) |
# **THIS WEEK IN BETSY BRIGADE NEWS**
### _Putting the People Back in Charge

_
* * *
### **Betsy Debates the Two Extremes in Bend**
The Kotek-Drazan partisan fight of the past four years continued on Tuesday at the first televised gubernatorial debate in Bend. Only Betsy offered straight talk and specifics. To watch Betsy’s opening statement and the full debate, click the link below.

| [](https://www.runbetsyrun.com/osucascadedebate?e=40b20d4397498f3af7dfb5987b4a98d3&utm_source=rbr&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=this_week_in_brigade_news6&n=2 "WATCH DEBATE HERE") [WATCH DEBATE HERE](https://www.runbetsyrun.com/osucascadedebate?e=40b20d4397498f3af7dfb5987b4a98d3&utm_source=rbr&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=this_week_in_brigade_news6&n=2)
---
* * *
### **Upcoming Debates**
If you missed Tuesday’s debate, you have three more opportunities to see Betsy in action! All three debates will be livestreamed on the TV host’s website:
**Tuesday, October 4**
6:00-7:00pm
Livestream can be viewed on KATU.com
**Thursday, October 6**
7:00-8:00pm
Livestream can be viewed on KOBI.com
**Wednesday, October 19**
7:00-8:00pm
Livestream can be viewed on KGW.com
* * *
### **Betsy on Fox News**
Last Tuesday, Betsy went on America Reports on Fox News to talk crime, homelessness and how she will help save the state we all love. To watch the full interview, click the link below.

[WATCH INTERVIEW HERE](https://www.runbetsyrun.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6qAmGtJ6iQZQYCIGdG9DMYaBGFLTxpqodqR7BMVzaF33Vl2J1mEjJPHF8VrTm0us1w&e=40b20d4397498f3af7dfb5987b4a98d3&utm_source=rbr&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=this_week_in_brigade_news6&n=3)
* * *
### **Endorsement Alert!**
Betsy has now been endorsed by BOTH the former chair of the Democratic Party of Oregon, Margaret Carter, and the former chair of the Republican Party of Oregon, Herman Baertschiger Jr. These leaders are putting our state above party politics because they know Betsy is the only candidate who can lead Oregon forward.
* * *
### **Betsy Talks Lawlessness and Crime in Lents**
Betsy spoke with residents and business owners in the Lents neighborhood of Portland about the impact of lawlessness and crime in their community. As governor, Betsy will not tolerate rising violence, lawlessness or mob rule and will always support responsible law enforcement. That’s why Betsy is the only candidate in this race who has been endorsed by more than 90 Oregon law enforcement professionals and victims’ rights advocates. To read more about Betsy’s meeting in Lents, read the article below.

[](https://www.runbetsyrun.com/r?u=3BhYFRoGkTQU-QCBnYU78OE1RYYj7_tJn17WuCz2QAD2cKKMGocfYuOMPjzEAaEyvoCP0sfn9Y7jC8KB39X4D7BQhyo3tE5EyC2PKGBBPw1c59MOCgKGMMjm280ez7ZDVXPcZSDjume5B7xIP59MVailfceeHqQIWE2GE_lvwOIdfyymB6tXlbGGYjogcjOZJ3gN6jnM31VjfYhN6NRbhuTgcQ8JrJeIf1YazjnufUTmsHVJpZYuulLS5eD-O0CyQsdMPlvYFAfenfpHe-Ed0ckB2HsCAXupLkS36zEv3W4&e=40b20d4397498f3af7dfb5987b4a98d3&utm_source=rbr&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=this_week_in_brigade_news6&n=4 "READ ARTICLE HERE") [READ ARTICLE HERE](https://www.runbetsyrun.com/r?u=3BhYFRoGkTQU-QCBnYU78OE1RYYj7_tJn17WuCz2QAD2cKKMGocfYuOMPjzEAaEyvoCP0sfn9Y7jC8KB39X4D7BQhyo3tE5EyC2PKGBBPw1c59MOCgKGMMjm280ez7ZDVXPcZSDjume5B7xIP59MVailfceeHqQIWE2GE_lvwOIdfyymB6tXlbGGYjogcjOZJ3gN6jnM31VjfYhN6NRbhuTgcQ8JrJeIf1YazjnufUTmsHVJpZYuulLS5eD-O0CyQsdMPlvYFAfenfpHe-Ed0ckB2HsCAXupLkS36zEv3W4&e=40b20d4397498f3af7dfb5987b4a98d3&utm_source=rbr&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=this_week_in_brigade_news6&n=4)
---
* * *
### **From the Archives: Vintage Betsy**
Betsy has been working on behalf of the people of Oregon for decades. Check out this piece on Betsy Johnson from 1991 from KATU’s archives. Click the link below to watch.

[](https://www.runbetsyrun.com/r?u=GQ96LxW7tJscudkL8mlwNzVEKXk7dMDJzwJlfbbiiRYRA3fxrlLtl7OFfDn4_qfU&e=40b20d4397498f3af7dfb5987b4a98d3&utm_source=rbr&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=this_week_in_brigade_news6&n=5)

| | Friend, If you turn on the news, you've probably heard it... The media is calling me a fascist, a racist, and a threat to Democracy. **That's how I know I'm doing something right! **

name: Alex Witt
subject: this is why we need a nurse in the Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trudy Busch Valentine for Senate
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/51839208/370450905/-1746441832?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk330-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzQ4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNmQ5MjM4MC04ZDQyLWVkMTEtYjQ5NS0wMDIyNDgzMmU0Y2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5G_S7oV0YQNYWxOKlQUJiwvDuxOLXds2auNcKeeUHbA=)
---
Hi Peter, it's Trudy's campaign manager, Alex, again. You've probably heard from our team about how hard we are working to send the first nurse to the Senate. **[And I'm about to ask you to help us do that by chipping in $5 tonight.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/51839209/370450906/-1746441832?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk330-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzQ4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNmQ5MjM4MC04ZDQyLWVkMTEtYjQ5NS0wMDIyNDgzMmU0Y2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5G_S7oV0YQNYWxOKlQUJiwvDuxOLXds2auNcKeeUHbA=)**
But first, I want to take a moment to make sure you know _why_ we are so passionate about electing a nurse.
You see, nurses solve problems every day.**When things go wrong, they don't give up or tap out; they face the challenge head-on with creative solutions.** And the problems that nurses face are never cut and dried. They manage complex and competing needs – a single patient could easily have three different diagnoses and half a dozen prescriptions.
Nurses interact with huge teams – and they have to learn how to work with some pretty big egos. But throughout this whole process, they always keep the patient's well-being as their number one priority. A nurse is your most attentive ally and fiercest advocate. **They put caring for you above everything else.**
Any of this sounding similar to another job?
To be effective leaders for their constituents, senators need all of these same skills: Navigating intricate networks of stakeholders, solving hairy problems, and all the while keeping those they took an oath to serve front and center. **But right now, far too many of our leaders in Washington lack these essential abilities that come as second nature to nurses like Trudy.**
That's why we're so excited about electing Trudy this November. But the GOP is spending big to keep this seat red and make sure Trudy never gets to Washington. To defeat our far-right opponent, we need your help.
**[Please, if you believe the Senate needs a nurse's heart and mind, will you chip in $5 to send Trudy to the Senate and flip Missouri blue? We're in the final stretch here, and your donation will make all the difference on Election Day.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/51839210/370450907/-1746441832?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk330-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzQ4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNmQ5MjM4MC04ZDQyLWVkMTEtYjQ5NS0wMDIyNDgzMmU0Y2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5G_S7oV0YQNYWxOKlQUJiwvDuxOLXds2auNcKeeUHbA=)**

clean_body: | | | = Hi Peter, it's Trudy's campaign manager, Alex, again. You've probably heard from our team about how hard we are working to send the first nurse to the Senate. = But first, I want to take a moment to make sure you know why we are so passionate about electing a nurse. You see, nurses solve problems every day.When things go wrong, they don't give up or tap out; they face the challenge head-on with creative solutions. And the problems that nurses face are never cut and dried. They manage complex and competing needs – a single patient could easily have three different diagnoses and half a dozen prescriptions. Nurses interact with huge teams – and they have to learn how to work with some pretty big egos. But throughout this whole process, they always keep the patient's well-being as their number one priority. A nurse is your most attentive ally and fiercest advocate. They put caring for you above everything else. Any of this sounding similar to another job? To be effective leaders for their constituents, senators need all of these same skills: Navigating intricate networks of stakeholders, solving hairy problems, and all the while keeping those they took an oath to serve front and center. But right now, far too many of our leaders in Washington lack these essential abilities that come as second nature to nurses like Trudy. That's why we're so excited about electing Trudy this November. But the GOP is spending big to keep this seat red and make sure Trudy never gets to Washington. To defeat our far-right opponent, we need your help. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thanks for everything that you do to support this team, Alex Witt (Trudy's Campaign Manager) | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Contributions to Trudy Busch Valentine for Senate are not tax deductible. | | 2022 | Paid for by Trudy Busch Valentine for Senate Trudy Busch Valentine for Senate PO Box 11826 Clayton, MO 63105 United States

subject: Republicans only have to flip one seat

body:
| | |
---
We have a big problem, friend: **We fell short of last night's extended end-of-quarter fundraising goal – and now, we're 2 points behind in _the_ race that could decide Senate control.**
Republicans only have to flip one seat to retake the majority, and experts at _FiveThirtyEight_ are calling me the most vulnerable Democratic senator up for reelection. That's why the GOP is coming after me as its TOP target for defeat.
**These attacks will only keep coming, friend – and with this new fundraising gap, we're falling short of what we need to fight back. **[With only a few weeks to go before Election Day, will you please rush $5 right now to help us close this budget shortfall immediately, keep Georgia blue, and defend our Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/51816618/370420735/-598064402?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk4436-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZGFlMmFmYi02YjQyLWVkMTEtYjQ5NS0wMDIyNDgzMmU0Y2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rGWgD6NuZGyU2lqp-aWXptvAtRjcJYqkEyI7tIEbVfM=)

I'm in this fight to give everyday folks like you and me a voice in Washington, not to serve millionaire megadonors or corporate PACs. That's why I've never taken corporate PAC money – not even a cent.
Meanwhile, my GOP opponent, Herschel Walker, has raised $20 MILLION from Trump allies across the country – and he's using it to crush our people-powered campaign. I know we can beat the GOP's money machine, because we've done it before – but missing fundraising goals like this could put our entire movement in jeopardy.
**Every minute we waste by not hitting our goal is another minute we give the GOP to mobilize against us. So please, friend, I need you now: [Will you give ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/51816621/370420737/-598064402?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk4436-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZGFlMmFmYi02YjQyLWVkMTEtYjQ5NS0wMDIyNDgzMmU0Y2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rGWgD6NuZGyU2lqp-aWXptvAtRjcJYqkEyI7tIEbVfM=) ****[$5 or more ASAP – as much as you can spare by midnight tonight – so we can win in Georgia and defend our Democratic Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/51816623/370420738/-598064402?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk4436-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZGFlMmFmYi02YjQyLWVkMTEtYjQ5NS0wMDIyNDgzMmU0Y2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rGWgD6NuZGyU2lqp-aWXptvAtRjcJYqkEyI7tIEbVfM=)**
Thank you so much.

– Sen. Raphael Warnock
**Please read on for a personal message from Sen. Rev. Raphael Warnock:** Friend – thank you. I’m grateful to have grassroots folks like you standing alongside me in our critical fights for justice. Our midterm elections are taking place this November, and I need your help.

With Democrats’ razor-thin majority in the Senate, Republicans have to flip just one seat to retake control – and experts say that I’m the most vulnerable Democratic senator up for reelection. Mitch McConnell and his GOP allies are flooding Georgia with millions to defeat me, and GOP super PACs are smearing me with attack ads. We need to fight back now – but I don't take a dime from corporate PACs, so I'm fully relying on your grassroots support to power this campaign to victory.

If you’re with me in this fight, _[**please donate now to win in Georgia and defend our Democratic Senate majority.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/51816625/370420739/-598064402?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk4436-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZGFlMmFmYi02YjQyLWVkMTEtYjQ5NS0wMDIyNDgzMmU0Y2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rGWgD6NuZGyU2lqp-aWXptvAtRjcJYqkEyI7tIEbVfM=)_ If you’d like to become one of my TOP supporters and receive exclusive updates from our campaign team, **text “GEORGIA” to 52005.**

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Our final Priorities Survey before Election Day
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR CONGRESS
body:
| With 37 days to go until Election Day, I’m reaching out one more time to hear your thoughts
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=1020%2E5257348%2ERl7dsO)
Derek, with 37 days to go until Election Day, I’m reaching out one more time to hear your thoughts — what issues you think Democrats should be campaigning on to keep our majorities in Washington.
[**Take our Pre-Election Priorities Survey to let me know:**](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1023?c0=engagement-20221002-october-priorities-survey.g_Ar_6&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20221002_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=1020%2E5257348%2ERl7dsO)
[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1023?c0=engagement-20221002-october-priorities-survey.g_Ar_6&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20221002_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=5&akid=1020%2E5257348%2ERl7dsO)
---
This Congress has passed new laws signed by President Biden that include meaningful gun safety legislation for the first time in three decades.
The largest-ever investment in climate resilience and clean energy.
The biggest infrastructure investment in half a century.
Laws paving the way for 21st-century manufacturing of semiconductors here in the U.S.
Expansion of veterans’ health care and lowering premiums and the cost of prescription drugs.
The American Rescue Plan.
And with Friday’s investiture of Justice Ketanji Brown Jackson, the first Black woman confirmed to serve on the United States Supreme Court.
It’s a massive list, and one that not many believed we could accomplish with a bare 50-50 Senate majority and a bare majority of a few seats in the House. But we got it done. Democrats delivered.
[**Now, I’m asking for your input this one last time before Election Day barely 5 weeks from now. Let me know your top priorities, what you want Democrats campaigning on, and the legislation you want to see passed in the next Congress. Take our Pre-Election Priorities Survey today.**](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1023?c0=engagement-20221002-october-priorities-survey.g_Ar_6&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20221002_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=6&akid=1020%2E5257348%2ERl7dsO)
[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1023?c0=engagement-20221002-october-priorities-survey.g_Ar_6&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20221002_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=7&akid=1020%2E5257348%2ERl7dsO)
---
Thanks as always for your input.
All my best,
— Adam
150 E. Olive Ave., Suite 208 Burbank CA, 91502
**[www.adamschiff.com](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/60?t=2&akid=1020%2E5257348%2ERl7dsO) | [contact@adamschiff.com](mailto:contact@adamschiff.com) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/64?t=3&akid=1020%2E5257348%2ERl7dsO)**
PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR CONGRESS
---

Hello,
I’ve got 20 minutes before my next event, so I wanted to send you a quick email about the latest in my campaign against Chuck Grassley.
Iowa was one of the closest Senate races in 2020, and it’s going to be even closer this November. Every poll shows Grassley is more unpopular than he’s ever been, and I’m gaining ground quickly. We’re in a statistical tie in the latest polling.
I’m running for Senate because our democracy is under attack. We need to take real action to stop gun violence, protect voting rights, and finally get corrupting money out of our politics.
But Chuck Grassley has no interest in any of that. His big source of cash is corporate PAC checks from the NRA and Faux News – yes, even Fox “News” gave Grassley a big campaign check last quarter.
Whether or not we win and turn Iowa blue will decide if Democrats keep control of the Senate – or hand the reins off to obstructionist Mitch McConnell. That’s why I’m staring down unprecedented amounts of Super PAC spending.
**I’m ready to fight for everyday Iowans in the Senate. I’m not taking a dime of corporate PAC money. But with the polls this close, I need your immediate help now to fight back against the lies being told about me, and to win.**

---
Peter,

My spineless opponent Katie Hobbs has a new friend - the darling of the Radical Left and failed California Governor Gavin Newsom.

**At Hobbs 's direction - Newsom has now dumped $150,000 into Arizona overnight so the left can pay their political operatives and continue their desperate fight to win this election.**

Katie Hobbs is hiding from voters and staying away from the debate stage because she's scared to go face-to-face with voters and explain her Radical positions, and she's terrified of a one-on-one face-off with me. | [**RUSH $25 FOR MY CAMPAIGN** ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61467125:6FVep9VN-:m:1:3331421248:8E106FE0C21AFE2EC276D6538BE78C4F:r)

**Our one problem right now is funding. We 're in the middle of a HUGE media blitz to get the truth out and combat the Fake News Media, but we're hemorrhaging cash quickly.**

**If you 're dedicated to stopping the spread of the Socialist Left and putting America First, I've created a secure donation portal for you below so you can help me level the playing field in Arizona and WIN on November 8th.**

clean_body: Help me stop them. | Peter, My spineless opponent Katie Hobbs has a new friend - the darling of the Radical Left and failed California Governor Gavin Newsom. At Hobbs 's direction - Newsom has now dumped $150,000 into Arizona overnight so the left can pay their political operatives and continue their desperate fight to win this election. Katie Hobbs is hiding from voters and staying away from the debate stage because she's scared to go face-to-face with voters and explain her Radical positions, and she's terrified of a one-on-one face-off with me. | But she has a plan, and some people say it MAY work. It 's simple, really - amass a big enough war chest so that Hobbs can win the election by flooding the airwaves with Leftist propaganda and scaring Republicans away from the ballot boxes, all without ever answering to the people. The Left's Establishment allies and even RINOs like Liz Cheney are desperate to stop us. Still, we've got the people of Arizona on our side, and Conservative Americans across America are fighting for us tooth and nail. Our one problem right now is funding. We 're in the middle of a HUGE media blitz to get the truth out and combat the Fake News Media, but we're hemorrhaging cash quickly. If you 're dedicated to stopping the spread of the Socialist Left and putting America First, I've created a secure donation portal for you below so you can help me level the playing field in Arizona and WIN on November 8th. body:
Breaking news from TWO of the nation's closest swing states...
| | | ******BREAKING: _Two key Senate Democrats are in DEADLOCKED races_ \-- and GOP megadonors are spending MILLIONS to beat them!

As I discussed with Tucker Carlson recently, _if these elites are NOT calling you all of these slurs and attacking you, then you're probably not truly representing the people. _

Friend, I know you've probably been called the same names if you've ever stood for strong borders, constitutional values, or mentioned you only believe in TWO genders. The left has undoubtedly tried to intimidate you and scare you into silence. _And for too long, it 's worked! _ For years, Republicans stood on the sidelines while the Radical Left waged war on our values. [**IT 'S TIME TO FIGHT BACK >> **](http://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=67774f149f0d458eb9a7e8a26ede5eeb&_e=f8H9WHAM4jv94YMKo5BEr6jW6pkWBBtgRYGbqU0nBt2q6LPszr98OA9MXPc2mrgSp20sn5LC-CWs5jDluG04uBHMwYTs0--3mogb65CPjrpEBb8_3_Voh2vIx7k15KBEjqJr0q0ZCXODmtxGLR42UUHUYdnW_7t0L3iYn7L6RBNttQF3OMJbsUio_OxOXKKy0iRGwS_Y8h_dLcQ4W6J0AUJDJWiwWcp2YoMwIO7L2d3GJsoqBChLxS4oyOapOee250XLoOlf3wPLqadc7S5OsWvQOslegOgBHwPv5GNkSQ2DZnIAwWgmsp6kCo-pJ67db_G8uhNyvSi0PFqiOH_YWPUsEUcqJajElj8bCpKpKl90ITSjgxbRBm-BwTkFZM6h2dB81nqfnn_ZBmeNrxJP6g%3D%3D) We stayed quiet while they turned our schools into indoctrination centers. We did nothing while our border was wide open for drugs and criminals to walk into our communities. We refused to fight back when they called us the most terrible names you've ever heard. **Then real, conservative leadership came along. THE NEW RIGHT, as I like to call it. ** _We told the truth: But we cannot be afraid of the left. We can only fear what happens if we do not stand up to them._ **I won 't be silent. I'm going to fight. Because that's what we need to do to SAVE AMERICA.**
---

clean_body: | | | | | Friend, If you turn on the news, you've probably heard it... The media is calling me a fascist, a racist, and a threat to Democracy. That's how I know I'm doing something right! As I discussed with Tucker Carlson recently, if these elites are NOT calling you all of these slurs and attacking you, then you're probably not truly representing the people. Friend, I know you've probably been called the same names if you've ever stood for strong borders, constitutional values, or mentioned you only believe in TWO genders. The left has undoubtedly tried to intimidate you and scare you into silence. And for too long, it 's worked! For years, Republicans stood on the sidelines while the Radical Left waged war on our values. We stayed quiet while they turned our schools into indoctrination centers. We did nothing while our border was wide open for drugs and criminals to walk into our communities. We refused to fight back when they called us the most terrible names you've ever heard. Then real, conservative leadership came along. THE NEW RIGHT, as I like to call it. We told the truth: But we cannot be afraid of the left. We can only fear what happens if we do not stand up to them. I won 't be silent. I'm going to fight. Because that's what we need to do to SAVE AMERICA. It starts in Arizona. Thank you in advance for helping carry the NEW RIGHT over the finish line in Arizona in November. Sincerely, Kari Lake Candidate for Arizona Governor | | | Sent to Conservatives Give subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

Because, to be honest with you, Peter, my nonstop quest for justice and equality in New York has earned me a _lot_ of powerful enemies. **Between my GOP opponent accepting tens of thousands of dollars from a “Stop the Steal” conspiracy theorist and the Republican Attorneys General Association raising millions to remove progressive attorneys general like me from office, missing my public filing goal could be _detrimental_ to my campaign.
