But we still have a chance of making up this difference before my numbers go public tomorrow night. A generous group of donors will be MATCHING the next 482 gifts made to my campaign before midnight tomorrow – and I’m counting on fearless fighters like you to take advantage of this match. Peter, at a moment when so many of our fundamental rights are being trampled on, my work as your attorney general has never been more important. The powerful and corrupt will be poring over my fundraising numbers the moment they go public to see if they have what it takes to defeat me, so please: = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you for being by my side, Letitia \---------- Forwarded message ---------- From: Letitia Date: Sat, Oct 1, 2022 Subject: EXCLUSIVE MATCH: UNLOCKED 🔓 | | | = Peter, my FINAL public filing deadline of the election year is in just two days, and I need your help. After an impressive end-of-quarter push, I only have to raise another $30,000 before MIDNIGHT on Oct. 3 to hit my last major fundraising goal. I know that may sound like a lot, but here’s why I’m confident we can pull this off: A generous group of donors has agreed to MATCH the next 1,000 donations made to my campaign before midnight on Monday. So I must ask: = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = The moment my fundraising numbers become public on Monday night, all of the most powerful, corrupt, and well-funded actors that I have fought to hold accountable will be poring over my fundraising numbers. They’ll be looking for any hint of weakness – and we cannot afford to give them one. Because, to be honest with you, Peter, my nonstop quest for justice and equality in New York has earned me a lot of powerful enemies. They will eagerly jump on any opportunity they find to poke holes in our final election year push and give my Republican opponent an advantage over me. That’s why this exclusive match opportunity could not have come at a better time. Between my GOP opponent accepting tens of thousands of dollars from a “Stop the Steal” conspiracy theorist and the Republican Attorneys General Association raising millions to remove progressive attorneys general like me from office, missing my public filing goal could be detrimental to my campaign. So please: = | | = Thank you for being in this fight with me. Only a little over one month to go! Letitia | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. James for NY P.O. President Trump called on us to take back the House- but if we miss another critical fundraising deadline _we are going to fail.

The Left is out raising and outspending us. Pelosi's cronies are raking in huge sums of cash and spending it in some of our most competitive battleground districts to ensure our America-First candidates drown.

I'm only sending this Hail Mary to the most loyal Pro-Trump patriots because I know you won't let us down. This is your _last chance_ to help House Republicans make it to the endzone.

**It 's game over without you.**

It's all up to you. If you ignore our pleas and drop the ball, then our chances of winning are gone.

Can you rush $25 by midnight to help us take back the House and fire Nancy Pelosi?

name: Josh Shapiro
subject: Hundreds from a neo-Nazi
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHAPIRO FOR PENNSYLVANIA
body:
Doug Mastriano has lost sight of his values.

**Derek, my opponent paid Gab — the fringe social media platform that empowered the Tree of Life killer to spread antisemitic, white nationalist rhetoric before murdering 11 Jewish people in Pittsburgh.** Now, we just learned that Gab’s CEO Andrew Torba also donated hundreds of dollars to Mastriano’s campaign. Torba isn’t your usual CEO, and Gab isn’t just another social media site – it’s a haven for neo-Nazis, Holocaust deniers, and prominent far-right actors. Let that sink in for a minute. In the last few years, violent extremists have received encouragement and support from their followers on Gab. In 2018, the killer that attacked the Tree of Life Synagogue in Pittsburgh spent the days leading up to this tragic event posting on Gab. Other social media sites would have moderated such content to prevent the spread of violence and hate, but Gab left it there for all to see. The fact that Doug Mastriano even has a Gab account and got special treatment from them is enough to cause alarm – but let’s be clear about who these people are. **They are part of the same website that empowered the Tree of Life killer — and they’re now on the side of Doug Mastriano.** Pennsylvania was founded on the idea of tolerance and loving our neighbors, not spreading vitriol and violence. It's clear that Doug Mastriano has lost sight of that. ****[Derek – I need your help in stopping Doug Mastriano’s campaign of hate and fear from gaining any ground in this election. Will you chip in to help me get my message out today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/51840170/370455624/-586780698?refcode=email_100222_torbagab_pasuper&amount=5&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&refcode2=4c76d92b-9642-ed11-b495-00224832e4ca&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTY5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0Yzc2ZDkyYi05NjQyLWVkMTEtYjQ5NS0wMDIyNDgzMmU0Y2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=odTXzpnHNDCM95xD_-8KXTm9Dzmnb9KxK6TTAf8Igkk=)**** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [Donate $5 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/51840171/370455625/-586780698?refcode=email_100222_torbagab_pasuper&amount=5&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&express_lane=true&refcode2=4c76d92b-9642-ed11-b495-00224832e4ca&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTY5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0Yzc2ZDkyYi05NjQyLWVkMTEtYjQ5NS0wMDIyNDgzMmU0Y2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=odTXzpnHNDCM95xD_-8KXTm9Dzmnb9KxK6TTAf8Igkk=)

McConnell knows Senate control will be decided by our race – so he's rallying his megadonor allies to flood Walker's campaign with MILLIONS to defeat me. With polls showing me neck and neck with Walker, we have absolutely ZERO room for error. That's why we set a rapid-response goal to raise $50,000 before midnight to fight back against the GOP's spending spree, pull ahead, and win this race. So please, friend, don't let us get outraised and outspent before Election Day:= I appreciate you stepping up when it's needed most. – Rev. subject: Thank you.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten for Congress
body:
I’m so thankful to have this team by my side.

| **I’m writing today to say thank you.**

Because grassroots supporters like you stepped up when we needed it most, we were able to hit our ambitious fundraising goal for the final quarterly fundraising deadline before Election Day.

With just 37 days until the election, and Michiganders already casting their ballots, we can’t afford to slow down now. National experts agree that this district **“LEANS DEMOCRAT”** – which you can bet means Republicans will be pouring serious cash into their efforts to keep it **RED**. I’m so thankful to have this team by my side.

With gratitude,
Hillary

clean_body: | | Friend, We have three exciting chances for you to meet or get to know Brenda and meet fellow supporters coming up. We hope you all can make it! | House Party in Burlington When: Tonight! Sunday, October 2, 6-8pm Where: Arshad Hasan's home; 120 South Champlain St, Burlington Join us to celebrate the incredible work Brenda's done, already winning across the state! We are ready for housing for all, heal the overdose crisis, end climate change, and support reproductive rights for all. We know that when we all rise together, we can make change. We are coming together to celebrate all the success thus far of this campaign, and to continue pushing our momentum forward into the general election! All are welcome. Meet, Greet & Listening Session When: Tuesday October 4th at 1pm Where: Pioneer Apartments, 155 Main St, Montpelier, VT Hosted by Morgan Brown. This is a chance for you to get to know Brenda. She wants to hear from you, answer questions, listen to you, and spend time getting to know you! Vermonters For Brenda Party When: Wednesday October 12, 5:30-7PM Where: Bear Naked Growler Pub on 186 River St, Montpelier Join us October 12th, from 5:30-7PM at the Bear Naked Growler Pub for a house party to support Brenda Siegel for Governor! The event will be hosted by DNC members Tim Jerman and Mary Sullivan with special guests Mike Pieciak, Anne Lezak, and more! Come to support Brenda and speak with Brenda, her staff, and her supporters! All are welcome! If you have any questions, please email Bryan Parks at mailto:bryan@brendaforvermont.com We hope to see you attend at least one of these exciting events! Come to hear what Brenda will do to create a Vermont that works for all of us. All are welcome! If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: Thank you, Team Siegel | | | | | | Copyright (C) 2022 Brenda for Vermont. All rights reserved.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/51824560/370435117/-598064402?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk4434-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiM2Y5Y2NhNi03YTQyLWVkMTEtYjQ5NS0wMDIyNDgzMmU0Y2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CQTo-CZntDG5bYXul2wFOHJ4xMmFNJJk14ZWuDHb5I0=)
**[With time running out before our _extended_ end-of-quarter fundraising deadline _,_ we need you now more than ever: Rush $5 or more by midnight tonight to help us fight back, keep Georgia blue, and defend our Senate majority!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/51824561/370435118/-598064402?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk4434-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiM2Y5Y2NhNi03YTQyLWVkMTEtYjQ5NS0wMDIyNDgzMmU0Y2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CQTo-CZntDG5bYXul2wFOHJ4xMmFNJJk14ZWuDHb5I0=)**

This is an all-hands-on-deck moment: **We fell short of our end-of-quarter goal with only 37 days until Election Day – in the race experts at _POLITICO_ say could decide Senate control.**
That's why Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and the entire GOP establishment are laser-focused on this race. They've already pumped _millions_ into our potential opponent's campaign to attack Sen. Warnock and turn Georgia red. **Now, polling shows our people-powered movement TWO POINTS DOWN.**
**With so much at stake – from voting rights to climate justice – we need to defend Sen. Warnock's crucial seat to secure a progressive future for our country. ****[_So please, friend, will you give $5 or more right now – as much as you can spare before midnight tonight – to help us close our budget gap, win in Georgia, and defend our Democratic Senate majority?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/51824562/370435119/-598064402?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk4434-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiM2Y5Y2NhNi03YTQyLWVkMTEtYjQ5NS0wMDIyNDgzMmU0Y2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CQTo-CZntDG5bYXul2wFOHJ4xMmFNJJk14ZWuDHb5I0=)**

Peter, great news!

I have been named the newest “Young Gun” by Republican House Leader Kevin McCarthy and the National Republican Congressional Committee (NRCC).

The “Young Guns” program supports Republicans in competitive congressional races across the country and has helped elect over 150 members to Congress. I am honored to receive their support; **they recognize how close our race is in CT-05 and how valuable our campaign is to taking back the House.**

**But now I’m an even bigger target to the national Democrats and their _SLIM_ majority. They will pour all of their resources and hundreds of thousands of dollars to prevent us from flipping this seat RED.**

That is why we are setting a [**goal of $20,000 to reach in the next 72 hours**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=de5bf7e1a2aa48c3ab0265866f914580&_e=TGnDw5TWJrK_dLeErV1gpI9kCxvSZ4yQbcdzxZ8tE1rYCTJKaj82Ry5IKZvDVRYMXtOQ_rmW65jkdrMj6HUvFJEJSAp3vdH7OEPUlom5nKZu2Cf9BdxMtEAp5lrIPgIlWrap61ET2ofYeKxWuhxXDEDjvQBSbYuDuRKCnkdcYR0EobgCow_3-OYrgejOE8VY_PqJdsgcV1JhAFe8TC_LL5d9LtovMuzcEzkL2vGaGCi77iSOMg9ApO6KkCskPH3pTfdgBGd8VocvsFqYhE5A4I-Rs3ek3k3g3G_16mMk42z8URY38yrHxQ8AFVSp9CPwqSfLuQTC3J7EHUPT6VVaqW5Sw5ECh_rMswV-Dda4wyRBDFSLtlSGCuXx_Gn6RM0tdeD9rC1_7vnRxkgsRbJBTKiXrOatNfouyfep1mfXh7LQ7k-JCTIUMTEw1np3jA8W) to ensure we have the funds needed for any attacks that will come in the next month, [**and we need your help to reach it!**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=de5bf7e1a2aa48c3ab0265866f914580&_e=TGnDw5TWJrK_dLeErV1gpI9kCxvSZ4yQbcdzxZ8tE1rYCTJKaj82Ry5IKZvDVRYMXtOQ_rmW65jkdrMj6HUvFJEJSAp3vdH7OEPUlom5nKZu2Cf9BdxMtEAp5lrIPgIlWrap61ET2ofYeKxWuhxXDEDjvQBSbYuDuRKCnkdcYR0EobgCow_3-OYrgejOE8VY_PqJdsgcV1JhAFe8TC_LL5d9LtovMuzcEzkL2vGaGCi77iSOMg9ApO6KkCskPH3pTfdgBGd8VocvsFqYhE5A4LirriZtfPv6XiQF5TawjVtYR68wee_c_wROhAmug9F_s6kNeF7jbzXEgW4mvrXc6OZdc_w6_CgdMsXtYuFv0yAgzqHz5ArnAfYJbacQnApjlkX6_fQxRdl5ccByCyIdkqTa6L79FOMbsyGSgSbFb6FK6M7JZU_xC7mTsrLFip1o)

I know $20,000 might seem like a lofty goal, but Democrat Congressional Campaign Committee (DCCC) has raised over **$200 MILLION** this election cycle. **Every last dollar counts in a race this close.**

And this is a chance for us to make history! Connecticut hasn’t elected a Republican to the U.S. House in 14 years, and we are a **TOP-SEVEN** targeted race. **I refuse to allow this opportunity to slip away.**

[**Please, will you join Republican House Leader Kevin McCarthy and the NRCC in supporting me as we head into the final weeks of this campaign and help us reach our goal?**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=de5bf7e1a2aa48c3ab0265866f914580&_e=TGnDw5TWJrK_dLeErV1gpI9kCxvSZ4yQbcdzxZ8tE1rYCTJKaj82Ry5IKZvDVRYMXtOQ_rmW65jkdrMj6HUvFJEJSAp3vdH7OEPUlom5nKZu2Cf9BdxMtEAp5lrIPgIlWrap61ET2ofYeKxWuhxXDEDjvQBSbYuDuRKCnkdcYR0EobgCow_3-OYrgejOE8VY_PqJdsgcV1JhAFe8TC_LL5d9LtovMuzcEzkL2vGaGCi77iSOMg9ApO6KkCskPH3pTfdgBGd8VocvsFqYhE5A4M5CjHVE2Sj-epaX6BYTY8tYckNvkbklXXfmRGml7MBEbuX0Hy04rchbootasrgY13lceH1QBxDm8yLcs_EbrhgJ-rIqUvN3po5Hf3yVnpwbXdJk3_QwDOB8odXSPNBeSPe5wM6g1WoT69cRRXagTwrSCGYewIhSrBq1TlqY3gai)

But now I’m an even bigger target to the national Democrats and their SLIM majority. They will pour all of their resources and hundreds of thousands of dollars to prevent us from flipping this seat RED. That is why we are setting a to ensure we have the funds needed for any attacks that will come in the next month, | I know $20,000 might seem like a lofty goal, but Democrat Congressional Campaign Committee (DCCC) has raised over $200 MILLION this election cycle. Every last dollar counts in a race this close. And this is a chance for us to make history! Connecticut hasn’t elected a Republican to the U.S. House in 14 years, and we are a TOP-SEVEN targeted race. I refuse to allow this opportunity to slip away. If we truly want to take back the House and reinstate conservative leadership, we can’t let any time go to waste. Thank you, George S. | | Friend, If you turn on the news, you've probably heard it... The media is calling me a fascist, a racist, and a threat to Democracy. **That's how I know I'm doing something right! **
As I discussed with Tucker Carlson recently, _if these elites are NOT calling you all of these slurs and attacking you, then you're probably not truly representing the people. _

name: Ryan Zinke - Navy SEAL
subject: Closing the curtains on my campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Zinke for Congress
body:
I'm at my wits' end, Peter. Pelosi and the Democrats just have too much power, too many connections, and too much in their fundraising war chest. At this point, if I don't do a total 180 on the fundraising front, not only will my race be in danger, **_but Republicans may never win another race this year._** **Peter, this is Ryan Zinke. I served as President Trump 's Secretary of the Interior and I was the commander at SEAL Team 6.** **I 'm also running for Congress in the most critical race in the nation. I will never give up on this race, I will never back down - because Navy SEALs never quit.** But if Pelosi can destroy me in this race, I can guarantee you no other Republican will have a chance. **I have Trump 's endorsement, I lead the team of Navy SEAL's running for Congress, and I have more battle experience than anyone else.** [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61465170:JDCn19V_N:m:1:3253819041:E2FA1DA9AAA21E1D64DFD6C124FAECF0:r) The point is, Peter, I'm the toughest Republican running for office. If I can't beat Pelosi - no one can. So, I'm going to be blunt with you. [**If you chip in just $25 right now**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61465170:JDCn19V_N:m:1:3253819041:E2FA1DA9AAA21E1D64DFD6C124FAECF0:r), I can promise you that we will blow my fundraising goal out of the water and ruin Pelosi's plan to destroy our nation. I'm humbly asking you, as a warrior who's fought for this nation for my entire life, will you help me out? [**DONATE TODAY**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61465170:JDCn19V_N:m:1:3253819041:E2FA1DA9AAA21E1D64DFD6C124FAECF0:r) You have my word, as a former Navy SEAL and commander at SEAL Team 6, if you help me out, I will return the favor in Congress. Thank you for your support, Ryan Zinke [**DONATE TODAY**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61465170:JDCn19V_N:m:1:3253819041:E2FA1DA9AAA21E1D64DFD6C124FAECF0:r)

name: Alex Padilla
subject: Extremist Republicans are pushing to undo our progress.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
body:
#

Hi friends,
Since early 2021, I’ve had the honor of representing our state in Washington, D.C. — working night and day to make it easier for Californians to succeed in school, work, and life.
Democrats have passed landmark legislation that affects everyday Americans: lowering the cost of insulin, investing in our roads and bridges, and helping folks recover financially from the worst pandemic in a century.
**We’ve come so far from Donald Trump’s term full of chaos and corruption.**
But friends: Kevin McCarthy and his ultra-MAGA Republicans are pushing a radical agenda that will undo all the progress we’ve made.
They want to limit reproductive freedoms, roll back climate change initiatives, and gut health care. They’re even targeting democracy itself.
It’s clear: Republicans have laid out their vision for California -- and that’s to take us back to some of our darkest days.
With so much at stake, it’s critical we do everything we can to retain our Democratic majority.
[**That’s why I’m teaming up with the California Democratic Party so we can help elect and re-elect Democrats in tough races across the state. Please, will you split a donation today between my campaign and CADEM? Every dollar helps, so chip in anything you can. >>**](https://act.alex-padilla.com/go/553?c0=ap-em-oct22-cadem.b9VWt7&refcode=em221002-1-30&t=1&akid=1041%2E159979%2EfidlnJ)
**[DONATE](https://act.alex-padilla.com/go/553?c0=ap-em-oct22-cadem.b9VWt7&refcode=em221002-1-30&t=2&akid=1041%2E159979%2EfidlnJ)**
Thank you,
Sen. Alex Padilla

name: Mandela Barnes
subject: A chance to explain
disclaimer_text: Paid for by AB PAC
body:
The way we're going to win this race is by building the largest grassroots coalition that Wisconsin has ever seen.
| | |
---
Friend –
I am about to ask you to make a $15 contribution to my campaign for U.S. Senate in Wisconsin. Please give me a chance to explain why your contribution is so important – especially today.

Here's the deal:
I am now the Democratic nominee for U.S. Senate in Wisconsin and am up against Ron Johnson in the general election.

If Democrats are going to have any chance at defending the Senate majority, we need to win in Wisconsin. This race is a critical opportunity to flip a Republican-held seat, and I cannot do it without your support.

Defeating Ron Johnson will not be easy. The Republican Party and their super PACs will stop at nothing to defend this seat. We are up against significant amounts of outside spending, and it's going to require a lot of grassroots donations to give our campaign the resources we need to win.

So today is one of those days when I need to ask:
[**Can you please make a $15 contribution to my campaign for U.S. Senate in Wisconsin and American Bridge PAC today? I'm not taking any corporate PAC money, so your contribution will go a long way toward putting us in a position to win this race.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/51825810/370439601/-722075692?amounts=15,25,50,100,250&amount=15&refcode=jtk1730-bu-re1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImY1NmQ5NzczLTdkNDItZWQxMS1iNDk1LTAwMjI0ODMyZTRjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ESW7D0uQV57qfVEzvEgzFb7_Mrl39uvTfYo2Ml8XFMM=)

name: Ron Johnson
subject: a personal plea 🙏
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron Johnson For Senate, Inc
body:
|
---
| | | Peter,

I have never seen the Left more aggressive and out of control as they are in the last few days and weeks. Long gone are the days of polite discourse, the days when we could have disagreements without it ending in riots and chaos. Not only is the left posting the personal addresses of SCOTUS members on Twitter, but in Washington DC, activists are giving cash to restaurants to "out" SCOTUS members if they dine in.

I knew when I announced my campaign for re-election that this would be a campaign unlike one I've ever seen before, and it has. The vitriol and slander I've seen so far this year has never been paralleled.

The days of decorum have disappeared, but can and need to return. And that's why I'm running for re-election. Democrats have let major cities become crime ridden, they are behind the rising inflation we are experiencing at the pump and grocery stores, and this is just the beginning of their mayhem.

This is not a landscape that I want our children and grandchildren growing up in. I will always fight for their future, and I hope if you stand with me in that fight you'll stand with me right now in this campaign.

I hate asking for money - it's my least favorite thing to do. But the facts are simple. Democrats across the country are gearing up to make this Wisconsin Senate race the most expensive in history in an attempt to not just defeat me, but defeat our values and beliefs.

No donation is too small. $5 makes a difference. $5 can help us reach that one undecided voter and ensure they get out and vote and keep WI red.

I know our nation's brightest days are ahead of us, but getting there isn't going to be easy. _**[We can win in November if I can count on your support right now.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61469529:6fKkm9VlN:m:1:3334294963:999237D374B512AB442C3683D623D1A6:r "Johnson1")**_

Please, Peter, our future is counting on our actions today.

Thanks for reading this email. I appreciate you and your family.

Thank you for your support,
Ron

---
| |

I refuse to jeopardize America's future. I know you feel the same.

_**[**Can I personally ask you to join me in this fight for Freedom, Peter?**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61469530:6fKkm9VlN:m:1:3334294963:999237D374B512AB442C3683D623D1A6:r "Can I personally ask

clean_body: | | | | Peter, I have never seen the Left more aggressive and out of control as they are in the last few days and weeks. Long gone are the days of polite discourse, the days when we could have disagreements without it ending in riots and chaos. Not only is the left posting the personal addresses of SCOTUS members on Twitter, but in Washington DC, activists are giving cash to restaurants to "out" SCOTUS members if they dine in. I knew when I announced my campaign for re-election that this would be a campaign unlike one I've ever seen before, and it has. The vitriol and slander I've seen so far this year has never been paralleled. The days of decorum have disappeared, but can and need to return. And that's why I'm running for re-election. Democrats have let major cities become crime ridden, they are behind the rising inflation we are experiencing at the pump and grocery stores, and this is just the beginning of their mayhem. This is not a landscape that I want our children and grandchildren growing up in. I will always fight for their future, and I hope if you stand with me in that fight you'll stand with me right now in this campaign. I hate asking for money - it's my least favorite thing to do. But the facts are simple. Democrats across the country are gearing up to make this Wisconsin Senate race the most expensive in history in an attempt to not just defeat me, but defeat our values and beliefs. No donation is too small. $5 makes a difference. $5 can help us reach that one undecided voter and ensure they get out and vote and keep WI red. I know our nation's brightest days are ahead of us, but getting there isn't going to be easy. "Johnson1" Please, Peter, our future is counting on our actions today. Thanks for reading this email. I appreciate you and your family. Thank you for your support, Ron | | | "footer image" A note from Ron Johnson: America is in peril. President Reagan warned that freedom is fragile, always one generation away from extinction. As I have told crowds since my first Tea Party speeches: this is a fight for freedom. This is not someone else 's fight, this is our fight, and it's a fight we absolutely must win.**************As a grandpa, dad, and businessman, I refuse to lose our country to radicals and woke liberals with their socialist agenda. I refuse to jeopardize America's future. I know you feel the same. "Can I personally ask you to join me in this fight for Freedom, %%=v\(@sFirstName\=%%?")************ | | "button" | Paid for by Ron Johnson For Senate, Inc. clean_body: Experts all over the country agree that Arizona is going to be one of the closest races in the country this year. All eyes are on us. | | Derek -- I’m writing to ask you to make a contribution -- $10 or whatever you can afford -- ahead of next month’s midterm elections. Split a donation of $10 between my campaign and the DNC to defeat far-right national Republicans and win races like mine. Here’s the truth: Experts agree that Arizona is going to be one of the closest races in the country this year. All eyes are on us. And to top it all off, my opponent has the full support and endorsement of Donald Trump. So we can expect more rallies and attacks from the former president aimed at amping up his base. This is a lot, I know. Trump is putting the pressure on. Our opponent has Super PACs spending millions of dollars in attack ads against us. But we have each other. And that’s how we’ll win again. Thank you again. Your donation today -- especially now ahead of November -- really means a lot. Mark Mark Kelly U.S. Senator, Arizona The DNC's 2022 Congressional Split Series helps fundraise for and raise awareness around down-ballot Democrats in some of the most important races across the country. When you make a split donation to the DNC, your donation will not only benefit folks on the ballot this cycle -- it will also help create the lasting Democratic infrastructure Democrats need to win up and down the ballot in years to come. name: Mark Kelly
subject: Honest
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
I never thought I’d run for public office.
#
Peter —
I’ll be honest with you: When Gabby and I got married, I never thought this is the way things would turn out.
I never thought I’d run for public office. She was the elected official in the family — and on the International Space Station, I was about as far from Congress as you can get.
I never thought more than 1 million people would contribute and volunteer to help elect me.
And I never thought that I’d need to ask supporters to do more than that to defend this seat.
But I need to ask you to do more. We are facing millions of dollars in attack ads, the former president says beating me is the first step to “taking back America,” and my opponent is a GOP-extremist who supports a national abortion ban.
So, please. When you woke up today you probably didn’t think you’d make a donation to my re-election campaign, but I really need you if we’re going to hold this seat.

clean_body: I never thought I’d run for public office. Peter — I’ll be honest with you: When Gabby and I got married, I never thought this is the way things would turn out. I never thought I’d run for public office. She was the elected official in the family — and on the International Space Station, I was about as far from Congress as you can get. I never thought more than 1 million people would contribute and volunteer to help elect me. And I never thought that I’d need to ask supporters to do more than that to defend this seat. But I need to ask you to do more. We are facing millions of dollars in attack ads, the former president says beating me is the first step to “taking back America,” and my opponent is a GOP-extremist who supports a national abortion ban. So, please. When you woke up today you probably didn’t think you’d make a donation to my re-election campaign, but I really need you if we’re going to hold this seat. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be automatically split between Mark Kelly and Dick Durbin: = = = = = = = Thank you in advance for chipping in. It all adds up when we all do our part. Mark Kelly **= Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/51841234/370460475/2028753306?refcode=EM_BS_LEE_221002_FR_EOQTY_A0_NA_U1_X1_M1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYWJkZTdjNS1hMTQyLWVkMTEtYjQ5NS0wMDIyNDgzMmU0Y2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4WqLOPtjU-AVqjaqgOSeUjQC_wGppBA_qNYfu1-Ma7U=) Team, I have big news — Thanks to you and so many supporters across our district, we were able to reach our end-of-quarter goal! Reaching this goal was one of the biggest steps we’ve taken towards winning this election in November. And folks, I know mustering our strength to raise what we needed wasn’t easy. But, I’m being sincere when I tell you that it’s only going to get harder from here on out. **The Republican Party has already spent over $14 million against me so far** – a number that’s certain to grow in the next 37 days. **Our race recently became the most expensive House race in the country,** with there being $26 million poured into this district. If this isn’t a sign that the GOP sees our district as their top seat to flip, I don’t know what is! And we can’t forget, **poll after poll has shown that this race is a dead heat** between our campaign and my far-right radical opponent, April Becker. The countdown is on and I urgently need you by my side in this final leg of the race so we can keep Nevada blue and hold our House majority. [**I know we have it in us to win this race and save our House majority. clean_body: | | | = Team, I have big news — Thanks to you and so many supporters across our district, we were able to reach our end-of-quarter goal! Reaching this goal was one of the biggest steps we’ve taken towards winning this election in November. And folks, I know mustering our strength to raise what we needed wasn’t easy. But, I’m being sincere when I tell you that it’s only going to get harder from here on out. The Republican Party has already spent over $14 million against me so far – a number that’s certain to grow in the next 37 days. Our race recently became the most expensive House race in the country, with there being $26 million poured into this district. If this isn’t a sign that the GOP sees our district as their top seat to flip, I don’t know what is! And we can’t forget, poll after poll has shown that this race is a dead heat between our campaign and my far-right radical opponent, April Becker. The countdown is on and I urgently need you by my side in this final leg of the race so we can keep Nevada blue and hold our House majority. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = Let’s do this! |

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/51841247/370460517/1995090618?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkY2JkZTdjNS1hMTQyLWVkMTEtYjQ5NS0wMDIyNDgzMmU0Y2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zMTejRjnUtbqzJTxTzgDHEm0pQwXa3lgaOy9YpZ8JTQ=&emci=95652154-b341-ed11-b495-00224832e4ca&emdi=dcbde7c5-a142-ed11-b495-00224832e4ca&ceid=4568237)

| | Derek, Early Voting has begun here in Virginia, which means we’re coming down to the wire in one of the closest races in the entire country, in Virginia’s Second Congressional District. Not only is it essential that we re-elect Elaine Luria, but with so many other tight races across the country, we need to give the Congresswoman another term if we want to have any hope of keeping the House blue. **[_Help the Democratic Party of Virginia and my team keep our majority in the U.S. House by splitting a $5 contribution between us._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/51841248/370460518/-1775601750?refcode=mw_em_221002_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkY2JkZTdjNS1hMTQyLWVkMTEtYjQ5NS0wMDIyNDgzMmU0Y2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zMTejRjnUtbqzJTxTzgDHEm0pQwXa3lgaOy9YpZ8JTQ=)** With the help of Virginians across the Commonwealth, we can defend Congresswoman Luria’s hard work and keep the House blue. Virginians deserve leaders who have their best interests at heart – like protecting access to abortion rights, creating an economy that works for all, improving our public education system, defending our Commonwealth from the effects of climate change – and Democrats are poised to get it done. But getting that work done requires a Democratic House and Elaine Luria representing VA-02. **[_Will you split a contribution between my team and the DPVA to help send our Virginia Democrats back to Washington to continue our progress?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/51841249/370460519/-1775601750?refcode=mw_em_221002_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkY2JkZTdjNS1hMTQyLWVkMTEtYjQ5NS0wMDIyNDgzMmU0Y2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zMTejRjnUtbqzJTxTzgDHEm0pQwXa3lgaOy9YpZ8JTQ=)** See you at the polls, Mark Warner **[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/51841250/370460520/-1775601750?refcode=mw_em_221002_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkY2JkZTdjNS1hMTQyLWVkMTEtYjQ5NS0wMDIyNDgzMmU0Y2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zMTejRjnUtbqzJTxTzgDHEm0pQwXa3lgaOy9YpZ8JTQ=)**

**_For Immediate Release:__October_ _2, 2_**** _022_** **_Contact: Jeanne Hendricks, info@hendricks2022.com_** _Democrat Jeanne Hendricks Challenges NRCC Chair & GOP U.S. Rep. Tom Emmer to Debate the Issues_

| [ ](http://clicksp.hendricks2022.com/f/a/c7Ss1njEipYxTlR85FiUGg~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRlHF5KP0SMaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaGVuZHJpY2tzMjAyMi5jb20vP2NkbWM9MkZhZ0JEODJwTkFoNnpvSUNmSGlpNEZ2ek50JnJlZmNvZGUyPTJGYWdCRDgycE5BaDZ6b0lDZkhpaTRGdnpOdCZyZWZjb2RlY2RtYz0yRmFnQkQ4MnBOQWg2em9JQ2ZIaWk0RnZ6TnRXA3NwY0IKYzNK2TljWnNjS1IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAIM~)

**ST. CLOUD, MINNESOTA --** Jeanne Hendricks, Democratic nominee for U.S. Congress in Minnesota's 6th District, challenges NRCC Chair and GOP U.S. Rep. Tom Emmer to debate the issues on Tuesday, October 25th, 2022, two weeks before the general election, through this press release. If Rep. Emmer has a scheduling conflict, the Jeanne Hendricks campaign can change the proposed debate date to one that is more convenient. "I challenge Rep. Emmer to debate the issues of women's rights, lowering inflation, creating family wage paying jobs, passing more common-sense gun safety legislation, lowering health care costs, acting on climate change, and defending our democracy. I would also like to invite Rep. Emmer to add to this agenda of issues for our debate. I am looking forward to a lively debate of the issues effecting Minnesota and our nation. Rep. Emmer's campaign team or the National Republican Congressional Committee can contact our campaign team at [info@hendricks2022.com](mailto:info@hendricks) to set up the details of the debate," said Jeanne Hendricks. **ATTN: Political News Reporters, If any news outlet or news outlets may be interested in hosting or co-hosting the debate, please connect with our campaign at[info@hendricks2022.com](mailto:info@hendricks2022.com) ** ### To learn more about Jeanne Hendricks and her campaign for U.S. Congress, please visit our website at: [www.hendricks2022.com](http://clicksp.hendricks2022.com/f/a/3Senhjtu0-y3WMFvFNXFng~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRlHF5KP0SLaHR0cDovL3d3dy5oZW5kcmlja3MyMDIyLmNvbS8_Y2RtYz0yRmFnQkQ4MnBOQWg2em9JQ2ZIaWk0RnZ6TnQmcmVmY29kZTI9MkZhZ0JEODJwTkFoNnpvSUNmSGlpNEZ2ek50JnJlZmNvZGVjZG1jPTJGYWdCRDgycE5BaDZ6b0lDZkhpaTRGdnpOdFcDc3BjQgpjM0rZOWNac2NLUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAgw~~)

body:
We are in the home stretch to the general.
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/51841379/370461240/-1862136002?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYjMxYzJmNi1hNTQyLWVkMTEtYjQ5NS0wMDIyNDgzMmU0Y2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fIF7mmJ3_0rT1NDEaSbfn3ejviPx1Ahu7zm4LDP5CqE=&emci=e3917145-8342-ed11-b495-00224832e4ca&emdi=eb31c2f6-a542-ed11-b495-00224832e4ca&ceid=15384964)
Peter,

I want to express my deepest gratitude to this grassroots team for all you've done – and continue to do – to support this campaign. On Friday, we faced our final FEC end-of-quarter fundraising deadline. Thanks to the support of people like you, **we hit our online fundraising goal!**

With our final end-of-quarter deadline behind us, we are officially in the home stretch to the general. From knocking on doors, making calls, and ensuring that we reach voters in all corners of the district, your support has been crucial in our work.

But our work is far from over, and we're counting on this team's support to ensure we have what it takes to keep RI-02 and our House majority blue this November.

**Peter, with less than six weeks until the general election, I'm counting on this people-powered team to help us continue spreading our message across RI-02 and defeat my Trump-supporting opponent, Allan Fung.[ Will you chip in $5 or more so we can start October off strong and keep up our momentum through November 8th?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/51841380/370461241/801492191?refcode=em22_221002_eoqty_fndd_gq_act___SM_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_221002_eoqty_fndd_gq_act___SM_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYjMxYzJmNi1hNTQyLWVkMTEtYjQ5NS0wMDIyNDgzMmU0Y2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fIF7mmJ3_0rT1NDEaSbfn3ejviPx1Ahu7zm4LDP5CqE=)**

Thank you for your support,

Seth

clean_body: We are in the home stretch to the general. Peter, I want to express my deepest gratitude to this grassroots team for all you've done – and continue to do – to support this campaign. On Friday, we faced our final FEC end-of-quarter fundraising deadline. Thanks to the support of people like you, we hit our online fundraising goal! With our final end-of-quarter deadline behind us, we are officially in the home stretch to the general. From knocking on doors, making calls, and ensuring that we reach voters in all corners of the district, your support has been crucial in our work. But our work is far from over, and we're counting on this team's support to ensure we have what it takes to keep RI-02 and our House majority blue this November. Peter, with less than six weeks until the general election, I'm counting on this people-powered team to help us continue spreading our message across RI-02 and defeat my Trump-supporting opponent, Allan Fung.= Thank you for your support, Seth Rhode Island Treasurer Seth Magaziner is running for Congress in Rhode Island's competitive open Second District – and election experts are calling this race a "toss up." Will you chip in $5 or more to help him keep this seat and our House majority blue? = | | ---|---|--- PAID FOR BY MAGAZINER FOR CONGRESS VICTORIA ALMEIDA, TREASURER Magaziner for Congress Victoria Almeida, Treasurer PO Box 40993 Providence, RI 02940 United States

name: Team Slotkin
subject: Trump & Marjorie Taylor Greene in MI
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elissa Slotkin for Congress
body:
Elissa Slotkin for Congresssecure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq42022?refcode=email20221002&amount=28 [secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq42022?refcode=email20221002&amount=28]
Team,
With 37 days to go until the election, national Republicans are revealing just how important Michigan will be in the midterm elections.
Yesterday, former President Trump held a rally in Warren, Michigan on behalf of some Michigan Republican candidates: Tudor Dixon (running for governor), Matthew DePerno (running for attorney general), Kirstina Karamo (running for secretary of state) and John James (running for the 10th Congressional District).
But those candidates weren’t the only ones featured at last night’s rally – Trump brought a number of familiar national faces with him. Most notable was Georgia Congresswoman Marjorie Taylor Greene, who in true fashion, engaged in some of the extreme rhetoric that she has come to be known for.
Front and center at the rally were claims that the results of the 2020 election were illegitimate, something Michigan Republicans are still saying — including Elissa’s opponent, who just last week argued the 2020 election’s integrity is “an unknowable thing” and declined to answer when asked if he would have certified the results of the 2020 election as a member of Congress.
Last night made one thing perfectly clear – Michigan is a key piece of national Republicans’ strategy. And, with one of the most competitive AND most expensive House races in the entire country, you can be sure they’re prioritizing Elissa’s seat. clean_body: Elissa Slotkin for Congresssecure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq42022?refcode=email20221002&amount=28 [secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq42022?refcode=email20221002&amount=28] Team, With 37 days to go until the election, national Republicans are revealing just how important Michigan will be in the midterm elections. Yesterday, former President Trump held a rally in Warren, Michigan on behalf of some Michigan Republican candidates: Tudor Dixon (running for governor), Matthew DePerno (running for attorney general), Kirstina Karamo (running for secretary of state) and John James (running for the 10th Congressional District). But those candidates weren’t the only ones featured at last night’s rally – Trump brought a number of familiar national faces with him. Most notable was Georgia Congresswoman Marjorie Taylor Greene, who in true fashion, engaged in some of the extreme rhetoric that she has come to be known for. Front and center at the rally were claims that the results of the 2020 election were illegitimate, something Michigan Republicans are still saying — including Elissa’s opponent, who just last week argued the 2020 election’s integrity is “an unknowable thing” and declined to answer when asked if he would have certified the results of the 2020 election as a member of Congress. Last night made one thing perfectly clear – Michigan is a key piece of national Republicans’ strategy. And, with one of the most competitive AND most expensive House races in the entire country, you can be sure they’re prioritizing Elissa’s seat. Will you chip in to help us fight back against the outside Republicans trying to have a say in Michigan? name: Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
subject: Will you add your name to personally endorse Cheri Beasley?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
Something as simple as adding your name to say you support Cheri makes a big difference.
#
In this campaign, we are taking on Ted Budd, a far-right extremist hand-picked by Donald Trump. He is backed by well-funded DC interests that know he’ll vote for their agenda in Congress.
Republicans have made beating Cheri Beasley one of their top priorities. We know this because she was the first challenger that the NRSC attacked, and McConnell’s super PACs are pumping more money into North Carolina than almost anywhere else.
They admit that if Cheri Beasley wins in North Carolina, then they have no path to the Senate majority. That’s why we are organizing everywhere to get it done.
An important step in that process is getting as many people as possible to say they stand with Cheri Beasley — especially right now with less than six weeks until Election Day. And we would love to get your name on the list:
**[Can you please add your name to say you personally endorse Cheri Beasley’s campaign for U.S. Senate in North Carolina?**](https://act.cheribeasley.com/signup/em-personal-endorsement-oct22?source=em221002-2-ma&refcode2=1920.357359.bUAcpH&akid=1920%2E357359%2EbUAcpH)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.cheribeasley.com/signup/em-personal-endorsement-oct22?source=em221002-2-ma&refcode2=1920.357359.bUAcpH&akid=1920%2E357359%2EbUAcpH)**
Something as simple as adding your name to say you support Cheri makes a big difference.
Because when thousands of us come together to say we are with Cheri, we become part of something much bigger. It shows that we have the grassroots strength to take on the super PACs and win!
Your support will put us a step closer to winning this race and electing a Senator who will deliver meaningful change for our country.
**[Please add your name to endorse Cheri and show everyone that we have what it takes to flip North Carolina.**](https://act.cheribeasley.com/signup/em-personal-endorsement-oct22?source=em221002-2-ma&refcode2=1920.357359.bUAcpH&akid=1920%2E357359%2EbUAcpH)
Thank you!
\- Team Beasley

Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
PO Box 28778
Raleigh, NC 27611
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you want to receive fewer emails, you may [submit this form to get only our most important updates](https://act.cheribeasley.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=1&akid=1920%2E357359%2EbUAcpH). Emails like this are a critical tool for our campaign's fundraising and organizing efforts, but if you need to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.cheribeasley.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=2&akid=1920%2E357359%2EbUAcpH). If you would like to support Cheri's campaign for the U.S. Senate in North Carolina, please consider [making a donation](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beasley-em-2021?refcode=em-footer&t=3&refcode2=1920_357359_bUAcpH&akid=1920%2E357359%2EbUAcpH) today to help us make history.

name: John Fetterman
subject: re: the only thing scarier than me in a costume
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
By Halloween, the race for Pennsylvania’s Senate seat will be in its FINAL days.
#
Ya know what’s scarier than me dressing up as Lurch Addams?
**Dr. Oz winning this seat on November 8.**
[****](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20221002-2?amount=5&refcode=em20221002-7543&refcode2=7543_434096_K_8DqK&akid=7543%2E434096%2EK_8DqK)
**[Rush a $5 donation today to make sure our people-powered campaign is able to fight back against attack ads from GOP super PACs + beat Dr. Oz in November.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20221002-2?amount=5&refcode=em20221002-7543&refcode2=7543_434096_K_8DqK&akid=7543%2E434096%2EK_8DqK)**
**[RUSH $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20221002-2?amount=5&refcode=em20221002-7543&refcode2=7543_434096_K_8DqK&akid=7543%2E434096%2EK_8DqK)**
It’s what my kids are calling "spooky season." But absolutely nothing is scarier to me than Dr. Oz + his extreme anti-abortion views (+ his views on like, literally every issue).
**This dude is like a movie villain, Derek.** He owns a ridiculous amount of properties, became a gazillionaire by hawking fake diet pills + snake oil on TV, and called *all* abortion “murder.” Not to mention the fact that he’s self-funding a campaign in a state he doesn’t even live in...
**[We can’t let Oz anywhere near the Senate, but a new poll showed us statistically _tied._ Please rush a donation of any amount today to help fund our grassroots campaign so we can beat Oz + flip PA blue this November.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20221002-2?amount=5&refcode=em20221002-7543&refcode2=7543_434096_K_8DqK&akid=7543%2E434096%2EK_8DqK)**
**[RUSH $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20221002-2?amount=5&refcode=em20221002-7543&refcode2=7543_434096_K_8DqK&akid=7543%2E434096%2EK_8DqK)**
I know we can do this with your help, Derek.
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania
Democratic Nominee for U.S. Senate
P.S. Like so many of you, I’m haunted by how quickly this year is going by. By Halloween, the race for Pennsylvania’s Senate seat will be in its FINAL days. 😱
That’s why you keep getting my emails, receiving my texts, + seeing my ads. Because there’s absolutely *no telling* what else Oz + the MAGA super PACs supporting him will do to spread more lies about me + our campaign. **[Help us fight back by rushing a donation of $5 today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20221002-2?amount=5&refcode=em20221002-7543&refcode2=7543_434096_K_8DqK&akid=7543%2E434096%2EK_8DqK)**

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20221002-7543-footer&t=1&refcode2=7543_434096_K_8DqK&akid=7543%2E434096%2EK_8DqK)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=2&akid=7543%2E434096%2EK_8DqK)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=7543%2E434096%2EK_8DqK)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

Team, Yesterday, **I was honored to be celebrated as a Rising Star at the Democratic Party of New Mexico's 2022 Rising Star event** , DPNM’s biggest night of the year that brings Democratic leaders from across the state together. It was an energetic and inspiring night that reminded us all of just how much is at stake in this November’s midterm election. **In just over a month from now, we have the opportunity to flip this House seat from red to blue and remove an anti-choice election-denier from Congress** — plus we must re-elect Governor Michelle Lujan Grisham, Congresswomen Teresa Leger Fernandez and Melanie Stansbury, and elect strong Democrats to local and statewide positions. Flipping this toss-up seat is crucial to defending our Democratic majority in the House, safeguarding our democracy and reproductive rights, and giving the people of NM-02 a true representative in Congress. But in order to do it, we need to put in the work and fight like hell over these final five weeks to Election Day. **[Together, this is how we will win this critical race: through grassroots people-power. Help fuel our Get Out the Vote efforts over this final month of the campaign by pitching in $10 or more.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/51842089/370463868/1758876433?refcode=fl_email_fr_20221002risingstar_gv_od90_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZDY3ZGVkOC1hOTQyLWVkMTEtYjQ5NS0wMDIyNDgzMmU0Y2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=18oWRr7xFETs4Q-wiPUfOwqSrjYdyU-7-uioSVZALk4=)** | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

clean_body: | = Team, Yesterday, I was honored to be celebrated as a Rising Star at the Democratic Party of New Mexico's 2022 Rising Star event , DPNM’s biggest night of the year that brings Democratic leaders from across the state together. It was an energetic and inspiring night that reminded us all of just how much is at stake in this November’s midterm election. In just over a month from now, we have the opportunity to flip this House seat from red to blue and remove an anti-choice election-denier from Congress — plus we must re-elect Governor Michelle Lujan Grisham, Congresswomen Teresa Leger Fernandez and Melanie Stansbury, and elect strong Democrats to local and statewide positions. Flipping this toss-up seat is crucial to defending our Democratic majority in the House, safeguarding our democracy and reproductive rights, and giving the people of NM-02 a true representative in Congress. But in order to do it, we need to put in the work and fight like hell over these final five weeks to Election Day. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = If you can’t afford to make a donation today, that’s okay: you can still help in other ways like knocking on doors or making phone calls. name: Team Tina
subject: Republicans are betting on you to sit out this November
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Tina Kotek
body:
|
#
---
Peter, This year’s elections could determine the future of abortion rights, voting rights, and so much more in Oregon. Now that the Supreme Court has overturned Roe v. Wade, our governor is the last line of defense. But historically, fewer voters turn out in midterm elections than in a presidential election. The truth is that Republicans are counting on you to sit out this election so they can win. **That’s why we need to buck the historical trends and get organized NOW.** [**Will you commit to voting for Tina and Democrats up and down the ballot in the November election? body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/24213?t=1007&amount=25&akid=5866%2E3611125%2Eh7v2qg ]Emily Creighton canvassing

Hey there!
It’s Emily, Tim’s Digital Fundraising Director.

Usually I’m looking at screens all day (bleh) but today, I’m knocking on
doors. 😊

Tim’s absolute favorite thing is talking to voters in every corner of the
Buckeye State. And now we’re all getting in on the action!

We’ve got a winning message that resonates with voters across the
political spectrum, and we need to share it with as many people as
possible—that includes knocking on doors all over Ohio. And I mean
EVERYWHERE.

We’re ramping up our ground game and expanding field operations, so we
need to raise $35,000 TODAY to make sure everything launches on time.
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/24213?t=1008&amount=25&akid=5866%2E3611125%2Eh7v2qg ]Can you chip in
$25 right
now to help us reach the voters we need to get out the vote and flip Ohio
blue?

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/24213?t=1009&amount=25&akid=5866%2E3611125%2Eh7v2qg ]Chip in
$25

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/24213?t=1010&amount=30&akid=5866%2E3611125%2Eh7v2qg ]Other Amount

Getting out the vote is a crucial part of our game plan. We’ve been airing
tons of ads and getting the word out about Tim. But all of that means
nothing if voters don’t show up for us on Election Day.

If we’re going to compete with the more than $30 million GOP super PACs
are spending on attack ads, our ground game has to be top notch. And from
here on out, it’s all hands on deck.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/24213?t=1011&amount=25&akid=5866%2E3611125%2Eh7v2qg ]Tim’s neck-and-neck in the polls and a few voters could decide if we
win or lose. Which means every dollar we fall short is a voter we don’t
reach. So, can you chip in
$25 ASAP
to make sure we’re leaving it all out on the field in the race that will
decide Senate control in November?

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/24213?t=1012&amount=25&akid=5866%2E3611125%2Eh7v2qg ]Chip in
$25

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/24213?t=1013&amount=30&akid=5866%2E3611125%2Eh7v2qg ]Other Amount

Thanks!

—Emily

Emily Creighton
Digital Fundraising Director
Tim Ryan for Ohio

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/47?t=1001&akid=5866%2E3611125%2Eh7v2qg ][IMG]
We believe that emails are the best way for our organization to stay in
touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails,
[ https://act.timforoh.com/signup/Fewer_Emails/?t=1002&akid=5866%2E3611125%2Eh7v2qg ]click here.
If you'd like to make a donation to our campaign, you can do that below!

Niles, Ohio 44446
United States
[ mailto:info@timforoh.com ][IMG] [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/11?t=1005&akid=5866%2E3611125%2Eh7v2qg ][IMG]

subject: We’ve taken a look at our records, Derek.

body:
[1]Stacey Abrams for Governor

Derek, Early Vote
starts in 15 short days and the stakes have never been higher.

We need to turn out a historic number of voters in just the first week to
stay ahead, but we need the resources to do that,
Derek.

So we went ahead and pulled our October Supporter Records to ensure that
we can keep our momentum going strong and turn out a record number of
voters before Election Day even begins.

[ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/4397?refcode=sa_em_221002_B2_RecordBox_S1_T1_HQ_30open&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250&t=1002&akid=10407%2E1862389%2EHaBAoi ]Will you chip in

will lead us to victory in October and to a stronger future for all
Georgians.

Willis

Days remaining until Election Day: 37

today to elect Stacey Abrams as the next Governor of Georgia >>

[ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/4397?refcode=sa_em_221002_B2_RecordBox_S1_T1_HQ_30open&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250&t=1005&akid=10407%2E1862389%2EHaBAoi ]DONATE

Stacey Abrams never quit on Georgia, Derek,
and she’s not planning on it any time
soon.

She’s in this race to lift up our families. To keep our children safe and
expand their access to education. To make sure Georgians can afford
quality health care regardless of where they live. To create opportunity
and give Georgians in every corner of the state a chance to thrive.

And this year, we are facing a once-in-a-generation opportunity to make
unprecedented progress with a candidate who doesn’t come around
twice,
Derek.

But Brian Kemp is leading a scorched-earth campaign against us and with 5
weeks until Election Day, there’s no chance he’s slowing down. With Early
Vote just around the corner, we can’t afford to lose the momentum we’ve
built every step of the way.

[ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/4397?refcode=sa_em_221002_B2_RecordBox_S1_T1_HQ_30open&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250&t=1006&akid=10407%2E1862389%2EHaBAoi ]So
Derek, we’re asking: can you
make your first
October donation now? We can’t leave anything to chance this time and we
need every supporter of Stacey’s vision in our corner now and for the next
37 days. Will you fight alongside Stacey in these last few days? Chip in
today:

[ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/4397?refcode=sa_em_221002_B2_RecordBox_S1_T1_HQ_30open&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250&t=1007&akid=10407%2E1862389%2EHaBAoi ]DONATE

name: Raphael Warnock
subject: please, I need you to read this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
Senate control will once again come down to our race in Georgia.
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/51836349/370445683/-1075566246?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk4548-bu-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MTc5OGY5Yi04ODQyLWVkMTEtYjQ5NS0wMDIyNDgzMmU0Y2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=09gw0t0rffhpFpZ0uKOiSnS49MJtPOJBVR2D3pTXWMY=)
Friend – I’ll keep this short:
With less than 40 days to go until the election, experts at FiveThirtyEight just confirmed what we've already known: **Senate control will once again come down to our race in Georgia. **

That's why Donald Trump has visited our state multiple times to rally the GOP base for my opponent, Herschel Walker – and why Mitch McConnell's super PAC is spending millions to smear me with attack ads.

name: Jacky Rosen
subject: the powerful Jewish principle of Tikkun Olam
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
Friend, I wanted to follow up to make sure you saw my email below, because it's about something near and dear to me: my faith.
---
I couldn't be prouder to be the granddaughter of Jewish immigrants. From hard work to persistence, the values that my family taught me guide everything I do to serve you in the Senate. **But the value I carry with me most of all is the powerful Jewish principle of Tikkun Olam, which means to repair and improve the world.**
If there's ever been a moment in our lifetime when we needed to come together to do our part in repairing the world, that moment is now.
**So in the face of everything from growing antisemitism to attacks on our most fundamental rights, I hope I can count on you to stand with me in the fight for progress.** **[Please, chip in $5 or more today to help me continue fighting in the Senate for the issues that matter most](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/51842207/370464583/610767770?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2038-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzgyZmM4Ny1hYjQyLWVkMTEtYjQ5NS0wMDIyNDgzMmU0Y2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=07mfcOST56geqe6uoYjWnJIrbmO4pnw9YL3h-KxczZI=)****[.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/51842208/370464584/610767770?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2038-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzgyZmM4Ny1hYjQyLWVkMTEtYjQ5NS0wMDIyNDgzMmU0Y2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=07mfcOST56geqe6uoYjWnJIrbmO4pnw9YL3h-KxczZI=)**
Thanks so much,

Jacky
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Jacky Rosen**
Date: Thu, Sep 22, 2022
Subject: I am the proud granddaughter of Jewish immigrants.
| | |
---
Friend, my work in the Senate is guided by the timeless and powerful Jewish principle of Tikkun Olam – which means to repair and improve the world. So today, I want to take just a moment to share a little bit more about my faith with you.
I am the proud granddaughter of Jewish immigrants. From a young age, my family taught me the values of hard work, determination, and persistence – and I learned how Jewish women have been holding our communities together and taking a stand against injustice from the time of the Torah to today.
Now, as both the third Jewish woman Senator in U.S. history, and the only former synagogue president in the U.S. Senate, **I'm proud to carry these values with me in everything I do to serve Nevada and our country.**
And in this present moment, we're facing no shortage of issues – many of which directly impact women and the Jewish community. From growing antisemitism to attacks on abortion rights, to attacks on our very democracy, I know it's my duty to respond with clear resolve and a commitment to social justice.
If we truly want to repair the world, then it’s up to all of us to come together, roll up our sleeves, and do the repairing.
**There is so much work ahead of us to make this nation better – for ourselves and for future generations.** **[So if the principle of Tikkun Olam resonates with you – if you're with me in the fight to make real progress for our country – I hope you'll chip in $5 or more today to help me continue this critical work in the Senate.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/51842209/370464585/610767770?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2038-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzgyZmM4Ny1hYjQyLWVkMTEtYjQ5NS0wMDIyNDgzMmU0Y2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=07mfcOST56geqe6uoYjWnJIrbmO4pnw9YL3h-KxczZI=)**
When everybody stands firm and does their part to help better this world, we can move mountains to make positive change happen. Thank you, friend, for joining us.

Jacky
| | [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/51842210/370464586/610767770?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2038-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzgyZmM4Ny1hYjQyLWVkMTEtYjQ5NS0wMDIyNDgzMmU0Y2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=07mfcOST56geqe6uoYjWnJIrbmO4pnw9YL3h-KxczZI=)

[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.rosenfornevada.com/p/lu4OBSNc3UKuSuNlvLb3Zg2?unsubscribedata=yHJdkAZojTM6JLNCeRSvkdjKotxQwC47GuWE2mAPIZccsg3JKWnRIaMEJVLgUEN8WKODfVpN63qt%2B7zjjdfGEV6CuWMwVbO5ptpAfPDXoJM4C3APGq9Zrl%2BDi64m0epMVm%2BVAI%2FJMaBpYtubwNY8mnn8bVVA2WZGJutXA%2FTw5%2BwcovKMcwfS4KwuqU48mES2se5qJ588HKimtlpuPrAMdz%2BUCyxEV%2BryP%2F9t8Ox1Dx078wWyHiuLgLWkk26xZ2hcPraPGKoKUlIvJrLmy%2B%2FPcYWSPQl6vA%2B51tuwdLbJyxvd5AhugfBD9k3cEC1oDWp9J%2Fs2td%2BH5KDjHkUs%2BLgOTosKTf3KOpbpsi9DfyQegUI4XRX3RX8%2FcNza3%2BDUmo45kCpasow8YdXLkj4OTG4RQfI3Ds3YGHyRAk9L68zmfVs%3D) Contributions to Rosen for Nevada are not tax deductible. | | Paid for by Rosen for Nevada

**FIRST:** Even after national Republicans outspent us on the airwaves, polling showed Rev. Warnock ahead of his Trump-backed opponent, Herschel Walker (R).
**BUT THEN:** Donald Trump held a massive MAGA rally in Georgia to prop up Walker – and Republicans started pumping _millions_ into Walker's campaign to defeat us.
**NOW: The latest polls show Rev. Warnock 2 POINTS DOWN in the race that experts at _Politico_ say could decide Senate control!**
Rev. Warnock is the fighter we need to keep Georgia and the Senate blue – but he won his last race by a _razor-thin_ margin, so we have absolutely zero room for error. **That’s why missing huge goals like this is simply not an option. We've got to make up this shortfall NOW, or else we could lose our best chance at defending our Senate majority.**
**[So please, friend, Rev. Warnock is personally asking: Will you give $5 or more – as much as you can spare – before midnight to help us get back on track, win in Georgia, and keep the Senate blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/51837346/370445790/-598064402?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk4433-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OGFiNGM0ZS04OTQyLWVkMTEtYjQ5NS0wMDIyNDgzMmU0Y2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Wo2kGc_zhx1pOSCKsD3d5F0f3PYtb5hmdsgzkKqIIzA=)**

Warnock is reaching out directly with an important call to action: = = | Things aren't looking good, friend. FIRST: Even after national Republicans outspent us on the airwaves, polling showed Rev. Warnock ahead of his Trump-backed opponent, Herschel Walker (R). BUT THEN: Donald Trump held a massive MAGA rally in Georgia to prop up Walker – and Republicans started pumping millions into Walker's campaign to defeat us. NOW: The latest polls show Rev. Warnock is the fighter we need to keep Georgia and the Senate blue – but he won his last race by a razor-thin margin, so we have absolutely zero room for error. name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: An Arizona judge has thrown abortion rights back 100 years, mandating a total ban. If Kari Lake is the next governor, she’ll fight to keep that ban in place. Katie Hobbs will fight to overturn it. … Can we count on you to help Katie Hobbs fight for women’s independence in Arizona?
body:
Total abortion ban in AZ: what will the next governor do?
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **_They've done it: A right-wing Arizona Court, because of the illegitimate Supreme Court's Dobbs decision, has allowed a law that requires a near-total abortion ban to start being enforced. _** **[Please join us in supporting Katie Hobbs for Governor, because she'll be outstanding at it, and because she'll prevent Arizona from going back 100 years, to the time when that obscene, anti-women law was passed.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T721dec91-cad8-4a49-b753-d828a0d5c630/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** **_The law doesn't even guarantee women can get an abortion WHEN A MOTHER'S LIFE IS IN DANGER, because the law is unclear in defining that._** What we can guarantee is women will become wards of the state in Arizona, whether you're a 14-year old molested by an uncle, a 10-year old raped by a stranger or a single woman who unexpectedly finds herself in a situation where raising a child will destroy her entire future or put her into poverty, Arizona's abortion police could care less.
---
|
---
| | | | [DONATE NOW: KATIE HOBBS FOR ARIZONA!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T762444f6-d804-44b3-8b0d-bb20de50b801/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| So now you know the stakes. We can elect the amazing Katie Hobbs, who as Arizona Secretary of State in 2020 was key in preventing Trump and his minions, like Kari Lake, from stealing the election and will codify Roe in AZ. Or conspiracy-spouting, election-and-COVID-vaccination denying Kari Lake, who as Governor of Arizona, will enforce this law and codify it in the Arizona, making ectopic pregnancies fatal, rape & molestation ways for men to reproduce, and Arizona a police state, where your social media, relationships, organizational memberthips and more are monitored for signs you're contemplating controlling your body. Next, Lake comes for birth control. **It's insane that the Handmaid's Tale has become possible in every state--but that's where we are. ** **[So I ask you to please join us in supporting Katie Hobbs for Governor, because she'll be outstanding at it, and because she'll prevent Arizona from going back 100 years, to the time when that obscene, anti-women law was passed.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9a4683b4-4024-4deb-bff3-de3c0b6f90e5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** **Thank you for fighting for women's rights as they come under assault across our country.** **Cliff**
---
|
---
| | | | [DONATE NOW: KATIE HOBBS FOR GOVERNOR](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3e948218-41e3-41d6-9b23-abd8af11b3d3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

body:

|

Fellow Patriot,

I wanted to reach out and express my concern about how important this FINAL Month is for our campaign. I am going to be brutally honest with you. Socialist John Fetterman is raising millions of dollars, and if the election were held today, he would have a real shot at winning. If we lose this seat, Democrats will remain in control of the US Senate.

[**_This is the final stretch ...if everyone who receives this email donates just $25, it will get us on track to crush our goals. A little goes a very, very, long way._**](http://links.doctoroz.com/u/click?_t=2b05aaee21f04e6792020c0ad1924b95&_m=cfb546dee9ff4e1a8435c1dc1e1e076d&_e=29kdW9WEZPfCLqWlzbw91u4AYdOLCt5P1Kmp_gF6vlMDkQ9b3bTbY0TyfPxzKULkYztsks28kO7VHkFNHsN3DvYYnBCWOvcSLcjUabKCL4Uqq12vGafB_uBfYTQr-kNtZuNsH2d0s2PSZO479wFCM7guq4aQeZzCTLQwRXe69Vs3KOTQbNXwjQAqkd1LfPOjmJZzLPmcWCgtIJRz2C9AsdcVDFh5Gu0vKL5ZFMe3oahzjzTod_fgyjeT8eVXHNa9xflVRGYrftVQONQlY7atzFk6LNs7fO2z0xUwLfJJvDH4wpbQB-5aZvq2p19ymq0lQEpuXzy8g3gvd1AaUIJEpIVk83i38FgZng2PXm8XbKp63q1iNTDxfhwvDGI9VOQ8q49posdDThvlXD4dZZYbqV2NbIsmx2Z0e6zCHpkQs34jXfxaymA75M6ZEJJT5HtcOeSg1P1AkTmDme0Nj60iMEqdZxyCpSy_vhdin5Whw4E%3D)

John Fetterman is as radical as it gets. I will beat John Fetterman only if I have your Grassroot support. Fetterman is gaining money and momentum in this general election, and Pennsylvanians cannot afford that.

[**_I am humbly asking you to chip in just $25 or $35? Use this link to make a secure donation: CLICK HERE._**](http://links.doctoroz.com/u/click?_t=2b05aaee21f04e6792020c0ad1924b95&_m=cfb546dee9ff4e1a8435c1dc1e1e076d&_e=29kdW9WEZPfCLqWlzbw91u4AYdOLCt5P1Kmp_gF6vlMDkQ9b3bTbY0TyfPxzKULkYztsks28kO7VHkFNHsN3DvYYnBCWOvcSLcjUabKCL4Uqq12vGafB_uBfYTQr-kNtZuNsH2d0s2PSZO479wFCM7guq4aQeZzCTLQwRXe69Vs3KOTQbNXwjQAqkd1LfPOjmJZzLPmcWCgtIJRz2C9AsdcVDFh5Gu0vKL5ZFMe3oahzjzTod_fgyjeT8eVXHNa9xflVRGYrftVQONQlY7atzFk6LNs7fO2z0xUwLfJJvDH4wpbQB-5aZvq2p19ymq0lQEpuXzy8g3gvd1AaUIJEpIC0r6cwtCqutVCMtSwHn5yI6bgNUlf0BYhi-M-8RSwASEuKapdHjPvhuq295vK7nrdCz06gNoykLhQ8sSiuKU8DqicLfZIklH5IjRF4PS8i8gkRd5CNg_YmQrXxpxKp3AIuiAzJWY1-VmFDaj2yg04%3D)

Our numbers will be public after the end of the month, and we cannot afford to come up short. Democrats will see everything! 😱

Thank you for all your time and support.

God Bless,

Mehmet Oz

On the eve of the primary election in Georgia, my opponent and three of her cronies stormed into my campaign headquarters to try to harass and intimidate our staff. But I’m sick and tired of her harassing the American people in Congress.** [**Look, I'm fired up to beat her in November -- but I can't do that without your help. clean_body: Delete after reading | Friend - I have been working tirelessly to help America get back on track. When we take back the house in November, Republicans will be ready to hit the ground running with Conservative legislation that protects you, your family, and your freedom. But before we do that, we need to WIN in November. Your commitment to Conservative candidates matters. Here 's the problem: many seats that were considered "safe" last cycle, like Jim Banks's seat, no longer are. Democrats are coming at us from all fronts. The only way we can fight back is by coming together to make sure Republicans have the funding they need to spread their conservative message. | | | ---|---|--- | | Sincerely, Steve Scalise Paid for by House Conservatives Trust Copyright (C) 2022 House Conservatives Trust, All rights reserved.

"In terms of candidate quality, it’s not even close." | **_The Seattle Times:_
With control of Congress at stake, Schrier is a must-win in 8th District**
---

Exciting news, Peter! **_The Seattle Times_ endorsed Kim's re-election campaign for Washington's 8th District!**

Take a look at what they had to say about Kim and her opponent:
_"In terms of candidate quality, it’s not even close. Schrier is running a solid campaign, just as she has effectively represented her rural and suburban constituents [...]**Larkin is ill-suited for the job. The voters of the 8th District need a thoughtful advocate like Schrier, not an ideological social issues warrior."**_
Throughout her time in Congress, Kim has looked out for Washingtonians in every corner of the 8th District. Her commitment to all of her constituents is why _The Seattle Times_ says it's important we re-elect Kim – but she needs our help.

With control of the House majority hinging on WA-08, _The Seattle Times_ knows Washingtonians can't afford to send Matt Larkin to Congress. Larkin is an anti-choice, MAGA Republican who will support Kevin McCarthy's extreme agenda to block access to abortion, rollback prescription drug price reforms, and attack voting rights.

But defeating Larkin won't be easy. Election experts are calling this race a "toss up," and national Republicans are spending nearly $7 million to defeat Kim. That's why Kim needs our support to fight back right away.

**[Rush a donation right away to help ensure Kim has the resources to take on her extreme opponent, Matt Larkin, and his national Republican allies.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/51838728/370448600/474784691?refcode=em22_221002_SeaTim_fnd_gq_act___WA08EA_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_221002_SeaTim_fnd_gq_act___WA08EA_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZDQ1MjljZi04YzQyLWVkMTEtYjQ5NS0wMDIyNDgzMmU0Y2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=spbhyY_tmAvn8zNF7DaJ_2Ee0vvwA0R_SYWJ4K6PFuA=)**
