name: Haley Stevens
subject: "You’ll never save those jobs”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Congress
body:
|
---
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/51838980/370449692/-1653583832?refcode=ste_headerlogo&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODA3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNzQ1MjljZi04YzQyLWVkMTEtYjQ5NS0wMDIyNDgzMmU0Y2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1qHxITtxfMM4eO4_cl8IZ2Z-YKEXYgQos951Ei-6bOo=)

| | I’m no stranger to tough fights, friend. When I became Chief of Staff to President Obama’s auto task force, I kept hearing the same thing over and over again: “Let Detroit go bankrupt” and “You’ll never save those jobs.” But we got organized, fought back, and ended up saving _two million_ jobs in the auto industry – 200,000 of which were right here in Michigan. While I loved working for the auto industry, I wanted to do more. I felt that I could make an even bigger impact, and do great things for my community. The decision I made to run for public office in 2017 ended up being one of the best decisions of my life. Don’t get me wrong, campaigning was never easy. From the minute I announced my campaign, skeptics doubted my ability to flip MI-11 blue. National Republicans spent millions against me. But I never gave up, and thanks to your support, I’m running to become the first Democrat to _ever_ win MI-11 three terms in a row. **I’ve loved every second serving as MI-11’s representative, which is why I’m running for re-election in 2022. I’m in for another tough race, but my work for the people of MI-11 is far from over.** [**Today, I’m asking if you will pitch in $25 or more to help our grassroots team meet our October goal. I would greatly appreciate any amount of support you can provide.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/51838981/370449693/910793816?refcode=EM_BS_STE_221002_FR_AutoRescue_A0_na_U3_X2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODA3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNzQ1MjljZi04YzQyLWVkMTEtYjQ5NS0wMDIyNDgzMmU0Y2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1qHxITtxfMM4eO4_cl8IZ2Z-YKEXYgQos951Ei-6bOo=) _If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:_ | | | [Chip in $25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/51838982/370449694/910793816?refcode=EM_BS_STE_221002_FR_AutoRescue_A0_na_U3_X2&amount=25&express_lane=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODA3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNzQ1MjljZi04YzQyLWVkMTEtYjQ5NS0wMDIyNDgzMmU0Y2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1qHxITtxfMM4eO4_cl8IZ2Z-YKEXYgQos951Ei-6bOo=)

clean_body: | = | | I’m no stranger to tough fights, friend. When I became Chief of Staff to President Obama’s auto task force, I kept hearing the same thing over and over again: “Let Detroit go bankrupt” and “You’ll never save those jobs.” But we got organized, fought back, and ended up saving two million jobs in the auto industry – 200,000 of which were right here in Michigan. While I loved working for the auto industry, I wanted to do more. I felt that I could make an even bigger impact, and do great things for my community. The decision I made to run for public office in 2017 ended up being one of the best decisions of my life. Don’t get me wrong, campaigning was never easy. From the minute I announced my campaign, skeptics doubted my ability to flip MI-11 blue. National Republicans spent millions against me. But I never gave up, and thanks to your support, I’m running to become the first Democrat to ever win MI-11 three terms in a row. I’ve loved every second serving as MI-11’s representative, which is why I’m running for re-election in 2022. I’m in for another tough race, but my work for the people of MI-11 is far from over. = If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you for being in this with me. – Haley | | = | If you'd like to support Haley Stevens for Congress, you can = We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. name: Democracy Watch, NDRC
subject: Imagine this: It’s Election Night 2024. You think Democrats have the White House in the bag.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, Kelly Burton, President
body:
BUT WAIT: Governors and secretaries of state in places like Michigan, Pennsylvania, and Arizona are claiming fraud...
|
---

Imagine this, friend. **It’s Election Night 2024.** You think Democrats have the White House in the bag. **BUT WAIT:** Governors and secretaries of state in places like Michigan, Pennsylvania, and Arizona are claiming fraud, stopping the vote count, and mucking up the gears.

You remember that these folks were well-known 2020 election deniers – but _nobody stopped them_ from winning their races in 2022! Now the country is in crisis, and everyone’s on edge. **_Don’t let it happen!_** | [Help the NDRC defeat election deniers in these states](https://click.everyaction.com/k/51839009/370449752/-1089704346?amount=30&refcode=20221002.2r_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA4NDUyOWNmLThjNDItZWQxMS1iNDk1LTAwMjI0ODMyZTRjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=-cbTZIuG1FIxAepkQ_7cONFmxifWQXCfCg4Qn5tPQGc=)
---
**& do much more ↴**
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/51839010/370449753/-1089704346?&amount=30&refcode=20221002.2r_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA4NDUyOWNmLThjNDItZWQxMS1iNDk1LTAwMjI0ODMyZTRjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=-cbTZIuG1FIxAepkQ_7cONFmxifWQXCfCg4Qn5tPQGc=)
---
The scenario above isn’t a fringe possibility. MAGA election deniers running for office have made their plans perfectly clear, and the results could be devastating. Vox writes that “There’s not a lot of attention on [some of] these races, so it really gives any one of them a viable opportunity to win. And _The Atlantic_ reports that election shenanigans in just **“six states could overturn the 2024 election!”**

But guess what: **The NDRC is working in all of those states.** With enough grassroots support, we WILL be successful in stopping Republicans like Doug Mastriano (PA), Kari Lake (AZ), and Tudor Dixon (MI) from wreaking havoc on our democracy.

That’s the good news. **The bad news is that time is running out to make a difference.** The election is just weeks away, but the ramifications will last for decades. Don’t wait until it’s too late, friend. clean_body: BUT WAIT: Governors and secretaries of state in places like Michigan, Pennsylvania, and Arizona are claiming fraud... | Imagine this, friend. It’s Election Night 2024. You think Democrats have the White House in the bag. BUT WAIT: Governors and secretaries of state in places like Michigan, Pennsylvania, and Arizona are claiming fraud, stopping the vote count, and mucking up the gears. You remember that these folks were well-known 2020 election deniers – but nobody stopped them from winning their races in 2022! Now the country is in crisis, and everyone’s on edge. Don’t let it happen! | = & do much more ↴ = The scenario above isn’t a fringe possibility. MAGA election deniers running for office have made their plans perfectly clear, and the results could be devastating. Vox writes that “There’s not a lot of attention on [some of] these races, so it really gives any one of them a viable opportunity to win. And The Atlantic reports that election shenanigans in just “six states could overturn the 2024 election!” But guess what: The NDRC is working in all of those states. With enough grassroots support, we WILL be successful in stopping Republicans like Doug Mastriano (PA), Kari Lake (AZ), and Tudor Dixon (MI) from wreaking havoc on our democracy. That’s the good news. The bad news is that time is running out to make a difference. The election is just weeks away, but the ramifications will last for decades. body:

| | Select Committee chair Bennie Thompson told the media that the upcoming televised January 6th hearing could be the final one. But it’s clear that this investigation is still ongoing, with key figures like Justice Clarence Thomas’ wife Ginni Thomas and Wisconsin state legislator Robin Vos still being questioned for their knowledge of that day. * There are 18 Republican candidates on the ballot right now who were in DC on January 6th.
* They’re part of the 650+ election deniers and threats to democracy candidates who are running right now!
* So the findings of the January 6th Select Committee don’t just affect Donald Trump or Republican congressmen and senators – these findings will help us hold state Republicans accountable too!

clean_body: Would you tune in for a final Jan. 6th hearing? | | | | | Select Committee chair Bennie Thompson told the media that the upcoming televised January 6th hearing could be the final one. But it’s clear that this investigation is still ongoing, with key figures like Justice Clarence Thomas’ wife Ginni Thomas and Wisconsin state legislator Robin Vos still being questioned for their knowledge of that day. So we’re polling local Democrats – | Do you want to see more televised hearings from the January 6th Select Committee? Yes No Unsure These hearings tie directly to the work we do here at the DLCC. Let us tell you why: There are 18 Republican candidates on the ballot right now who were in DC on January 6th. They’re part of the 650+ election deniers and threats to democracy candidates who are running right now! So the findings of the January 6th Select Committee don’t just affect Donald Trump or Republican congressmen and senators – these findings will help us hold state Republicans accountable too! Thank you for taking our poll and tuning in, The DLCC Team ** | Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005 Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions or gifts to the DLCC are not tax deductible. | The Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee and Grassroots Victory PAC are dedicated to winning and defending Democratic majorities in state legislatures across the country. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of our grassroots network. Emails are a crucial way to stay in touch with our supporters. Please add us to your address book or safe senders list to ensure timely election updates. We're fighting to elect Democrats and advance a progressive vision in the states. body:
#

$3.
That is the donation we’re asking you to make today to help re-elect Mark Kelly in just a few weeks.
Last year, more than 200,000 people contributed to Mark Kelly’s re-election campaign. It’s a number we’re VERY proud of.
But it’s a different race today. If Democrats lose even one Senate seat, we could wake up on November 9 with Senate Majority Leader Mitch McConnell.
And National Republicans know this too. That’s why they announced another nearly $7 MILLION in TV attack ads to beat us in these final weeks.
So, flipping Arizona — a race where we’re currently ahead by only 1% — is clearly one of McConnell’s top priorities right now.
Mark has already faced millions of dollars in attack ads, and now he is facing millions more just weeks before voters begin casting their ballots. It’s going to take a BIG team to hold this seat. So, we’re asking:
[**Can you please make your first $3 donation to help Mark hold this seat? We have to be ready to give it everything we’ve got in these final weeks.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-oct22.7U3p1A&refcode=em221002-2-7&t=1&akid=4079%2E6688874%2EgY0hTf)

With President Biden and Vice President Harris in the White House, we have a clear path forward. But we can't get complacent. We have to keep fighting if we're going to undo the damage Donald Trump has done. | Together we can protect access to health care, expand Social Security, and fight for vital institutions like the Post Office. Because it's what's right. As [1] of just [3] Democratic physicians in Congress, it's more important than ever that I am able to fight for our most vulnerable communities. But I need you in this fight with me: From the emergency room to the halls of Congress, it's my duty to do as much good as I can. Can I count on you to help me keep fighting in Congress? name: Michael Bennet
subject: I want to say thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Colorado
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/51842737/370472739/1039449404?refcode=AU_MFB_CUL_GEN_NOA_AC_20221002_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MzZhYmUwYy1iMTQyLWVkMTEtYjQ5NS0wMDIyNDgzMmU0Y2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CGKzT6BaP3DTfcmGdp9txxeRpRHV_1mjzUn-BRyUHv4=) I want to take a moment to say thank you. We’ve closed the books on our last full quarter before Election Day, and thanks to you and this team, we reached our grassroots fundraising goals and received the 100,000th online donation to power my campaign. **Now, we’re heading into the final stretch of this race strong, unified, and in position to win — and we got here together, without a single cent from corporate PACs or federal lobbyists.** Don’t get me wrong: The next five weeks will be difficult, and this race is still extremely close. My opponent can write himself massive checks any time he wants, and he has Mitch McConnell and the National GOP’s $331 million warchest behind him. We all have to chip in, speak out, and make sure our communities vote. _But I know that we can and will do that — because we’ve done it already._ It’s how we secured the largest investment in climate action in American history, passed the first bipartisan gun safety law in decades, protected Coloradans from surprise medical bills, and brought historic infrastructure investments home to Colorado. We’ve taken on tough fights and won before. We’ll do it again on November 8th. Thank you for your continued support. Together, let’s keep the US Senate blue and keep delivering for Colorado families. Yours in this fight, Michael Michael Bennet is the only Senator running for re-election without taking a cent from corporate PACs or federal lobbyists. People like you truly power his work.

body:

And oddly enough, it’s not always the socialists or far-Left Democrats who worry me the most, Peter.

_It’s often the big tech companies and media who really threaten the fabric of America._

**If we’re going to take back the Senate, we need to hold the institutions accountable who threaten our freedom of speech and control the flow of information to American citizens.**

clean_body: | | | Peter, As a member of Team Hawley, I see every day what Josh is up against. And oddly enough, it’s not always the socialists or far-Left Democrats who worry me the most, Peter. It’s often the big tech companies and media who really threaten the fabric of America. If we’re going to take back the Senate, we need to hold the institutions accountable who threaten our freedom of speech and control the flow of information to American citizens. Right now, we have an incredible opportunity to take back America, but I need your help. Our EXTENDED end of quarter deadline expires TOMORROW at MIDNIGHT, and this is an incredible opportunity to send REAL patriots to the Senate to take back America. Thank you, Blake, Team Josh Hawley | SEN. JOSH HAWLEY UPDATE: I appeared on Fox News recently with Sean Hannity to discuss how the Biden Administration is using their DOJ to target political opponents rather than working to fix a multitude of issues facing our country right now. | | | | Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee | |

Hello,
Grassroots donors like you are the most critical part of my campaign, so I wanted you to be among the first to know:
**Poll after poll has shown Chuck Grassley’s approval rating at the lowest it’s ever been. But after we out-raised him by 2-to-1, Grassley just began airing $2.7 million in NEW television ads attacking me!**
The latest polling shows we are gaining ground. We are hot on Grassley’s heels, and I never could have done it without you.
But here’s the problem: The GOP's spending advantage on TV could ruin everything we’ve worked for. With Grassley spending another $2.7 million on TV against me, Mitch McConnell’s Super PACs are sure to follow.
We have the momentum, but this could put a stop to it unless we double down on our voter outreach immediately.
**I set a goal to raise $35,000 before our first important deadline of October at midnight tonight to fight back against Grassley’s attacks. But the only way we’ll hit our goal and win is if grassroots donors like you give right now:**
[**I can’t defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and protect our Democratic Senate majority without your help now, so I’m personally asking: Please, will you chip in $5 or more right now to help me win?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/51842749/370476157/-42398318?refcode=em20221002pm2-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3M2E4NjE4Ny1iMjQyLWVkMTEtYjQ5NS0wMDIyNDgzMmU0Y2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aCNoF6yN1l2AM1cphEgJA0DqnyJrXBzrVSkDHbqnH40=)

Hello, Grassroots donors like you are the most critical part of my campaign, so I wanted you to be among the first to know: Poll after poll has shown Chuck Grassley’s approval rating at the lowest it’s ever been. But after we out-raised him by 2-to-1, Grassley just began airing $2.7 million in NEW television ads attacking me! The latest polling shows we are gaining ground. We are hot on Grassley’s heels, and I never could have done it without you. But here’s the problem: The GOP's spending advantage on TV could ruin everything we’ve worked for. With Grassley spending another $2.7 million on TV against me, Mitch McConnell’s Super PACs are sure to follow. We have the momentum, but this could put a stop to it unless we double down on our voter outreach immediately. I set a goal to raise $35,000 before our first important deadline of October at midnight tonight to fight back against Grassley’s attacks. But the only way we’ll hit our goal and win is if grassroots donors like you give right now: = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = I am so grateful that you’ve believed in me and our campaign. Together, we are going to finally end Chuck Grassley’s decades long career. Thank you, Mike Franken, U.S. Navy (ret.) Fellow American, great news!

I have been named the newest “Young Gun” by Republican House Leader Kevin McCarthy and the National Republican Congressional Committee (NRCC).

The “Young Guns” program supports Republicans in competitive congressional races across the country and has helped elect over 150 members to Congress. I am honored to receive their support; **they recognize how close our race is in CT-05 and how valuable our campaign is to taking back the House.**

**But now I’m an even bigger target to the national Democrats and their _SLIM_ majority. They will pour all of their resources and hundreds of thousands of dollars to prevent us from flipping this seat RED.**

That is why we are setting a [**goal of $20,000 to reach in the next 72 hours**](http://links.georgeloganforcongress.com/u/click?_t=ab154d37b4f04f71ab6ab4c65effe590&_m=027f180e97dc478eaf699a685b64e113&_e=LB4LzuNy96otJHY9fYiSdem51hwrTX5OVshcz31J7_hYu_hTY465n3md7il2za-_AZXgx3SNTJJnH_KfBO3C18G8YUCaWrResJNt2Y9jo7_UoW07TPo5NYxEHhfAuiizDfH3ktZCbEbBQNjMikHmChZ3N59N951BDmJ7V63Eu5XrglYXQnVssQS6PpYMXOGKuOzHU_JsmyqXKljR0FwQctNHRyDs9VRRnE3Xt1xBN6FkJDDADptd1huLoOmXJK7hd4L_uYzlOuSsyyGhBNkHIo4VZUy_HBDCibm1tR8JY6cLR9zONnFg2PzQLbMLQziJ9AwUeq2E3yN7Q6UfpZnOOdjKmG3owpgBbadx_CMjPuoJgnWEpDepwbEeIJr0vrVXWJPBmmvKI21O7MAfeAwYoA%3D%3D) to ensure we have the funds needed for any attacks that will come in the next month, [**and we need your help to reach it!**](http://links.georgeloganforcongress.com/u/click?_t=ab154d37b4f04f71ab6ab4c65effe590&_m=027f180e97dc478eaf699a685b64e113&_e=LB4LzuNy96otJHY9fYiSdem51hwrTX5OVshcz31J7_hYu_hTY465n3md7il2za-_AZXgx3SNTJJnH_KfBO3C18G8YUCaWrResJNt2Y9jo7_UoW07TPo5NYxEHhfAuiizDfH3ktZCbEbBQNjMikHmChZ3N59N951BDmJ7V63Eu5XrglYXQnVssQS6PpYMXOGKuOzHU_JsmyqXKljR0FwQctNHRyDs9VRRnE3Xt1xBN6FkJDDADptd1huLoOmXJK7hBcK_5YdCv3LjEsmIxBIXBKIg3UWTNVyCRME3RyjIommR2Xt6_SmOOIFMh6Y1U6lJ3nQh8Nev5W6PMsqjH9rE5TbxSptN3v8znSy8IX14k14TVe17lFI26TXDGTvTGZE6lDqFn86FuWpcW9GTbOP2-A%3D%3D)

I know $20,000 might seem like a lofty goal, but Democrat Congressional Campaign Committee (DCCC) has raised over **$200 MILLION** this election cycle. **Every last dollar counts in a race this close.**

And this is a chance for us to make history! Connecticut hasn’t elected a Republican to the U.S. House in 14 years, and we are a **TOP-SEVEN** targeted race. **I refuse to allow this opportunity to slip away.**

[**Please, will you join Republican House Leader Kevin McCarthy and the NRCC in supporting me as we head into the final weeks of this campaign and help us reach our goal?**](http://links.georgeloganforcongress.com/u/click?_t=ab154d37b4f04f71ab6ab4c65effe590&_m=027f180e97dc478eaf699a685b64e113&_e=LB4LzuNy96otJHY9fYiSdem51hwrTX5OVshcz31J7_hYu_hTY465n3md7il2za-_AZXgx3SNTJJnH_KfBO3C18G8YUCaWrResJNt2Y9jo7_UoW07TPo5NYxEHhfAuiizDfH3ktZCbEbBQNjMikHmChZ3N59N951BDmJ7V63Eu5XrglYXQnVssQS6PpYMXOGKuOzHU_JsmyqXKljR0FwQctNHRyDs9VRRnE3Xt1xBN6FkJDDADptd1huLoOmXJK7hSBGE4V_El1WzrqmCpnYk8ZncNDpBly26GQ577EH9GHAszpl4mTrEcXE3M2afiIeqMk6jEVn3MnMzoChEY9zrP_n2eVM4Np7sPbTK_KnMdSVUFjn6HYFEhkOIJqvCYLgOV7XEXaIXPDo0Lra_-FrJzg%3D%3D)

body:
My heart just dropped

| [](http://links.drmillermeeks.com/u/click?_t=a0459abfcdbb4d8889670e005e3f851c&_m=63c6453cae84414eaa9ab1075acc81f0&_e=pRjuvXhtv_8bFBemZid31B3IdQLd2En7Xuax2Z6xK5Ib4mkuWXJEA1i8jTHW6GhHV_HxqJ546xP3DK9S_8B7XbaEpUBaDYPh4oWm0eTcYPLbqNQHu4h5LcPHovc5uHAcDgJpIKHzy7Tehv_BjVcUv_0PqmgADgcQMhJS4yR1OXeHANHX_KVrNqdnnPTFDzCC8hB-8DpDqd1VFjTL3tTpbCib6PqN4XIcWP-ubevr8zQPGYNm4uHvwMFC-RP-v-KwJOpfF3Wn7_4KslTO7KicmzBtuaGa304up6CqRUX4Ge_o-arN-UH15Ea0MllEn6fzJiLXsCY8EjjT_joB5x-bSSztSWcHeSKtFsMrLP6bJPV1SReBqKc7y2LWT-iPisgPDV-BZe6MlD8fWBm1ldS3s5RuYubXjALGcFyREwQBSjVzRwVeAJSp1Bbxs_mz0VCFO5LTvWc-ghzMUPyXxniJKw%3D%3D)
---

Friends -

**_Consider this a last call - time is nearly up._**

I’m losing to my Radical Socialist opponent, and the prospect of Republicans taking back the House in 2022 is dying by the day - I need you to read carefully.

Friend, I’m laughing.

Honestly, Tim Ryan is pathetic. And so are his Woke Hollywood friends he’s paying to attack me.

Because... we all know billionaire Hollywood stars like John Legend and Jennifer Lawrence have SO MUCH credibility when it comes to the Ohio Senate race... nice try, Tim. LOL.

**_Ohioans see right through this pathetic ploy. Tim Ryan is now seeking out Hollywood stars to attack me. But could he seriously not do ANY better than Jennifer Lawrence?!_**
[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=5bed9c03aaae48dc8552f3a2ce7b7886&_e=TxXu7i3B0Rd_gSrZhrAfFr56KUkf0cBoW-A-zZysHiYiOSd0fJ7WvkPuqqhJDwrWiysE82g5ELhkYJOXt5-jKGlcfUf_wj_TFrcrIpenUTUnvyI3sxOESeFd5Q3l9PDCx_VYI8Z7R2FpNN7AvT7kBoqlSH7D0bXK-RpbM9Sj7Oaug_DsH3U6MMZN_YP0HH6ZOyi8CeB2q8xCJ0xPrDlbOWRnfrhzfM8GKT68YGLZzZdcUoixPKxJH5c4qNTPXO3dDsJCaY7gWMyZWPvNf9s51GoL-IzniZ0ZvNyCSUQDQJHHtwiztHXnrSYBBqD0EX3raqc7sTtYX9QUCtzDc8IAUcZuGYOVeKJG386KscVl12i66bJOt-EbqMeOq1IG2ATdrkb6vkjNKQg8eSaRMbw5zwXAtvrcJLiMyZPqhjj9CEEsJNVfc5r3NijA3V7W9Zb16xZpRcIDSPHuC2k45cEhzNWvFkqogMJDZWsnhh19xeNGDuOH4dPuZ2RuSku7pJjr)
**“He’s not a hillbilly if he wrote a huge book... I mean, I’m rich but I’m not running for office pretending that I’m not.” - Jennifer Lawrence

????????

Such eloquent, wise, intelligent words from this Hollywood actress! If only they were true!**

And Tim Ryan legitimately put this graphic in an email to millions of people.

[**_Chip in ANYTHING to help me fight back! Even $1 or $2 bucks help me fight back these billionaires._**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=5bed9c03aaae48dc8552f3a2ce7b7886&_e=TxXu7i3B0Rd_gSrZhrAfFr56KUkf0cBoW-A-zZysHiYiOSd0fJ7WvkPuqqhJDwrWiysE82g5ELhkYJOXt5-jKGlcfUf_wj_TFrcrIpenUTUnvyI3sxOESeFd5Q3l9PDCx_VYI8Z7R2FpNN7AvT7kBoqlSH7D0bXK-RpbM9Sj7Oaug_DsH3U6MMZN_YP0HH6ZOyi8CeB2q8xCJ0xPrDlbOWRnfrhzfM8GKT68YGLZzZdcUoixPKxJH5c4qNTPXO3dDsJCaY7gWMyZWPvNf9s51GoL-IzniZ0ZvNyCSUQDQJHHtwiztHXnrSYBBqD0EX3raqc7sTtYX9QUCtzDc8IAUWOhvPUABgqtUe6VbUXhXdrbTOnupICoIje2PdsDZJF11zOZuEmJFSvz5UkmTCwBGGbDjANByjY_yB5GVabGKuTwedXxNQ5brhGHJlzZglAOGc_O9n5-zVkHVgGY-w_fzLyIxJ52jVUlyvlVSl-n8rjWE0bbnj2EjAaYmzXtxlSH)

I saw this email when I was drinking my morning coffee and immediately spit it out. You cannot make this sh*t up.

Instead of running to your Hollywood cronies, **let’s focus this race on OHIOANS and REAL ISSUES.** Hollywood and the Media have already made politics petty enough. _Let’s be better than them._

clean_body: First John Legend, now Jennifer Lawrence | | Friend, I’m laughing. Honestly, Tim Ryan is pathetic. And so are his Woke Hollywood friends he’s paying to attack me. Because... we all know billionaire Hollywood stars like John Legend and Jennifer Lawrence have SO MUCH credibility when it comes to the Ohio Senate race... nice try, Tim. LOL. Ohioans see right through this pathetic ploy. Tim Ryan is now seeking out Hollywood stars to attack me. But could he seriously not do ANY better than Jennifer Lawrence?! “He’s not a hillbilly if he wrote a huge book... I mean, I’m rich but I’m not running for office pretending that I’m not.” - Jennifer Lawrence ???????? Such eloquent, wise, intelligent words from this Hollywood actress! If only they were true! And Tim Ryan legitimately put this graphic in an email to millions of people. I saw this email when I was drinking my morning coffee and immediately spit it out. You cannot make this sht up. Instead of running to your Hollywood cronies, let’s focus this race on OHIOANS and REAL ISSUES. Hollywood and the Media have already made politics petty enough. Let’s be better than them. And despite what Jennifer Lawrence says, I am in fact a hillbilly and always will be. Thank you so much for reading this and helping me fight back against this Woke Mob dedicated to taking me down. All my best, JD Conservative Outsider. Marine. Businessman. Author. Ohio needs a true conservative in the U.S. Senate. It needs someone who understands how our economic and government leaders conspire to make life harder for normal Americans. Ohio needs JD Vance. ---
Hi there,
**Thanks to the incredible outpouring of support from people like you, we are energized to go all-out for the last leg of this campaign.** You stepped up right through the final hour and came through in a major way. And for that, we are incredibly grateful to have you on our team.
The next five weeks will be crucial for turning out voters across PA-01. It’s going to require a lot of late nights, direct conversations, voting reminders, and determination to take on an incumbent like Brian Fitzpatrick. But knowing we have a strong grassroots movement behind us is exactly why we’re ready to fight until the end and win.
**We cannot take our foot off the gas pedal yet.** Now more than ever, we have to keep up our momentum by sharing Ashley’s message to as many people as possible — from restoring reproductive rights and defending our fundamental freedoms to building an economy that lifts up working families.
Thanks for all your hard work to elect Ashley and flip PA-01 blue this November. Without your support, none of this would be possible.
— Team Ehasz

clean_body: Thanks to the incredible outpouring of support from people like you, we are energized to go all-out for the last leg of this campaign. Y | = | = Hi there, Thanks to the incredible outpouring of support from people like you, we are energized to go all-out for the last leg of this campaign. You stepped up right through the final hour and came through in a major way. And for that, we are incredibly grateful to have you on our team. The next five weeks will be crucial for turning out voters across PA-01. It’s going to require a lot of late nights, direct conversations, voting reminders, and determination to take on an incumbent like Brian Fitzpatrick. But knowing we have a strong grassroots movement behind us is exactly why we’re ready to fight until the end and win. We cannot take our foot off the gas pedal yet. Now more than ever, we have to keep up our momentum by sharing Ashley’s message to as many people as possible — from restoring reproductive rights and defending our fundamental freedoms to building an economy that lifts up working families. Thanks for all your hard work to elect Ashley and flip PA-01 blue this November. Without your support, none of this would be possible. — Team Ehasz = | Ashley Ehasz is a U.S. Army veteran, Apache helicopter pilot, and Democrat running to unseat Republican Brian Fitzpatrick and represent Pennsylvania’s 1st Congressional District: to provide our communities with the services and opportunities they need to thrive, to create positive change, and to ensure the next generation will have a better future ahead of them. | = | Paid for by Ehasz for Congress Ehasz for Congress 1800 Byberry Road #1336 Bensalem, PA 19020 United States Ashley Ehasz is a former member of the U.S. Army. I had to reach out:
_The New York Times_ just reported that despite my opponent, Herschel Walker, saying he would donate millions of his companies’ profits to charity, there is no evidence he did.
This is par for the course with Walker, and it’s clear he has a problem with the truth.
He is not ready to represent Georgia.
Despite all this, Republicans are all-in behind him. And Donald Trump even announced he’s going to rally and rile up his base for Walker, right here in Georgia.
While Walker’s been cozying up with the GOP establishment, I’ve been in Congress fighting for voting rights, better jobs, and lower health care costs. I secured a cap on insulin costs for seniors and student loan relief.
When I first ran for office, I vowed to not take a dime of corporate PAC money. I work for the people, plain and simple. And with just a few weeks until Election Day, my team just set an important midnight fundraising goal. name: Beto for Texas
subject: Looking for input from supporters in your area
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
Your input matters.
#
With the election only 37 days away, Beto asked us to reach out and get input from some of our top supporters — which is why we’re asking you to represent your area in our new survey.
**Will you take a minute to respond to the question below?**
Thanks to his corporate mega-donors, Greg Abbott has spent more than twice as much money as Beto on TV and radio ads over the last six weeks. **What should be our top priority as we fight back against Greg Abbott’s statewide ad blitz?** [**» Increasing our TV, radio, and digital budgets**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/57334?refcode=ema20221002-210629&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=210629%2E444211%2EC6tSXt) [**» Supporting our statewide organizing program and 95,000+ volunteers during GOTV**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/57335?refcode=ema20221002-210629&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=210629%2E444211%2EC6tSXt) [**» Keeping Beto on the road traveling to communities in all 254 Texas counties**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/57336?refcode=ema20221002-210629&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=210629%2E444211%2EC6tSXt) [**» Other**](https://act.betoorourke.com/survey/pre_election_survey_other/?t=4&akid=210629%2E444211%2EC6tSXt)
---
Thank you for taking the time to share your response. It really means a lot, and we’ll be taking the results of this survey into account as we review our budget and spending priorities in the days ahead.
Supporters like you are the reason we are going to elect Beto and defeat Greg Abbott on November 8.
More soon,
Beto for Texas

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-footer?refcode=em20221002-210629-footer&t=5&refcode2=210629_444211_C6tSXt&akid=210629%2E444211%2EC6tSXt)**
---
Email us: info@betofortexas.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Grassroots supporters like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Beto for Texas, PO Box 302647, Austin, TX 78703.

clean_body: On January 6th, California Rep Jay Obnernolte along with 146 Republicans voted to reject electoral votes from Arizona and Pennsylvania in an effort to prevent the peaceful transfer of power in America. As a consequence, corporate America promised to cut off their financial support of these 147 Republicans, otherwise known as the Sedition Caucus. However, the corporate cash continues to flow to the “Big Lie” MAGA Republicans. Corporate donations from Fortune 500 companies to the MAGA Republicans who objected to the election results now total well over $16 million! Derek Marshall’s campaign is funded by grassroots supporters like you. He doesn’t take corporate PAC money. He certainly doesn’t take money from organizations that support the attempted coup in America. Derek’s opponent, Rep. Obernolte, is benefitting from the undoing of the American government. He is receiving corporate donations despite his promotion of the big lie and the subversion of our democracy. What is the end game here? Some kind of corporate authoritarian state? We have to fight back against the forces that would undo American democracy. Democracy needs YOU! Derek Marshall for Congress = Derek Marshall is a Democrat running for Congress in California's 23rd District. He's running to bring the folks of the high desert & mountains together for a more livable life. = To donate by check, please mail to: Derek Marshall for Congress P.O. Box 2836 Victorville, CA 92395 (760) 486-2416 Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress | |

Governor DeWine’s extreme ban on abortion has left Ohioans fleeing the state.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/51840557/370457468/1144435635?refcode=nw_em_templateheader&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMzJkOGU3Yy05YjQyLWVkMTEtYjQ5NS0wMDIyNDgzMmU0Y2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wBX1YCahZQtZMYz0PdXzeM8kwRdf-RparfTzuus0bPg=)

Team,
In a moment, I’m going to ask you to [_**pitch in to my campaign for governor**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/51840558/370457469/-1862803865?refcode=nw_em_221002_2_t2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMzJkOGU3Yy05YjQyLWVkMTEtYjQ5NS0wMDIyNDgzMmU0Y2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wBX1YCahZQtZMYz0PdXzeM8kwRdf-RparfTzuus0bPg=) – but first I’d like to tell you why, and what’s at stake in this race.
First, the Supreme Court overturned _Roe v. Wade_ and opened the door for radical right-wing Republicans to restrict and even ban abortion.
Then – just hours later – Mike DeWine and his Republican attorney general did exactly that, enacting a ban on abortion that is so extreme, many people don’t even know they’re pregnant yet.
Now, the consequences are ringing across Ohio, with devastating results: People are being forced to flee the state to seek care even in excruciating circumstances, while doctors are being denied the ability to provide best-in-class care.
**Ohioans are pro-choice – but Mike DeWine and his Republican allies have decided that they belong in our personal medical decisions.** It’s unconscionable, and I’m running to change it.
**[But I need your help to defeat Mike DeWine and ensure that Ohio has a governor who will restore and protect reproductive rights. Please, will you chip in $5 ahead of our upcoming fundraising deadline?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/51840559/370457470/-1862803865?refcode=nw_em_221002_2_t2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMzJkOGU3Yy05YjQyLWVkMTEtYjQ5NS0wMDIyNDgzMmU0Y2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wBX1YCahZQtZMYz0PdXzeM8kwRdf-RparfTzuus0bPg=)**
Onward,
Nan Whaley

subject: Another Home Run
body:
There has never been a Secretary of State candidate in Michigan that has more support from Michiganders than Kristina Karamo! While the majority of donations given to her opponent Jocelyn Benson, are from radical, Anti-American PACs and individuals, Kristina continues to rely on grassroots donations from people like YOU to fuel her campaign to victory!

Yesterday, at Trump's Save America rally in Warren, MI, Karamo knocked it out of the ballpark with another outstanding speech.

Her supporters filled an entire section of seats. An army of her supporters swarmed the venue, passing out literature and yard signs. One veteran reporter remarked, "I have never seen a campaign like Karamo's, you guys are literally everywhere! Also, everyone is so nice!"

The momentum for Kristina Karamo continues to build. **Help keep the momentum going by volunteering to knock on doors in your neighborhood or by making the largest donation you can afford to her campaign today. **

clean_body: | | | Fellow American, As a member of Team Hawley, I see every day what Josh is up against. And oddly enough, it’s not always the socialists or far-Left Democrats who worry me the most, Fellow American. It’s often the big tech companies and media who really threaten the fabric of America. If we’re going to take back the Senate, we need to hold the institutions accountable who threaten our freedom of speech and control the flow of information to American citizens. Right now, we have an incredible opportunity to take back America, but I need your help. Our EXTENDED end of quarter deadline expires TOMORROW at MIDNIGHT, and this is an incredible opportunity to send REAL patriots to the Senate to take back America. Thank you, Blake,Team Josh Hawley | SEN. JOSH HAWLEY UPDATE: I appeared on Fox News recently with Sean Hannity to discuss how the Biden Administration is using their DOJ to target political opponents rather than working to fix a multitude of issues facing our country right now. | | | | Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee | |

Peter, I want to take a moment to say thank you personally. Thank you, because thanks to you, we were able to make last quarter our strongest yet. This is a pueblo-powered effort, and that means you are the ones who have been powering this campaign from start to present. Without your financial support, we would not have the resources to keep fighting our corporate-backed, dark-money Republican opponents. **Your support for building a better future for South Texas means everything to me, and as we move into Early Vote, Get-Out-the-Vote, and the final days of this campaign, I am thankful in advance because I know I can count on you!** Together, we’re fighting for a vision that includes racial, reproductive, and LGBTQ+ justice. A vision that will bring good-paying jobs to South Texas and ensure no one goes without the health care they need. Our vision and the movement we are building together are powerful, Peter. Let’s seize the time we have left and show everyone that we have what it takes to bring it into reality. **[If you weren’t able to donate during our End of Quarter push, it’s not too late to chip in. And if you have already donated, thank you so much again! clean_body: Thank you, because thanks to you, we were able to make last quarter our strongest yet. | | | Peter, I want to take a moment to say thank you personally. Thank you, because thanks to you, we were able to make last quarter our strongest yet. This is a pueblo-powered effort, and that means you are the ones who have been powering this campaign from start to present. Without your financial support, we would not have the resources to keep fighting our corporate-backed, dark-money Republican opponents. Your support for building a better future for South Texas means everything to me, and as we move into Early Vote, Get-Out-the-Vote, and the final days of this campaign, I am thankful in advance because I know I can count on you! Together, we’re fighting for a vision that includes racial, reproductive, and LGBTQ+ justice. A vision that will bring good-paying jobs to South Texas and ensure no one goes without the health care they need. Our vision and the movement we are building together are powerful, Peter. Let’s seize the time we have left and show everyone that we have what it takes to bring it into reality. ¡Vamos por Quince! Michelle Vallejo If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll instantly process your contribution to Michelle Vallejo: | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Michelle Vallejo for Congress Michelle Vallejo for Congress PO Box 1265 Mission, TX 78573

subject: What Tiffany Smiley’s extreme anti-abortion friends say about her
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
Smiley is campaigning with one anti-abortion extremist after another.
#
Peter,
Tiffany Smiley celebrated the reversal of _Roe v. Wade_.
She has made it clear that she supports the extreme Texas abortion ban and she thinks politicians should be able to make decisions about women’s private reproductive health care.
And now, she’s campaigning with Washington state Republicans like Matt Larkin and Joe Kent who want to go to the other Washington to ban all abortion, even in cases of rape and incest.
**[We can’t let extreme anti-abortion politicians win this fight in November. Please — chip in $5 now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/51843257/370495017/-743883757?refcode=pm_em_221002_2&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMjYxMTUxYy1iZjQyLWVkMTEtYjQ5NS0wMDIyNDgzMmU0Y2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NKloS7mTDowkrfKmt5s630rxF99vjWjsUeKqzlMtnI4=)**

So far in her campaign, she has touted endorsements from Joni Ernst and Marsha Blackburn and campaigned alongside far-right anti-abortion Senators like Marco Rubio and Rick Scott.
**If Tiffany Smiley wins this race, she will give Mitch McConnell the votes he needs to pass their anti-abortion agenda. We _cannot_ let this happen, Peter.**

body:

| | | Peter,

I'm being outraised and outspent quarter after quarter. Now, I'm coming up against my opponent in our election next month, and _**[I'm humbly asking you for $5.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61465278:6pUAE9VAN:m:1:3253819041:51F1DB8348DC486EE6AD1BAC0AA3DAEC:r "I’m humbly asking you for $5.")**_

**🔓4X MATCH LOCKS AT 11:59 PM🔓**

This is serious. These goals are real.These consequences are real, and if you fail to act, we will pay the price. We need to get on track before we get outraised AGAIN.

This is the LAST month before Election Day, which means this is the LAST chance we have at defeating Val Demings' massive Pelosi-backed warchest. This is the LAST chance to fund our ads and fight back against the lies her ads are spreading about me. It bears repeating: _Please don 't let me down!_

Marco Rubio

Rush $7 right now to SAVE our Senate majority and FLIP OHIO BLUE »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/28326?t=7&akid=4793%2E878179%2EzRnD-E) | [$10,000 MIDNIGHT GOAL: RUSH $7 NOW TO SUPPORT DEMOCRATS LIKE TIM RYAN »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/28326?t=8&akid=4793%2E878179%2EzRnD-E)
---
**GOAL: $10,000 || DEADLINE: MIDNIGHT**
Tim Ryan's massive drop in the polls could spell disaster in November.

If we can't fight back for him RIGHT NOW, J.D. Vance will win, **and the MAGA takeover will be all but guaranteed.**

With our voting rights, abortion rights, and civil rights all on the line in November, we need to help Democrats like Tim Ryan now more than ever.

_It 's the only way to protect (and expand!) our fragile one-seat Senate majority!_
[So we're BEGGING Democrats like you to step up to save our Senate and flip Ohio Blue - Rush $7 RIGHT NOW to save Democrats like Tim Ryan! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/28326?t=9&akid=4793%2E878179%2EzRnD-E)

**_REPUBLICANS ARE IN DANGER
OF NOT TAKING BACK THE SENATE_**
Peter, we’ve got to turn things around and we need to do it fast. We are less than 38 days away from the Midterm Election meaning we are in the final stretch of this election cycle.

**[What we accomplish over the next month will have an immeasurable impact on the future direction of our country.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=4d570245439e48428a3a601f4ee7f71a&_e=Sj7Vp8BLHZFwssNK-RUfqgRmZZvPVaA9yFlpgiFi2VVndPQP4mKyoFlw2IyNQoSmcU-jU79z6X0746gW-Nb-a0K928VNsTHn7sb2Th5fKsVHrIZRO8ULKZt5QQcZX-xhqOwwQTC4xhlDp4EYlZ0UUOHqCYRzUfVYCvNjpXPZ4SoUIZjznfUeTqAWSqkoYLSaxinO3wzpzEgl0nlyO9YIxjZOVH-LEk5H0rdlMX19c9aUq0Yz3Udv5Mlxfqrt-7t8DetUz3FdfLxiEY-BWr0GhB8VldpWTpDYFGnxHpDMIyC_jrz48zjPiw0e6u1du88fEhduAFH_NzYCt6wisXCBIbM3huuqqtPSSXov7XaneefAQcv2n0L5duQzdhZRMGHwOhoBW_8caQb7NClBh-h6ekUAF6ad928hIRZJXnskY0k%3D)**

In a speech given on the day Hurricane Ian made landfall, President Biden took the time to suggest that American’s are not proud of their country.
Peter,

name: Mary Trump via Blue Amp Action
subject: The insurrectionists have not been defeated. The attempted coup may have failed, but its architects have been emboldened to plan the next one.
body:
Fight my uncle’s “Big Lie”
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| | | | | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8b1feadd-ec9a-40c2-9770-29f25901f451/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Peter,_ On January 6, 2021, the very existence of our democracy was threatened and, for the first time in American history, the peaceful transition of power was interrupted. The insurrectionists have not been defeated. The attempted coup on that day may have failed but its architects have been emboldened and they are, in fact, planning the next one. Today, with your help, we’re fighting back at the ballot box. I’m proud to introduce you to Democracy Defense Fund — an organization committed to saving our country from the authoritarian traitors who seek to destroy it. [**Will you join our pro-democracy movement, Peter? I’m asking you to chip in right now: help us end the threat of the insurrectionist movement at the polls.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8c0fa90b-c452-4632-a62e-7ccf469f668a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) You know my uncle. He started the “Big Lie” and he continues to traffic in the right-wing extremism that puts our country at risk. **We must stop him, his loyal cronies, and those, at all levels of government, who continue to undermine our democracy. That’s why I founded the Democracy Defense Fund — and it’s why I’m asking for your help now.**
---

clean_body: Fight my uncle’s “Big Lie” | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Peter, On January 6, 2021, the very existence of our democracy was threatened and, for the first time in American history, the peaceful transition of power was interrupted. The insurrectionists have not been defeated. The attempted coup on that day may have failed but its architects have been emboldened and they are, in fact, planning the next one. Today, with your help, we’re fighting back at the ballot box. I’m proud to introduce you to Democracy Defense Fund — an organization committed to saving our country from the authoritarian traitors who seek to destroy it. You know my uncle. He started the “Big Lie” and he continues to traffic in the right-wing extremism that puts our country at risk. We must stop him, his loyal cronies, and those, at all levels of government, who continue to undermine our democracy. That’s why I founded the Democracy Defense Fund — and it’s why I’m asking for your help now. | | | | | | | | Election Day is around the corner and we need the resources to support candidates who are committed to protecting the right to vote and preserving our Constitution. This includes an all-out effort to hold the House and save the Senate, but also support campaigns at the local and state level in order to take back state houses and preserve election integrity. All of that is necessary in order to defend our democracy, Peter. And that’s what we’re committed to do here at Democracy Defense Fund. Thank you, Dr. Mary L. clean_body: We’re just 37 days from the midterm elections. We need to be clear about what’s on the ballot this year because there’s a heck of a lot at stake. | | If Republicans win control of Congress, they want to ban abortion. And they want to criminalize it nationwide. But if we elect two more Democratic senators and hold the House, Derek, we will codify Roe. Kamala and I are counting on you to make your first contribution to the DNC ahead of this year’s all-important midterm elections. Will you make a $7 contribution to the DNC today to help defeat MAGA Republicans this November? The power to get this done is in the hands of the American people -- especially the women of America. And I don’t believe MAGA Republicans have a clue about the power of women in America. But let me tell you something, Derek: They’re about to find out. Thank you for all that you do to support Democrats nationwide. Joe Joseph R. Biden, Jr. President of the United States Manage how often you receive DNC emails, . body:
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/51841168/370460266/227139380?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YTM3OTk1YS1hMTQyLWVkMTEtYjQ5NS0wMDIyNDgzMmU0Y2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VW3aKoFYfHQEEUN1xOpn7IRpaMsYBKRMUJpCBQ0ACZ0=&emci=5459b8ce-e740-ed11-b495-00224832e4ca&emdi=5a37995a-a142-ed11-b495-00224832e4ca&ceid=43566853)

| | Peter,

We have just **two weeks left** before Georgia voters begin casting their ballots.

Stacey Abrams is **_TIED_** and Rev. Warnock is **_one point down_** in the polls, and everything we do between now and October 17th will be crucial in helping them take the lead.

**_[This is our last chance to hit our fundraising goal for our one day Donor Drive so that we can fully fund our digital ads, field program, and voter protection team and can keep Georgia blue. Your donation will be TRIPLED >>
| | | Team -- Mitch McConnell is doing everything he can to BLOCK President Biden's agenda, and we must _defeat_ McConnell's right-wing allies to fight back. **Here are THREE vulnerable Republicans who Democrats can defeat with your support:**

**WE JUST UNLOCKED OUR TRIPLE-IMPACT MATCH, SO YOUR GIFT WILL GO 3X AS FAR TO DEFEAT TRUMP’S REPUBLICANS!**

**[Pitch in $5 _(becomes $15)_ now to help defeat all of McConnell and Trump's Senate cronies. Their team has outraised ours MULTIPLE times, and we're well short of hitting our $50,000 fundraising goal >>](https://go.dscc.org/go/10058?amount=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20221002-AllGiftsTRIPLED-GOPSlateRefTM-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20221002-AllGiftsTRIPLED-GOPSlateRefTM-Pros-sl1&akid=7186%2E9716520%2E7r0msA)**

McConnell said he'll hold ANOTHER seat on the Supreme Court hostage if we don't defend our single-seat Senate majority.

But if we don't keep pace with the GOP's megadonor base, it'll BADLY damage our chances against far-right, Trump-supporting Republicans like Marco Rubio, Ron Johnson, and Rand Paul.

This situation is dire: We could lose the Senate unless we turn our fundraising around _immediately_!

**We REFUSE to take off-days or abandon our fundraising goals in the face of Trump's megadonors. There is WAY too much at stake, so we'll ask one last time:**

Friends,

**We are reaching out today as a last-ditch effort to help the Trump-endorsed candidate to be the next Senator from Ohio: JD Vance.** JD missed the LAST End-of-Quarter goal by a couple of hundred dollars, and we need to provide an immediate groundswell of support, _Or JD’s campaign may have to close shop._

Suppose everyone got together and [**chipped in $25.**](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=d1df9b89f57f4ab78e2ca7bb90f48918&_e=R0Ag_XFU9naEH9Vsg1wSJ6UvSk193332fu0_56F_gS7idDkMeAbNbBJF24Ek6Zkiii7ZkH8NAUR1s46HU8eBFHIQzJMIDQhIDHcpL1EHna3h19R0eeZ1rn3aPF3ySqM-1LvnhZ-Ouzlo2c4vR8Hn8Hy6_Mq1MH1G6s1jhWF12rngM1l5ZYeIA-Seh-y6jBWWLj4-5yOeR_Y-mYgonEHN7I4MVfnH64go1oGhlJ9aqLydidsXuAXhkqoLy4sbFCUeH9TR_xWu6LW7GSd2_wVckWvaog8GqHgaH4fz353RrwJ-JpJ0aX7SS4ZgzZJ-_2856giMTlw5utCv8iScVyTM2oabXo2qdYRVMGLK8aQ2IJNykhUb9_LVzlwsjDpNy_txM201MIan1IptdKsOidixlJXQTlhK21bx9ylQTBco_h8PSuohmwWT3sFKdfYS3GLbzzXE4BGfrdBojW_p13eIIg%3D%3D) [**Then, we’d be able to show the Radical Left that Trump supporters around the country are circling the wagons around JD Vance for U.S. Senate.**](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=d1df9b89f57f4ab78e2ca7bb90f48918&_e=R0Ag_XFU9naEH9Vsg1wSJ6UvSk193332fu0_56F_gS7idDkMeAbNbBJF24Ek6Zkiii7ZkH8NAUR1s46HU8eBFHIQzJMIDQhIDHcpL1EHna3h19R0eeZ1rn3aPF3ySqM-1LvnhZ-Ouzlo2c4vR8Hn8Hy6_Mq1MH1G6s1jhWF12rngM1l5ZYeIA-Seh-y6jBWWLj4-5yOeR_Y-mYgonEHN7I4MVfnH64go1oGhlJ9aqLydidsXuAXhkqoLy4sbFCUeH9TR_xWu6LW7GSd2_wVckWvaog8GqHgaH4fz353RrwJ-JpJ0aX7SS4ZgzZJ-_285cPKnE1t99TUqbFeyAlNijLmE4kTJaYD4nasy1mFJkzrH5Wa7dvie0G7c286_JIKDUSuL1JyAffyxk9cRhkdgw_cku7W0iWurd5CO6EpAsQfixPS800fcSCH6JYlLTSzXGPqBj8y5hKpiJRTFCKkX8g%3D%3D)

YES. | Give me 5 seconds and I can tell you 5 reasons why this race is worth your attention. Your Family, Friends, Country, Rights, and Liberties are all on the line if we lose in November. I could tell you I'm busy as a sugar mill mule, and I could plead with you that the Left is making up ground across America (Which is all TRUE), but I don't have much time here -- I've got to get back on the road campaigning to make sure the Socialist Democrats don't take this election right from under us. In the next 10 MINUTES, I would be honored if you could rush $25 to help our national movement to TAKE BACK AMERICA. Best, John Kennedy Peter, our country was founded by geniuses but it's being run by idiots. And if you trust the government, well then you obviously failed history class. name: Charles Booker
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

Thank you, Peter.

I know we’ve sent you a lot of messages over the past few days asking you
to help us reach our end-of-the-month goal. And I can’t thank you enough
for showing up.

Today, I wanted to take the time to say thank you for supporting me. Thank
you for trusting me and thank you for believing in the work that I plan to
do as Kentucky’s U.S. Senator.

I could not do this work without your support, Peter.

When I’m elected into the Senate, I will continue to stand up, give back,
and get things done for ALL of Kentucky.

Your support is recognized and appreciated. Your contribution has allowed
me to reach thousands of potential voters and pay the team that is on the
ground every day helping us win on November 8th, 2022.

All my best,

Charles Booker

Experts at _FiveThirtyEight_ confirm that _our_ race could determine Senate control. So we need to close this budget gap, or we might put this seat and our entire Senate majority in serious danger. **And**** with this race so close, and only a few weeks left until Election Day, we don't have a second to spare. **

name: John Legend
subject: I’m personally asking, Derek
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ABRAMS FOR GOVERNOR |
body:
[1]Stacey Abrams for Governor

[ John ]Picture of John Legend in a suit.

Hi Derek, it’s
John Legend.

In a moment, I’m going to tell you all about my friend Stacey Abrams.

to voters before early in-person voting starts on October 17. Can you join
me in this fight to elect Stacey Abrams as the next governor of Georgia
and chip in $5 today?

[ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/4397?refcode=sa_em_221002_B3_JohnLegend_S1_T1_JL_30open&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250&t=1003&akid=10411%2E1862389%2EIH24rY ]DONATE

Derek, Stacey
Abrams is exactly the type of leader I want to guide my children’s future
— and one who will make history.

She is not afraid of challenging the status quo to build a better society
for everyone.

She led the Georgia House of Representatives as the first Black Minority
Leader and made real, bipartisan progress for Georgians.

She fought voter suppression and helped turn Georgia blue in 2020 for the
first time in a generation.

Now, she’s running to make history and become the first Black woman
governor in American history.

It’s as simple as this: Stacey is not afraid to take on a challenge to
break down barriers.

But with polls showing her statistically tied with her dangerous opponent
Brian Kemp, she needs a flood of donations to reach out to voters to make
sure they know about Stacey’s record of delivering what was once seen as

supporters like
you, Derek —
and why I am reaching out today. Early in-person voting starts in a matter
of weeks, and Stacey’s team is counting on a surge of donations before
then. Can you make your
first investment in
her campaign today to help her reach out to voters in every corner of

body:
not sure how to tell you this...

| Friend,

Conservatives are losing. We are in need of help from American patriots like you, Friend.

Here's what will happen without your help:
* Pelosi's favorite woke puppet candidates are going to win the election.
* The House will fall to the hands of the Radical Left, leading to unprecedented chaos throughout the country.
* The Left will take away our Second Amendment rights, lock us down, and impose more COVID mandates with no one to fight back.

These are just a handful of examples of what's going to happen. If we want to avoid this disaster scenario, we need your support, patriot.

Friend!

If you were to ever donate off of a fundraising email, **_it should be this one. Keep reading please._**

I know you've already heard from my team and me a ton this last week, but I'm so anxious because our FINAL FEC Deadline is here, and this couldn't wait.

You're hearing this straight from the mouth of Dr. Oz: **We missed the MOST IMPORTANT deadline of our entire campaign.**

We are extending our deadline until tonight 😃 3. Donating is useless 😑 Take your guess: Let 's break it down: We did miss our fundraising goal. This is a HUGE bummer because it was our final FEC End-of-Quarter goal before the election... This close to the elections, missing our goal could cost us the victory, which is the goal that matters. If we don't hit our deadlines, the Senate may fall further into the hands of the Radical Left. We are indeed extending our deadline!!! We are MATCHING ALL DONATIONS UNTIL MIDNIGHT BY 4! 💥 Donating - any amount - is one of the most IMPORTANT things you can do as a loyal conservative patriot. Without grassroots support from Americans like you, we could never have the impact we need to ensure a 2022 Red Wave. Whether your donation helps us buy yard signs, feed volunteers, or fund our next ad, it is helping us spread our conservative message and mobilize voters to Take Back the Senate! So, did you get it right? Sincerely, Ted Budd | | Ted Budd is a father, small business owner, and conservative leader running for Senate in North Carolina. He is the ONLY candidate who is endorsed by President Trump and the only candidate who will fight for the America First Agenda in Washington.
